groups.name: AI AWS UG Colombia
groups.description:
AI AWS User Group Colombia es una comunidad abierta para desarrolladores, arquitectos, ingenieros de datos, DevOps, investigadores y entusiastas que desean explorar, aprender y construir soluciones de Inteligencia Artificial y Machine Learning en la nube de AWS.

Nuestro objetivo es crear un espacio colaborativo donde compartimos experiencias reales, mejores prácticas y casos de uso sobre:

🤖 Inteligencia Artificial Generativa
📊 Machine Learning y MLOps
☁️ Arquitecturas en AWS para IA
🧠 Modelos fundacionales y RAG
🔐 Seguridad y gobernanza en workloads de IA
💸 Optimización de costos en proyectos de ML
🚀 Automatización e infraestructura como código para AI

Organizamos meetups presenciales y virtuales, charlas técnicas, workshops prácticos, demos en vivo y paneles con expertos de la industria para fortalecer el ecosistema de IA en Colombia.

Este grupo es para ti si:

* Trabajas con AWS y quieres profundizar en AI/ML
* Estás empezando en el mundo de la Inteligencia Artificial en la nube
* Buscas networking con profesionales del sector
* Te interesa compartir conocimiento o presentar tus proyectos
* Quieres impulsar la adopción responsable de IA en Latinoamérica

Nuestra comunidad promueve un ambiente inclusivo, técnico y colaborativo, enfocado en el aprendizaje continuo y en la creación de impacto real a través de la tecnología.

📍 Basados en Colombia — conectando talento en todo el país.
🌎 Abiertos a participantes de toda Latinoamérica.

¡Únete y construyamos juntos el futuro de la Inteligencia Artificial en la nube! 🚀☁️🤖

🤝Haz parte de la comunidad en todos nuestros canales https://linktr.ee/AIAWSUGColombia

The Brisbane AWS User Group is a community network of IT professionals, business people, innovators and entrepreneurs who are interested in Amazon Web Services. groups.name: Amazon Web Services - Gold Coast User Group
groups.description:
G'day!

The GoldCoast AWS User Group is a community based group of entrepreneurs, developers, business and IT people who are interested in Amazon Web Services. We provide an opportunity to see the latest developments in the world of Amazon Web Services and provide real examples and case studies of how local and international businesses are using AWS so you can learn from their experiences (and mistakes!) so we can apply the same techniques and solutions within our own business or project. 
Please invite anyone who may be interested in coming along and learning more about AWS. Share your knowledge and experience, and connect with other local cloud users. 
Pizza and drinks are provided at most of our Meetups, so join up and come along.
If you are interested in speaking at one of our Meetups, feel free to message the leadership team to organise a date for your presentation.

groups.name: Amazon Web Services - Sydney User Group

View our page here & don't forget to follow us to stay in the loop!

groups.name: Amazon Web Services - Wollongong User Group
groups.description:
Welcome to the Wollongong AWS User group! The founding members of this group are members of [Siligong](https://www.siligongvalley.com/), a group of passionate tech professionals, digital marketers and entrepreneurs promoting the growing tech industry in Wollongong. 

This group is dedicated to sharing knowledge about everything AWS.

If you're currently using AWS, then come out and share your knowledge with others! If you're new, come and learn!

groups.name: Amazon Web Services Bilbao User Group ☁
groups.description:
Tanto si tu empresa quiere usar AWS, como si ya usas AWS, tienes que unirte a este grupo, donde queremos fomentar, compartir y usar AWS en Bilbao, con ayuda y recursos en castellano.

Amazon Web Services (AWS) es una de las plataformas de nube más grandes y utilizadas en el mundo. Ofrece una amplia gama de servicios en la nube, desde almacenamiento de datos hasta procesamiento de datos en masa. AWS es una solución flexible y escalable que permite a las empresas tener acceso a una infraestructura de nube de alta disponibilidad y rendimiento.

Este grupo es una oportunidad única para fomentar el uso de AWS en Bilbao. Aquí, puedes conocer a otros profesionales de la tecnología y crear una comunidad local de usuarios de AWS. Juntos, podemos ayudar a impulsar el uso de la nube en la región y contribuir a la innovación y el crecimiento tecnológico.

groups.name: Amazon Web Services Puerto Rico User Group
groups.description: Este Grupo se dedicará a eventos con fin de educar sobre casos de uso sobre AWS y servicios que habilitan modernización e innovación para las empresas que estén adoptando o comenzando su jornada hacia la nube. groups.name: Amazon Web Services San Diego | Official Events
groups.description:
Come join the official Amazon Web Services User Group.

Slack for fellow West Coast AWS Meetup Practitioners.  Look for the san-diego-area channel.

LinkedIn for fellow San Diego AWS Meetup Practitioners.

AWS offers a complete set of infrastructure tools that enable you to run virtually everything in the cloud: from enterprise applications and big data projects to social games and mobile apps. If you want to learn about the newest AWS services, meet experts from the AWS team and network with others in the industry, this is the place for you.

groups.name: Amazon Web Services User Group (Adelaide)
groups.description:
The Amazon Web Services User Group (Adelaide) is a group dedicated to cloud services provided by Amazon. Because we are specific to Amazon Web Services (AWS), we can go deep into some of the technical services provided by AWS and get some really great insights into how their services work. If you want to put your application in the cloud and have already chosen AWS, or if you already have applications in the AWS cloud, then this is a great group to get helpful insights and advice from other group members.

The AWS User Group is not affiliated with any organisations and is independent from Amazon.

groups.name: Amazon Web Services User Group (AWSUGHYD)  - Hyderabad
groups.description:
Attention AWS users and fans: If you want to challenge the rules and redefine the possibilities of cloud technology, AWS User Group Hyderabad (AWSUGHYD) is the place to be. Join a vibrant community of developers and executives who are united by their desire to share experiences and build relationships.

You can amplify your AWS knowledge, collaborate with leaders and peers, and even make friends—all within an open, safe environment that encourages free thinking and diverse viewpoints. Sign up now to join the conversation.

groups.name: Amazon Web Services User Group Edinburgh
groups.description: A meetup group to coordinate a regular AWS user group for Scotland. We aim to have the event on a quarterly basis with speakers from companies using AWS as well as speakers from Amazon, talks will primarily cover the technical aspects of AWS services, featuring real-world use cases. Join if you are interested in meeting other people that work with AWS based services. People with all levels of technical knowledge are welcome, from beginner to expert!

groups.name: Amazon Web Services User Group Glasgow
groups.description: A new meet up group for users of Amazon Web Services.

groups.name: Amazon Web Services User Group Moldova
groups.description:
AWS and cloud enthusiasts let's get together.

groups.name: Auckland AWS Community Meetups
groups.description:
The Auckland Amazon Web Services Community is a group dedicated to cloud services provided by Amazon. Because we are specific to Amazon Web Services (AWS), we can go deep into some of the technical services provided by AWS and get some really great insights into how their services work. 

This group is for beginner's, pro's and everything in between we will be tackling basic concepts, technical breakdowns and user stories. 

If you want to put your application in the cloud and have already chosen AWS, or if you already have applications in the AWS cloud, then this is a great group to get helpful insights and advice from other group members. Also we would love to invite you to speak if you're interested in sharing some of your experiences. 

The Auckland AWS Community is all about AWS, so if you want to fast track your network and skills with AWS then this is the group for you.

groups.name: Auckland AWS Tools and Programming
groups.description:
Welcome to Auckland AWS Tools and Programming meetup group!

We're a group of developers, programmers, and other tech professionals passionate about AWS technology. We want to enable the opportunity for our community to come together to learn, discuss and share knowledge about AWS tools and best practices.

This meetup would include presentations and demos of tools, frameworks and services within the AWS ecosystem, and its focus would be on practical, hands-on learning and knowledge-sharing. The sessions will be interactive, where attendees can participate, share their experiences and collaborate on solutions if they like.

Our thoughts are to cover a wide range of topics, including, but not limited to, infrastructure within AWS, security, migrations, data, serverless, and more.

We are always looking for new speakers and topics, so if you are interested in presenting or have a suggestion, please let us know!

Please follow our YouTube channel:
https://www.youtube.com/@auckland-aws-tools-meetup

\-\-\-

**Code of Conduct**

**Purpose**
Auckland AWS Tools and Programing is dedicated to providing a harassment-free experience for everyone, regardless of gender, gender identity and expression, sexual orientation, disability, physical appearance, body size, race, age, or religion. We do not tolerate harassment of meetup participants in any form.

**Expected Behaviour**

* Be respectful and considerate: Respect the opinions, skills, and abilities of others. Be open to different perspectives and experiences.
* Be inclusive: Make an effort to include everyone and ensure that everyone has the opportunity to participate.
* Be collaborative: Work together to build a positive and supportive community.
* Be mindful of your language: Be kind and positive in your communication. Avoid offensive or inappropriate language.
* Be aware of your surroundings: Be attentive to how your actions and words may impact others in the meetup environment.

**Unacceptable Behaviour**

* Harassment includes, but is not limited to:
* Offensive comments related to gender, gender identity and expression, sexual orientation, disability, mental illness, physical appearance, body size, race, age, religion, nationality, regional background or any other protected status.
* Unwelcome comments regarding a person's lifestyle choices and practices, including those related to food, health, parenting, drugs, and employment.
* Deliberate misgendering or use of “dead” or rejected names.
* Gratuitous or off-topic sexual images or behaviour.
* Physical contact and simulated physical contact (e.g., textual descriptions like "hug" or "backrub") without consent or after a request to stop.
* Threats of violence or incitement of violence towards any individual or group, including encouraging a person to commit suicide or to engage in self-harm.
* Deliberate intimidation.
* Stalking or following.
* Harassing photography or recording, including logging online activity for harassment purposes.
* Sustained disruption of talks or other events.
* Advocating for or encouraging any of the above behaviour.

**Consequences of Unacceptable Behaviour**
Participants who are asked to stop inappropriate behaviour are expected to comply immediately. Meetup organisers may take any appropriate action, up to and including expulsion from the meetup, without warning.

**Reporting Guidelines**
If you are subject to or witness unacceptable behaviour or have any other concerns, please notify a meetup organiser as soon as possible. You can do this by:

* Contacting the organisers in person at the event.
* Sending an email to aucklandawstools@gmail.com.


**Acknowledgement**
By participating in Auckland AWS Tools and Programing, you agree to abide by this Code of Conduct and accept the consequences of any unacceptable behaviour.

groups.name: Austin AWS Users

groups.name: AWS Accra User Group
groups.description:
This is a group for anyone who wants to learn about AWS and its related technologies like EC2, RDS, IAM, Code tools etc. All skill levels are welcome, whether you are just getting familiar, have no knowledge or an AWS expert. This group seeks to educate about using AWS and its best practices. We welcome everybody.
The cloud is the future and we want you all to be a part of it.
We take a very practical approach to show you how things are done. Please feel free to share any challenges or question about AWS, we are here to help.

Join our slack workspace: https://join.slack.com/t/awsaccra/shared_invite/zt-1wht9d2sh-3JQuBsEWRJv\~8mbWqMSkzA

groups.name: AWS AI User Group Hong Kong
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS AI User Group Hong Kong! Our group focuses on exploring the intersection of AWS AI, as well as connecting with like-minded individuals in the Hong Kong AWS AI Users community. We discuss topics related to AI & Machine Learning in the Cloud, Cloud Services, and Serverless architecture. If you are interested in AI, Agents, and staying updated on the latest trends in AI and cloud computing, then this is the group for you. Join us for insightful discussions, networking, and learning opportunities!

groups.name: AWS Auckland Well-Architected User Group
groups.description:
Welcome to Aotearoa's own AWS Auckland Well-Architected User Group!

This group is dedicated to exploring all six pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework in detail, including cloud best-practices, the latest advancements in automation, cloud security and workload orchestration.

Whether you are an AWS dev, cloud or devops engineer or are simply interested in optimising your cloud infrastructure, join us to connect with like-minded professionals, learn from industry experts, discuss cutting-edge solutions and of course enjoy some great pizza, cold beer and good red wine :-)

Let's collaborate and leverage AWS services to build robust, scalable, and secure architectures.

groups.name: AWS Barranquilla
groups.description: ¡Bienvenidos al grupo de Meetup de AWS Barranquilla! Nuestra comunidad se enfoca en conectar a los usuarios de AWS en la región de Barranquilla que estén interesados en prácticas pragmáticas de desarrollo de software en AWS. Ya seas un profesional experimentado de AWS o recién estés comenzando, este grupo es para ti. Únete a nosotros para hacer networking, aprender y colaborar en todo lo relacionado con AWS. Compartamos ideas, experiencias y mejores prácticas para avanzar en nuestras habilidades y proyectos en el emocionante mundo de la informática en la nube. ¡Esperamos verte en nuestro próximo Meetup!

groups.name: AWS Boise User Group
groups.description: Boise AWS User Group is a new, community-led gathering for people across the Treasure Valley who build, run, secure, and optimize workloads on Amazon Web Services. Whether you’re managing production environments, experimenting in a personal sandbox, or just getting started with cloud, this group is a place to share real-world experiences, learn from one another, and connect with local technologists who face similar challenges. All experience levels are welcome. The only requirement is a collaborative mindset and respect for others.

groups.name: AWS Brighton User Group
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS Brighton User Group!

Are you passionate about Amazon Web Services (AWS) and eager to connect with like-minded professionals in Brighton? Look no further! The AWS Brighton User Group is a vibrant community where AWS enthusiasts come together to network, share knowledge, and stay up-to-date with the latest trends in cloud computing.

Whether you're an experienced AWS practitioner or just starting your cloud journey, our group offers a welcoming environment for everyone. Our meetups provide a fantastic opportunity to connect with industry experts, learn from their experiences, and expand your AWS skill set.

Here's what you can expect from our meetups:

1. Engaging Presentations: We host a diverse range of speakers, including AWS-certified professionals, solution architects, and thought leaders from various industries. They will share their expertise, insights, and best practices on AWS services, infrastructure, security, DevOps, serverless computing, artificial intelligence, and much more.
2. Hands-on Workshops: We believe in practical learning, so we organize hands-on workshops where you can get your hands dirty with AWS tools and services. You'll have the chance to explore real-world use cases, tackle challenges, and gain practical experience that you can apply in your own projects.
3. Networking Opportunities: Connect with fellow AWS enthusiasts, network with industry professionals, and build relationships within the local tech community. Our meetups foster collaboration and provide a platform for meaningful discussions, idea exchanges, and potential career opportunities.
4. Q&A Sessions: Got burning questions about AWS? Our meetups include interactive Q&A sessions where you can seek guidance, clarify doubts, and get expert advice from experienced practitioners.
5. Community Engagement: We encourage active participation and engagement from all members. If you have a topic you'd like to present or discuss, let us know! We believe in the power of shared knowledge and welcome community-driven initiatives.

Whether you're a developer, system administrator, data scientist, business owner, or simply curious about AWS, the AWS Brighton User Group is here to support your learning and professional growth.

Join us in embracing the cloud revolution, shaping the future of technology, and discovering the endless possibilities AWS offers. Connect with fellow AWS enthusiasts and accelerate your cloud journey by joining the AWS Brighton User Group today!

Thank you to our sponsors and facilitators:

[Logicata](https://www.logicata.com/)
[Silicon Brighton](https://siliconbrighton.com/)




Now calling all speakers!
If you (or someone you know) have a talk or an idea that you would like to share with our amazing community, please submit your talk idea via our Call for Papers form [here](https://forms.office.com/e/uWufczAGhf).

Or, if you'd prefer to talk to someone about it first that's fine, you can message us here or come and talk to one of us at a meetup.

groups.name: AWS Brisbane Well-Architected User Group
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS Brisbane Well-Architected User Group!

This group is the Brisbane chapter of the most popular AWS User Groups in ANZ and is dedicated to exploring all six pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework in detail, including cloud best-practices, the latest advancements in automation, cloud security and workload orchestration.

Whether you are an AWS dev, cloud or devops engineer or are simply interested in optimising your cloud infrastructure, join us to connect with like-minded professionals, learn from industry experts, discuss cutting-edge solutions and of course enjoy some great pizza, cold beer and good red wine :-)

Let's collaborate and leverage AWS services to build robust, scalable, and secure architectures.

groups.name: AWS Budapest CoP
groups.description:
AWS Budapest CoP (Community of Practice) is an open community focusing on the broadly adopted public cloud platform of Amazon: AWS (Amazon Web Services).
We would like to meet others interested in AWS in the Budapest area and virtually from all over the world!

Our organizers have a long history with various cloud technologies and platforms, including AWS. We look for relevant topic matter, and stay away from sales presentations. We aspire to have a diverse collection of members who can bring various viewpoints - users of other cloud solutions are very welcome in the group!

Join us in discussing the latest in AWS technologies and develop your network meeting other AWS professionals and experts in the field!

The main language is English.

Are you an AWS Partner or interested in sponsoring a Meetup? Or are you interested to be a speaker for our events? Please reach out to our organizers so they can help you to show your capabilities to a larger audience.

groups.name: AWS Bulgaria User Group
groups.description:
#AWSBulgaria is a passionate community for anyone interested in Amazon Web Services, cloud computing, and DevOps. The 3 core goals of this group are:

\* share exciting, engaging, and valuable content on AWS-related topics
\* inclusive community to encourage discussions and networking
\* community-driven and fun

We organize 2-hour meetup events every 4-6 weeks, with some time for networking and discussions afterward. The sessions will be scheduled for 7 PM, every not first or last working day of the week.
**Speakers are welcome!**
Do you want to share your experience, an interesting AWS or cloud-related story, or useful tips and tricks? All types of presentations are welcome - from 5 minutes of lightning talks to 45 minutes of full-blown presentations.
Please, use #AWSBulgaria to spread the word. Join the AWS Bulgaria:
Slack: [https://join.slack.com/t/awsbulgaria/](https://join.slack.com/t/awsbulgaria/shared_invite/zt-1gy0o2rom-KPBa6DvF3T0oXkFn8H4DaA)
Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/groups/awsbulgaria](https://www.facebook.com/groups/awsbulgaria)
YouTube: [https://www.youtube.com/@awsbulgariausergroup](https://www.youtube.com/@awsbulgariausergroup)

AWS Bulgaria User Group is an independent group; our activities and the opinions expressed here are not representative of Amazon Web Services. To learn more about the AWS User Group program, visit [https://aws.amazon.com/usergroups](https://aws.amazon.com/usergroups)

groups.name: AWS Central New Jersey User Group
groups.description:
Welcome to the "AWS Central New Jersey User Group" Meetup! This group is for anyone interested in exploring the exciting world of Machine Learning (ML) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) with Amazon Web Services (AWS). We are a community of innovators, explorers, and enthusiasts who come together to learn, share, and collaborate on the latest advancements in ML and AI.

Our Focus:

Explore the latest AWS Machine Learning products, including DeepLens, DeepRacer, and DeepComposer
Discuss various areas of machine learning, such as:
Computer Vision
Reinforcement Learning
Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs)
Natural Language Processing (NLP)
and many more!
Share knowledge and experiences on implementing ML and AI solutions using AWS services, such as SageMaker, Rekognition, Comprehend, and more
Network with like-minded professionals and entrepreneurs who are passionate about ML and AI

Meetup Format:

Regular meetups featuring talks, demos, and hands-on workshops on various ML and AI topics
Opportunities to connect with industry experts and thought leaders in the field
Collaborative projects and hackathons to apply ML and AI concepts to real-world problems

Who Can Join:

Anyone interested in Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence
Professionals and entrepreneurs looking to learn and apply ML and AI concepts
Students and researchers seeking to explore the latest advancements in ML and AI
Anyone curious about the potential of ML and AI to transform industries and society

Join Our Community:

This meetup group is free to join, and we welcome anyone interested in exploring the exciting world of Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence with AWS. Join us to learn, share, and collaborate with like-minded individuals and stay up-to-date on the latest advancements in ML and AI.

Connect with Us:

Join our global AWS ML community on Slack to connect with other members, ask questions, and stay informed about upcoming meetups and events. [Slack Invite Link will be Updated soon - In Progress]

We look forward to meeting you and exploring the exciting world of ML and AI together!

groups.name: AWS Charlotte User Group
groups.description: Our group focuses on new and existing users of AWS (Amazon Web Services) in the greater Charlotte, NC area. We work closely with the Charlotte Cloud Computing Meetup. All AWS Cloudheads are welcome to share and teach and, wannabe cloudheads, are welcome to ask any questions they like until they become fully "bona fide" cloudheads themselves. We will talk about usage, tips, tricks, breakthroughs and even stories of woe and despair as long as we learn how to do better ;o) We will tackle system management, extending enterprise resources, programming and general cloud issues. In short, our heads are in the "cloud" and we want to learn from each other.

groups.name: AWS Chicago User Group
groups.description:
Chicago's premiere AWS community! User-run, user-focused.

The Chicago AWS user group is a user-run, user-focused community in Chicago. We hold monthly, free evening events in the Loop. We rotate host offices and topics (anything but a sales pitch). Events include pizza and drinks up front, introductions, 2 to 3 quality non-sales presentations, then wrap with q&a. See our website: [www.awschicago.com](https://www.awschicago.com)

Stay connected!

* Join the [AWS Chicago slack ](http://slack.chicagoaws.com)
* Watch videos of past presentations on [our YouTube page](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCXyvg7y0BnqrfNb_k9sgD2A/featured)
* Connect on LinkedIn in the [AWS Chicago user group Group](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/6705840)

Read the CoC and FAQs on our website: [AWSchicago.com](https://www.awschicago.com)

\* We are not run by or sponsored by Amazon.com or Amazon AWS. We do frequently work with Amazon SAs and account reps. As a local community group we respect our members' privacy and will never distribute personal details. \*

groups.name: AWS Chicago Western Suburbs
groups.description:
**AWS Chicago Western Suburbs** is a thriving community of AWS professionals, developers, architects, and technology enthusiasts in Naperville, Aurora, Schaumburg, and the greater western suburbs of Chicago. We host meetups, hands-on workshops, and networking events focused on AWS technologies covering cloud architecture, AI/ML, DevOps, serverless, data engineering, and security. 
 
 Our mission is to foster learning, collaboration, and innovation for members at every skill level, from newcomers to seasoned cloud practitioners.

groups.name: AWS Cleveland User Group
groups.description:
**Welcome to the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Cleveland User Group.**

Join the group to meet other AWS users and interested learners for presentations and conversations covering all aspects of Amazon Web Services (AWS).  We gather to discuss AWS services, key aspects of cloud computing, interesting use cases, vertical innovations, and other topics of interest to the group.

**To submit a talk: Please fill out this form and one of the organizers will get back to you in a few days:** [https://sessionize.com/aws-dmv-and-cle-user-group/](https://sessionize.com/aws-dmv-and-cle-user-group/)

Our goal is to engage and grow a local AWS peer-to-peer community that gathers regularly to share ideas, answer questions, and learn about new AWS services and best practices. Whether you’re a technical professional or a business professional, we invite you to join, learn, contribute, and enjoy ongoing learning of the fast-paced, ever-evolving and exciting world of AWS. All topic suggestions are welcome and we invite you to add them to the message board.

**Who should join:** Anyone interested in AWS, Cloud Computing Discussions & Networking.

Come join us!

groups.name: AWS Cloud Security - NoVA
groups.description:
Welcome to AWS Cloud Security - NoVA (AWS Security User Group)

Every year AWS introduces many products and services; a clear understanding of these products and proper configurations would ensure that we maintain a complete and comprehensive view of the organization's security environment. AWS gives us the ability to perform cloud security activities more agilely; the question is, how much do you know about these services? What are the best practices for you? What is the most cost-effective combination of security services?

We aim to advantage our members, from beginner to intermediate to expert, with a comprehensive understanding of the vast and diverse availability, application, and benefit of "AWS." **The AWS Cloud Security - NoVa Meetup**, therefore, exists to promote awareness and application of AWS Security-based technologies for bettering our governments, enterprise businesses, communities, and our personal lives and global well-being.

You may be interested in this group if you want to: identify, learn, observe, monitor, and explore AWS Services that would help us maintain a secured enterprise, build AWS distributed, fault-tolerant applications, design system architectures, and study for AWS Certifications.

There will be an assortment of events that will harbor business development and relationships far and wide. Look out for our happy hours and other networking events online and off! On many occasions, however, there will be several collaborations that may fit outside of the cloud security purview.

Please feel free to share with our discussion board to drop in comments, questions, and information that others may find valuable. This is YOUR space to talk about all things D and keep the conversation going to spark meaningful connections and engagement.

Service providers are welcome, too, especially if you are interested in presenting your business, please consider a sponsorship for the event! **Interesting in [sponsoring](https://forms.gle/eJMLeHpSGCaZiRmw5)?**

[If you are interested in being a speaker, please fill out this short form!](https://forms.gle/AfmSeg1SLgb8jWpn7)

By joining this Meetup you agree to receive emails/messages from or on behalf of our sponsors. Presentations are recorded and posted on our [YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN9old98JqwV3QDhhZQMt9g). Pictures will be taken and added to our Meetup and other social media outlets. If you no longer accept our policy, please leave our group.

**Thanks for joining us and abiding by our [Code of Conduct](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IJbGaYaYSX3_1Wrpvb6CyXxLFgXftc5GugULzopLMck/edit?usp=sharing). See you soon!**

*Disclaimer - Our group is not owned or in any way formally associated with Amazon Web Services or its affiliates. We are a community-run AWS user Meetup group led by and for the community.*

groups.name: AWS Cloud Security User Group - West Africa
groups.description:
A regular meetup for infosec enthusiasts (new and experienced) in West Africa, interested in AWS Cloud security from all aspects - attack and defense research, limitations of security features, the pros and cons of different security strategies, best practices, and experiences in implementation.

If you're interested in speaking at an upcoming event, please complete this CFP - https://sessionize.com/aws-cloud-security-user-group-west-africa/ and we will get back to you asap. Events are regularly announced so make sure to join. See you!

groups.name: AWS COMMUNITY - JORDAN
groups.description: AWS community - Jordan  is a group for all interested in cloud computing, AWS. The group mission is to create a global community of diverse individuals who will support, challenge, and inspire one another by providing a platform for networking, mentorship, and career development.

groups.description:
This is a group for anyone interested in Amazon Web Services, Cloud Computing, AWS design implementation and servicing, EC2, S3, High Scalability Computing, Real Life uses of AWS and cloud servers, SaaS, IAAS, PAAS and many more. All skills levels are welcome. We started this group because to meet other outdoor enthusiasts. Looking forward to exploring the outdoors with everybody. Let's get together for affordable activities in our neighborhood.

groups.name: AWS Community Vadodara
groups.description:
"Welcome to the AWS User Group Vadodara! 

We are a community of AWS and cloud computing enthusiasts, experts, students, and professionals in and around Vadodara, India. Our mission is to connect and empower our members to stay current with the latest trends, best practices, and technologies in the field of AWS and cloud computing by providing a platform for education, collaboration, and professional growth. 

Through our regular meetups and events, we provide a platform for members to ask questions, share ideas, and learn about the latest updates in the world of AWS and cloud computing. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced professional, our group welcomes all levels of expertise. 

Join us to connect with like-minded individuals and expand your knowledge and skills in the field of AWS and cloud computing. To stay connected with us and stay updated on our upcoming events and meetups, you can follow us on our [Meetup page](https://www.meetup.com/aws-community-vadodara/) and [LinkedIn community](https://www.linkedin.com/company/awsugbdq/). We welcome you to join our community and look forward to connecting with you soon!"

groups.name: AWS Curitiba User Group
groups.description:
Este é um grupo para profissionais e curiosos sobre computação em nuvem (Cloud) na plataforma Amazon Web Services (AWS). 
Grupo oficial AWS Americas: [https://aws.amazon.com/pt/developer/community/usergroups/americas/](https://aws.amazon.com/pt/developer/community/usergroups/americas/)
Apresentações de cases, comparações entre provedores de serviço comparado com AWS, Benefícios, Discussões, Fórum para iniciar e otimizar soluções com AWS.
Somos agnósticos de linguagem de programação, portanto selecionar a linguagem melhor para determinado caso é uma das possíveis discussões que você vai encontrar aqui.
Somos adeptos da persistência poliglota, discutir e entender quando melhor usar um serviço de persistência enriquecerá o grupo.
Iniciamente o grupo irá se encontrar a cada mês iniciando em Agosto de 2019.

groups.name: AWS Denver Area User Group
groups.description:
Welcome to the official AWS Denver User Group! This is the new home for builders, developers, architects, students, and cloud enthusiasts across the Denver metro area.
We’re relaunching this community with a fresh start and a renewed focus on connection, learning, and local innovation. Whether you’re brand-new to AWS or a seasoned Hero/Builder, this is your space to meet others, share ideas, and stay close to what's happening in the AWS ecosystem.
What to expect:
Regular meetups featuring lightning talks, deep dives, and hands-on demos
Community-led learning where local builders share real projects and stories
Networking & collaboration with engineers, founders, and tech leaders across Denver
Career growth opportunities through mentorship, knowledge sharing, and skill-building
Special AWS programs (credits, swag, exam vouchers, re:Invent perks — all for active members)
Who can join?
Everyone. Students, hobbyists, seasoned developers, cloud architects, data engineers, startups, enterprise teams — if you're curious about building with AWS, you’re welcome here.
Why a new group?
We’re creating a dedicated, active space for the Denver community to grow alongside AWS. This is the official user group supported by the AWS Community team.

Now: events labeled as CONFIRMED are fully set. Events labeled as TENTATIVE are in planning, meaning dates, times and locations may move.

groups.name: AWS Des Moines
groups.description: This group is forum to gather and share experiences around Cloud Computing, especially Amazon Web Services. If you have used AWS services (ie EC2, S3, RDS, DynamoDB, Redshift, EMR) or are interested in learning more about how others have, come join our group.

groups.name: AWS EGYPT Meetup
groups.description:
Welcome to **"AWS Meetup Egypt"**, ***the largest community of cloud computing enthusiasts in Egypt & North Africa!*** Our meetup is dedicated to sharing knowledge and best practices related to Amazon Web Services (AWS), Cloud Computing, and Digital Transformation. We aim to connect individuals and organizations interested in exploring the latest trends, use cases, and innovations in cloud computing.

Whether you are a seasoned AWS professional or just starting out, our group has something to offer you. Our events will feature a variety of topics such as Cloud Native Development, Cloud security, serverless computing, DevOps, AI and machine learning, and more.

At AWS Meetup Egypt, we believe in the power of community and collaboration. We are committed to creating a welcoming and inclusive environment where everyone can learn and grow together. Join our community today and take the first step towards becoming an AWS expert!

Events will be held online to allow broader participation.

#############

مرحبًا بكم في  AWS Meetup Egypt – و هو أكبر مجتمع لمتحمسي الحوسبة السحابية في مصر و شمال أفريقيا! حيث نتشارك المعرفة و أفضل الممارسات المتعلقة بخدمات Amazon Web Services (AWS)، الحوسبة السحابية، والتحول الرقمي
حيث نحاول أن نربط الأفراد والمؤسسات الراغبة في استكشاف أحدث الاتجاهات والابتكارات في مجال الحوسبة السحابية

سواء كنت محترفًا أو مبتدئًا، فإن مجموعتنا لديها شيء تقدمه لك. حيث ستتناول الفعاليات مجموعة متنوعة من الموضوعات مثل
Cloud Native Development
Serverless Computing
DevOps
والأمان السحابي  و الذكاء الاصطناعي وتعلم الآلة، وغير ذلك من المجالات

فى  AWS Meetup Egypt، نؤمن بقوة المجتمع والتعاون. و نحاول خلق بيئة مرحبة تتيح للجميع التعلم والنمو معًا. انضم إلى مجتمعنا اليوم وخذ الخطوة الأولى نحو أن تصبح خبيرًا في خدمات AWS!

**للسماح بمشاركة أوسع، ستقام الأحداث و الفعاليات عبر الإنترنت (اونلاين) إن شاء الله**

With the rapid growth of AWS among individual developers, start-ups, and enterprises across Canada it has become a powerful platform.

groups.name: AWS Girls Argentina
groups.description:
Nuestro objetivo principal es conectar a mujeres de distintos ámbitos que quieran formarse y compartir conocimientos sobre tecnología y el mundo cloud de Amazon Web Services, y así construir una comunidad que sirva de red de apoyo inspiradora, brindando un espacio de aprendizaje en el que puedan desarrollar sus habilidades personales y profesionales y de esta manera, fomentar su inclusión el ingreso al mundo tecnológico. 

¡Impulsemos a más mujeres en tecnología! 🫶🏼 
Unite a nuestra comunidad y crezcamos juntas. 
🙌🏼 Let's fly together 🦋
topics: Mujeres latinas en el mundo tecnológico

groups.name: AWS Girls Bolivia
groups.description:
AWS Girls Bolivia is a community dedicated to promoting the participation and growth of women in technology through learning and collaboration within the Amazon Web Services (AWS) ecosystem. 🌍💻

Its goal is to provide training, mentorship, and networking opportunities so that more women can develop cloud skills, advance their tech careers, and connect with industry professionals. 🚀✨

Through talks, workshops, and both online and in-person events, AWS Girls Bolivia fosters an inclusive community where everyone can learn about development, cloud architecture, artificial intelligence, security, and more. Join us and be part of this amazing learning and growth network! 💙👩‍💻

groups.name: AWS Girls Chile Group
groups.description:
AWS Girls Chile es una comunidad dedicada a promover la participación activa y el empoderamiento de las mujeres en el ámbito de la tecnología, específicamente en relación a Amazon Web Services (AWS). Proporcionan un espacio seguro y de apoyo para que las mujeres compartan conocimientos, experiencias y oportunidades relacionadas con AWS. A través de eventos, talleres y charlas, pretenden fomentar la diversidad, la igualdad y el crecimiento de las mujeres en la industria tecnológica. La comunidad fomenta el desarrollo de habilidades, la tutoría entre iguales y el intercambio de conocimientos, con el objetivo de desafiar los estereotipos de género y crear un entorno inclusivo para que las mujeres tengan éxito en el campo de la tecnología.
SIGUENOS EN NUESTRAS REDES 👉👉👉 [https://linktr.ee/awsgirlschile](https://linktr.ee/awsgirlschile)

English Bellow
AWS Girls Chile is a community dedicated to promoting women's active participation and empowerment in the field of technology, specifically in relation to Amazon Web Services (AWS). They provide a safe and supportive space for women to share knowledge, experiences, and opportunities related to AWS. Through events, workshops, and talks, they aim to foster diversity, equity, and the growth of women in the technology industry. The community encourages skill development, peer mentoring, and knowledge sharing, aiming to challenge gender stereotypes and create an inclusive environment for women to succeed in the field of technology.

groups.name: AWS Girls Perú
groups.description:
**AWS Girls is a technology-driven user group whose main purpose is to bring more girls and women into the technology world. We are an inclusive group since we welcome all.**

**We create spaces, through events, meetings, study groups, and more, for people to learn and grow into technology with an emphasis on cloud computing. We strive to build a safe environment from all perspectives. We are a group that believes in the power of community, and as such, we have big dreams.**

**We are lucky to have the support and involvement of amazing professionals and members. Thanks to them, AWS Girls continues to grow to create a more positive impact. They invest their own time to make things happen, to them my gratitude.**

**We had more than ten events in this year, events with a high level of attendance and satisfaction. Last year, we had an incredible level of attendance on our first end of the year event, with more than 150 participants that stayed with us to learn on a Saturday for almost 8 hours straight.**

**We were born to help, to create opportunities, to be a helping hand for all who want to grow into technology. We are certainly focused on helping girls and women be part of the future, to be fearless, to believe in themselves.**

**We have a couple of principles:**

1. **You can not be what you do not see**

**We look to involve women who are achieving professional growth in technology, to provide them a space where they can share their knowledge, experiences and where they can share their learnings. We want role models, who are real, who have overcome challenges, who are resilient. We purpusely look to have at least 50% of female participation in all our events and initiatives.**

2. **We look to get more girls and women involve in the technology world**

**This may sound sided but it is not. As mentioned before, we welcome all participants, actually we encourage inclusion. At the same time, we are looking to contribute to the balance and the diversity of the technology world. That is why we look to bring more girls and women to be part of our community. We look to create spaces where knowledge is exchanged, where members can find a safe place to ask, interact and grow through education and support. We continually are building alliances with organizations that support our members and our goals.**

**We believe in actions to make changes, that is why we keep working, and working really hard. We believe that by empowering women we can change the world. Especially in our region, if more women work and work in technology that could change their lives and the lives of their families. Many of them are becoming active members and leaders of our community, something that we encourage to ensure AWS Girls growth and continuity.**
**They will create opportunities. We look to have a ripple effect.**

**We are working hard, having fun and making history**

**If you would like to know more about us, check our website [https://www.awsgirls.pe](https://www.awsgirls.pe) and Follow us on social networks, LinkedIn Facebook, Twitter**
**If you would like to help, just contact us. All support is welcome.**

groups.name: AWS Girls UG Uruguay
groups.description:
Somos el primer AWS Girls User Group en Uruguay! ¡Libre y Gratuita!.

Comunidad de User Group de AWS en Uruguay, creada con la finalidad de empoderar y conectar a mujeres interesadas en IT.

groups.name: AWS Las Palmas User Group
groups.description:
\~ Desplazarte hacia abajo para el español. \~

## **About Us**

AWS Las Palmas User Group is a vibrant and dynamic meetup group based in the stunning city of Las Palmas de Gran Canaria. We are a passionate community of cloud enthusiasts, tech professionals, and AWS consultants who come together to share knowledge, collaborate, and explore the ever-evolving world of Amazon Web Services (AWS) Cloud products and solutions.

## **Our goal**

Our primary mission is to foster a thriving ecosystem of cloud experts and AWS enthusiasts in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria and have fun while doing that. We aim to empower individuals and businesses with the latest AWS insights, best practices, and hands-on experience, enabling them to leverage the full potential of the AWS Cloud for their projects and enterprises.

## **What to expect:**

* **Educational Presentations:** We host regular events featuring insightful presentations from experts in the field of AWS Cloud. These presentations cover a wide range of topics, from AWS infrastructure and services to cloud security, serverless computing, and more. Our presenters are often industry professionals, AWS Certified individuals, or AWS representatives themselves, ensuring that our members receive high-quality, up-to-date information. Presentations are in English and Spanish (depending on the presenter).
* **Networking Opportunities:** The AWS Las Palmas User Group is not just about learning; it's also about connecting with like-minded individuals. Our meetups provide a relaxed and friendly atmosphere for networking and building professional relationships. You can share experiences, ask questions, and even find potential collaborators for your AWS-related projects.
* **Hands-On Workshops:** We believe in learning by doing. Our group organizes interactive, hands-on workshops where attendees can roll up their sleeves and gain practical experience working with AWS services. Whether you're new to AWS or an experienced user looking to expand your skill set, our workshops offer something for everyone.
* **Community Support:** We're here to support each other on our cloud journeys. If you encounter challenges or have questions related to AWS, you can rely on our community for assistance. Our members are always willing to help and share their expertise.
* **AWS Cloud Community:** Joining AWS Las Palmas means becoming part of a larger global AWS community. You'll have access to AWS resources, updates, and opportunities, making it easier to stay at the forefront of cloud technology.

## **Who Can Join**

The AWS Las Palmas User Group is open to everyone, regardless of your level of AWS expertise. Whether you're a seasoned AWS professional, a curious beginner, or simply interested in cloud computing, you're welcome to become a member of our group. Our events cater to a broad audience, from developers and IT professionals to business leaders and entrepreneurs. Join us today, and let's embark on a journey of continuous learning and cloud innovation together!

## **Help Us Organize**

Feel like doing more than just attending? Are you passionate about AWS and want to take your involvement to the next level? Joining our organization group is a fantastic way to contribute actively and shape the future of AWS Las Palmas User Group. You can be a presenter or help with the organization, all help is welcome. Reach any of us via direct message here on the platform, we are happy to discuss with you.

**Disclaimer**: AWS Las Palmas User Group is an independent group. Our activities and the opinions expressed here are not representative of Amazon Web Services. To learn more about the AWS User Group program, visit this [page](https://aws.amazon.com/developer/community/usergroups/).

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~
**¡Ahora en español!**

## **Acerca de nosotros**

AWS Las Palmas User Group es un grupo de meetup vibrante y dinámico con sede en la impresionante ciudad de Las Palmas de Gran Canaria. Somos una comunidad apasionada de la nube, profesionales de la tecnología y consultores de AWS que se reúnen para compartir conocimientos, colaborar y explorar el mundo en constante evolución de los productos y soluciones en la nube de Amazon Web Services (AWS).

## **Nuestro objetivo**

Nuestra misión principal es fomentar un próspero ecosistema de expertos en la nube y entusiastas de AWS en Las Palmas de Gran Canaria y divertirnos mientras lo hacemos. Nuestro objetivo es capacitar a los individuos y las empresas con los últimos conocimientos de AWS, las mejores prácticas y experiencia práctica, lo que les permite aprovechar todo el potencial de la nube de AWS para sus proyectos y empresas.

## **Qué esperar**

* **Presentaciones educativas:** Organizamos eventos regulares con presentaciones de expertos en el campo de la nube de AWS. Estas presentaciones abarcan una amplia gama de temas, desde la infraestructura y los servicios de AWS hasta la seguridad en la nube, la informática sin servidor y mucho más. Nuestros presentadores suelen ser profesionales del sector, personas certificadas por AWS o los propios representantes de AWS, lo que garantiza que nuestros miembros reciban información actualizada y de alta calidad. Las presentaciones son en inglés y en español (dependiendo del presentador).
* **Oportunidades de Networking:** No se trata sólo de aprender, sino también de conectar con personas de ideas afines. Nuestras reuniones proporcionan un ambiente relajado y agradable para establecer contactos y relaciones profesionales. Puedes compartir experiencias, hacer preguntas e incluso encontrar colaboradores potenciales para tus proyectos relacionados con AWS.
* **Talleres prácticos:** Creemos en el aprendizaje práctico. Nuestro grupo organiza talleres interactivos y prácticos en los que los asistentes pueden ponerse manos a la obra y adquirir experiencia práctica trabajando con los servicios de AWS. Tanto si es nuevo en AWS como si es un usuario experimentado que busca ampliar su conjunto de habilidades, nuestros talleres ofrecen algo para todos.
* **Apoyo de la comunidad:** Estamos aquí para apoyarnos mutuamente en nuestros viajes a la nube. Si se encuentra con desafíos o tiene preguntas relacionadas con AWS, puede confiar en nuestra comunidad para obtener ayuda. Nuestros miembros siempre están dispuestos a ayudar y compartir su experiencia.
* **Comunidad de la nube de AWS:** Unirse a este grupo significa formar parte de una comunidad global de AWS más amplia. Tendrás acceso a recursos, actualizaciones y oportunidades de AWS, lo que le facilitará mantenerse a la vanguardia de la tecnología en la nube.

## **Quién puede unirse**

AWS Las Palmas User Group está abierto a todo el mundo, independientemente de tu nivel de experiencia en AWS. Tanto si eres un profesional experimentado de AWS, un principiante curioso o simplemente estás interesado en la informática en la nube, te invitamos a convertirte en miembro de nuestro grupo. Nuestros eventos están dirigidos a una amplia audiencia, desde desarrolladores y profesionales de TI hasta líderes empresariales y emprendedores. Únase a nosotros hoy mismo y embarquémonos juntos en un viaje de aprendizaje continuo e innovación en la nube.

## **Ayúdenos a organizar**

¿Te gusta hacer algo más que asistir? ¿Te apasiona AWS y deseas llevar tu participación al siguiente nivel? Unirte a nuestro grupo de organización es una forma fantástica de contribuir activamente y dar forma al futuro del Grupo de Usuarios de AWS Las Palmas. Puedes ser ponente o ayudar en la organización, toda ayuda es bienvenida. Ponte en contacto con cualquiera de nosotros a través de mensaje directo aquí en la plataforma, estaremos encantados de hablar contigo.

**Descargo de responsabilidad**: el grupo de usuarios de AWS Las Palmas es un grupo independiente. Nuestras actividades y las opiniones expresadas aquí no son representativas de Amazon Web Services. Para obtener más información sobre el programa de grupos de usuarios de AWS, visite esta página.

groups.name: AWS Leeds User Group
groups.description:
Taking the cloud offline - a meetup group to get real people into a real place to discuss virtual stuff. We aim to run monthly meetups focusing on hands-on labs, talks and discussions around best-practice implementation across the AWS offering. Join if you're a cloud specialist in your organisation, a developer or simply interested in learning. All abilities are welcome, but be prepared to get in-depth.




**Code of Conduct**
\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-

**Our Commitment**
The AWS Leeds User Group is dedicated to providing a harassment-free experience for everyone, whether at our in-person meetups in Leeds or within our online communities (such as LinkedIn or Meetup).
We welcome and support people of all backgrounds and identities. This includes, but is not limited to, members of any sexual orientation, gender identity and expression, race, ethnicity, culture, national origin, social and economic class, educational level, colour, immigration status, sex, age, size, family status, political belief, religion, and mental or physical ability.

**Expected Behaviour**
All participants, speakers, sponsors, and volunteers are required to conform to the following Code of Conduct. Organisers will enforce this code throughout all events and across our digital channels.

* **Be inclusive:** We welcome people from all stages of their AWS journey, from students and beginners to seasoned architects.
* **Be respectful:** Disagreements are part of learning, but personal attacks or exclusionary behaviour are not.
* **Be professional:** Remember that our events and social media groups are professional environments. Discriminatory or harassing language and imagery are not appropriate for any venue, including talks, workshops, or LinkedIn engagement.


**Harassment Includes:**

* Offensive comments related to gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, mental illness, neurodiversity, physical appearance, race, or religion.
* Unwelcome comments regarding a person’s lifestyle choices and practices (e.g. food, health, parenting, or employment).
* Gratuitous or off-topic sexual images or behaviour in spaces where they are not appropriate.
* Physical contact or simulated physical contact (e.g. textual descriptions like “hug”) without consent.
* Threats of violence or incitement of violence towards any individual.
* Deliberate intimidation, stalking, or following.
* Sustained disruption of discussion during talks or presentations.
* Unwelcome sexual attention or continued one-on-one communication after requests to cease.


**Consequences of Misbehaviour**
Participants asked to stop any harassing behaviour are expected to comply immediately.
If a participant engages in harassing behaviour, the AWS Leeds User Group organisers may take any action they deem appropriate, including:

1. A formal warning.
2. Expulsion from the event with no refund (where applicable).
3. Removal from the LinkedIn group and other digital channels.
4. A ban from attending future Leeds events.


**Reporting and Support**
If you are being harassed, notice that someone else is being harassed, or have any other concerns, please contact a member of the AWS Leeds organising team immediately.

* **In-person:** Find an organiser (typically identified by specific badges or announced at the start of the evening).
* **Online:** Direct message an organiser via Meetup or LinkedIn.

We will respect confidentiality requests for the purpose of protecting victims of abuse. We will not name victims without their affirmative consent.

**Data and Privacy**
Please be mindful that discussions at events or on our online channels may be recorded or photographed. We cannot prevent attendees from taking screenshots or sharing LinkedIn posts. Please exercise caution and refrain from sharing sensitive or proprietary information that could harm you or your employer if it became public.

**Credits**
This code of conduct is based on the standards set by the AWS User Group UK and is adapted from the Geek Feminism Community Anti-Harassment Policy.

groups.name: AWS London ON User Group

groups.name: AWS Northern Delaware User Group
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS Northern Delaware User Group, a community of cloud professionals, architects, developers, and technology enthusiasts passionate about Amazon Web Services (AWS) and modern cloud computing.

Our mission is to promote continuous learning, innovation, and collaboration across the Delaware region. We host regular meetups, hands-on workshops, and technical discussions covering topics such as AI/ML on AWS, serverless computing, container orchestration, cloud security, and enterprise modernization.

The group serves as a platform for sharing real-world experiences, best practices, and architectural insights that help individuals and organizations leverage AWS more effectively. Members have the opportunity to learn from experts, present their own projects, and contribute to the growth of the local cloud community.

Whether you’re just beginning your cloud journey or are an experienced AWS professional, join us to expand your knowledge, exchange ideas, and be part of Delaware’s growing AWS innovation ecosystem.

groups.name: AWS Sacramento | Official Events
groups.description:
Welcome to AWS Sacramento User Group—powered by HUMANBULB.🎉

**More information at: [https://www.humanbulb.org/techconnect](https://www.humanbulb.org/techconnect)**

A community for cloud professionals, AI builders, developers, startup founders, technologists, and curious lifelong learners exploring the future of technology.

AWS Sacramento brings together technical and non-technical professionals from across the region to **learn, build, connect, and grow** through practical events focused on cloud computing, artificial intelligence, emerging technology, and innovation.

**Events are hosted at the HUMANBULB Innovation Center in Sacramento**, creating a home base for community, collaboration, hands-on learning, and innovation.

Whether you're deep in AWS architecture, experimenting with generative AI, building a startup, exploring automation, transitioning into tech, or simply curious about what’s next—this is your community.

***Who This Community Is For:***

• Cloud engineers, developers, architects, and IT professionals
• Startup founders and product builders
• AI practitioners and emerging technology enthusiasts
• Business professionals exploring AWS and AI for growth
• Students, career changers, and lifelong learners
• Anyone interested in modern technology and innovation

***Why Join AWS Sacramento?***

**Practical Learning**
Stay current on AWS services, cloud architecture, AI tools, automation, security, data, and real-world implementation strategies.

**Hands-On Skill Building**
Build practical experience through workshops, technical demos, hackathons, and collaborative learning opportunities.

**Meaningful Connections**
Meet developers, founders, cloud professionals, solution architects, business leaders, and innovators from across the Sacramento region.

**Startup & Innovation Exposure**
Connect with builders launching products, experimenting with AI-native tools, and shaping what’s next.

**Career & Growth Opportunities**
Expand your network, discover opportunities, and learn from practitioners actively working in the field.

***What We Host:***

🚀 **AWS TechConnect Meetups**
Regular events featuring AWS updates, technical sessions, AI discussions, guest speakers, demos, and networking.

🛠 **Hackathons & Builder Events**
Collaborative opportunities to experiment, create, and solve real challenges alongside other innovators.

🌟 **AWS Community Day Sacramento**
Our flagship annual gathering bringing together the broader AWS and cloud community for a full day of learning, inspiration, and connection.

🎓 **Hands-On Workshops**
Practical sessions focused on AWS, AI, cloud-native tools, automation, and emerging technology.

🤝 **Networking & Community Events**
Because some of the best opportunities start with a conversation.
Sacramento’s innovation ecosystem is growing rapidly, and AWS Sacramento exists to help bring builders, learners, and technology leaders together.
Whether you’re here to deepen technical skills, explore AI, grow your career, launch something new, or simply connect with others passionate about technology—we’d love to have you in the community.

**See you at the next event. ☁️⚡**

This is a community group of customers and AWS security professionals where we will share experiences, use cases, technology challenges and trends. Every month we will have an opportunity to hear and learn from security practitioners and network with our industry peers.
**RSVP rules:**
1\. Update your RSVP within 48 hours\, if your plans change\.
2\. No Show\. If you RSVP for an event and did not turn up without notifying us\, you will be marked as No Show\. A second **No Show** will result in removal from our group to give other members a fair chance of attending.
3\. Waitlist\. Please monitor your status right to the start time of the event\. If you can’t check your status\, you should remove yourself from the waiting list\.
As a general rule, we encourage you to only RSVP YES to events that you can commit to attending. In the event of an emergency or illness, it is understandable that you won’t be able to attend.

We are proud to be a sanctioned member of the **AWS Global User Group Program**, joining a massive network of **over 400 user groups worldwide**. As an official chapter, we serve as the local hub for cloud architects, developers, engineers, and curious beginners looking to connect with the global AWS community.

Our mission is simple: **To build a world-class cloud community right here in Sioux Falls.** Whether you are navigating your first S3 bucket, managing complex enterprise migrations, or exploring the latest in Generative AI on AWS, there is a seat for you at our table.

**What to expect:**

* **Deep-Dive Technical Sessions:** Guest speakers from AWS, Community Builders, and local experts.
* **Hands-on Workshops:** Practical sessions to level up your cloud skills.
* **Architectural Whiteboarding:** Real-world problem solving and peer networking.
* **The "Cloud Social":** Informal meetups to chat about the latest re:Invent news over a local brew.

From the Silicon Prairie to the AWS Cloud—let’s build, scale, and grow together.

Learn more at: https://www.siouxfallsawsuser.group

groups.name: AWS UG Cloud Del Norte
groups.description:
Volunteer organizing of hybrid virtual and in-person meetups on topics of interest around important and trending technology tools, Amazon Web Services, cloud computing, network connectivity, AI, or whatever learning topic piques our collective interest. We want to highlight projects built locally and raise awareness of technologies available to our region, while encouraging interruptions in the form of deep dive questions.

Feel welcome to ask random questions like "how does the cloud relate to my current technology skills? what can I learn from cloud professionals that I might not have heard in school? how does Alexa work? what skills will help me land a job? how can aws change my business? I've heard of Amazon, what is AWS?"

We host advocates and learners of all levels to talk about how we #BuildOn 200+ Amazon Web Services (AWS), including integrations and considerations into workstations, IoT networks, on-prem data centers, other clouds (Azure, Oracle, GCP), as well as other emerging technology tools and trends. We encourage those new to technology or cloud to check us out, and we encourage builders of all levels to bring 5-15 minute demos along.

Started at Arrowhead Research Park at New Mexico State University in 2021 to further the community learning, business awareness, student engagement, career opportunities, and general entrepreneurial-garage-hobbyist spirit. We aim to learn from, serve, educate, and entertain the diverse people of the The Borderplex, New Mexico, and surrounding rural areas.

groups.name: AWS UG Maputo
groups.description:
Bem-vindo ao AWS User Group Maputo! Esta comunidade é dedicada a discutir e compartilhar conhecimento sobre Amazon Web Services (AWS) e suas várias ofertas. Seja você um especialista experiente em AWS ou apenas começando, este grupo é um óptimo lugar para se conectar com outras pessoas apaixonadas pela AWS e seu potencial para revolucionar a maneira como criamos e executamos aplicativos.
Incentivamos os membros a compartilhar suas experiências, fazer perguntas e fornecer orientação sobre as melhores práticas para usar os serviços da AWS. Alguns dos tópicos que podemos discutir incluem:

* Computação em nuvem e infraestrutura
* Base de dados e gerenciamento de dados
* Análise e machine learning
* Segurança e conformidade
* IoT e Edge Computing
* Serverless and function-as-a-service

Aqui, discutimos e organizamos eventos sobre Amazon Web Services, incluindo práticas recomendadas, novos recursos e dicas de solução de problemas. Seja você um veterano experiente da AWS ou apenas começando, este é o lugar para você se conectar com profissionais que pensam como você, compartilhar seus conhecimentos e experiências e aprender com os outros. Incentivamos os membros a compartilhar seus projetos, estudos de caso e dicas de uso dos serviços da AWS para criar e implantar aplicativos. Vamos juntos para aproveitar ao máximo os poderosos recursos que a AWS tem a oferecer!
Nosso objetivo é construir uma forte comunidade AWS juntos!😍

groups.name: AWS UG Montevideo
groups.description:

groups.name: AWS UG Morelos
groups.description:
¡Bienvenido al grupo de Meetup de AWS UG Morelos!
Nos enfocamos en todo lo relacionado con la nube: computación en la nube, inteligencia de negocios en la nube, seguridad en la nube e integración de servicios cloud.

Este grupo es ideal para usuarios de AWS que buscan ampliar sus conocimientos sobre los servicios de Amazon Web Services y aprender mejores prácticas.

Únete a nosotros en sesiones informativas, oportunidades de networking y colaboración con profesionales apasionados por la tecnología.
¡Exploramos juntos el potencial de la nube!

groups.name: AWS UG Região Metropolitana de Piracicaba
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Região Metropolitana de Piracicaba! groups.name: AWS User Group - Bologna
groups.description: AWS (Amazon Web Services) User Group Bologna è una Community per gli appassionati di cloud, big & smart data, intelligenza artificiale e IOT, in particolare sulle tecnologie AWS. groups.name: AWS User Group - Casablanca

Whether you are a seasoned AWS veteran or just starting out with cloud computing, this group offers a platform for learning, collaboration, and skill development. Join us for meetups, workshops, and events focused on all things AWS, and connect with a community of passionate individuals who share your interests in cloud technology. Let's learn, grow, and innovate together with AWS User Group Morocco!

groups.name: AWS User Group - Caserta
groups.description:
**AWS User Group Caserta** nasce per mettere in contatto gli appassionati di Cloud, AI, IoT, Big Data e Security che hanno voglia di condividere idee, conoscenze e competenze. Che siano essi CEO, CTO, DevOps, Solution Architect, smanettoni o semplici curiosi!

groups.name: AWS User Group - Central Visayas
groups.description:

groups.name: AWS User Group - Chennai
groups.description:
Amazon Web Services (AWS) Chennai Users Group.
Join us in discussing the latest in Cloud Technology and network with experts in the field. We gather people working with lots of different technologies that take advantage of cloud solutions.
Who Should Join: Anyone interested in AWS Cloud, Cloud computing discussions & Networking
This group's mission is to share your experience on AWS and learn the best practices from each other.
Values: 1. Share professional skills with others 2. Educate and be educated on AWS best practices \

Our Objective: 1. Bring professionals together to learn from each other

If you'd like to share your experience or give a talk about a particular AWS service, we'd love to hear from you! Just fill out this form [https://bit.ly/44HGSuW](https://bit.ly/44HGSuW) and we'll be in touch.

**Follow Us**

Twitter - [https://twitter.com/awsugchn](https://twitter.com/awsugchn)

groups.name: AWS User Group - Clarksville
groups.description:
**Welcome to the AWS User Group in Clarksville!** This group is for anyone interested in Amazon Web Services (AWS) and cloud computing technologies. Whether you're a seasoned AWS professional or just getting started, join us for networking, workshops, and discussions on the latest trends in cloud computing and AI integration.

**Students, veterans, service members, and all curious innovators—you are invited.** We're building a community where cloud professionals and newcomers alike can connect, share knowledge, and explore the tools and strategies shaping the future of technology.

groups.name: AWS User Group - Coimbatore
groups.description: This is an independent user group for people interested in Amazon Web Services. Anyone can participate, ranging from AWS evangelists to the curious. The main focus of the group is to build up a community around AWS with socializing and talks on topics like innovations, development and possibilities. Having trouble with a stack? Maybe you'll meet someone with a solution or an approach that you haven't already tried.

groups.name: AWS User Group - Cyprus
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS User Group - Cyprus, a thriving community for AWS enthusiasts, cloud technology aficionados, and those who wish to dive deeper into the digital sea of cloud computing. Whether you are an experienced developer, a decision-maker in your organization, or a tech enthusiast curious about Amazon Web Services, our group is the perfect hub to expand your knowledge and network.

We aim to build a vibrant and interactive platform where AWS users can discuss and share their experiences, learn about the latest AWS features and their implementation, and stay up-to-date with real-world applications and case studies. We believe in fostering a space that encourages open dialogue, diverse viewpoints, and creative solutions.

Our mission is to bring together tech enthusiasts from all walks of life, with varying skill levels and backgrounds, and provide them with a platform to learn and grow. We aim to conduct at least one event every three months, ranging from presentations and discussions to workshops and networking events.

If you or your organization wish to contribute to our community, we encourage you to:

* Submit your talk here: [https://sessionize.com/awsugcyprus/](https://sessionize.com/awsugcyprus/)
* Follow us on LinkedIn: [https://www.linkedin.com/groups/8915327/](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/8915327/)

Whether you're just starting your AWS journey, studying for certification, already working on AWS-based projects, or simply interested in the cloud, we welcome you to join our AWS User Group - Cyprus! We're excited to embark on this cloud-computing journey together.

Don't forget to read our [Code Of Conduct](https://aws.amazon.com/codeofconduct/) \- it applies to every community member\, our services and every event we hold\.

Thank you for being part of our journey, and we look forward to growing and learning together in the world of AWS and cloud computing!

*If you are working for AWS and find yourself on the island for any reason, don't hesitate to get in touch. We could enjoy a couple of beers together or even arrange a swift lightning talk.*

groups.name: AWS User Group - Douala
groups.description:
Hello happy people and welcome to Douala AWS User Group!
If you want to learn more about Amazon Web Services, meet other experts or share valuable insights about Amazon Web Services then this user group is the right place for you. We are a growing community of users, developers and business professionals with knowledge to share and the eagerness to learn from each other within the AWS technology space. We do short presentations either virtually or physically, usually 30-40 minutes with Q&A.
We would be eternally grateful if you could take a few minutes of your precious time to fill out a questionnaire by clicking on the link below; 
[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1Zt7eA4tNjLvOuGYErJTD7WfAwXxMfSu72Dg8--0_zRY/edit](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1Zt7eA4tNjLvOuGYErJTD7WfAwXxMfSu72Dg8--0_zRY/edit)

Your feedback would help us know how the community can better serve you.

Thank You!
AWS User Group.

groups.name: AWS User Group - Genova
groups.description:
AWS (Amazon Web Services) User Group Genova vuole riunire tutti gli utilizzatori liguri e confinanti dei servizi cloud presenti su AWS.
Qui potremmo trattare tutti i servizi AWS legati ai seguenti temi:

1. AI
2. ML
3. IoT
4. Architetture infrastrutturali, dalla creazione alla gestione
5. Architetture software, dalla creazione alla gestione
6. Security
7. Gestione costi & ottimizzazione risorse

groups.name: AWS User Group - Istanbul
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS User Group Istanbul!

We’re a community for everyone passionate about Amazon Web Services (AWS) and cloud computing — from beginners eager to learn, to experienced professionals looking to connect and stay ahead of the latest trends.

Join us for regular meetups, workshops, networking sessions, and talks by industry experts. Let’s learn, share experiences, and grow together in the world of cloud computing!

groups.name: AWS User Group - Kenya
groups.description:
This is a group for anyone interested in Amazon Web Services. The group is for discussing various aspects & services of Amazon Web Services. If you are curious about what AWS is, want to start using it or are a seasoned veteran, join us.
All skill levels are welcome!!

groups.name: AWS User Group - Milano
groups.description:
Benvenuto nell’AWS User Group di Milano! La community si incontra una volta al mese per condividere novità, best practice e use case legati ad AWS.

Ogni meetup prevede due speech da 30 minuti tenuti dai membri della community. A seguire, il momento di networking tra partecipanti con pizza e birre.

Vorresti essere speaker a uno dei prossimi incontri oppure ospitare un Meetup? [Compila il form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1lf3jId-8ZLw2esn9gAv86ZaK8MoN9G-F7YWwiRlts7o/edit)!

groups.name: AWS User Group - Málaga
groups.description:
¡Bienvenido al AWS User Group de Málaga! 🎉
Somos una comunidad abierta para profesionales, estudiantes, entusiastas y curiosos del cloud computing que desean aprender, compartir experiencias y crecer juntos utilizando Amazon Web Services (AWS).

Nuestro objetivo es construir un espacio inclusivo donde podamos:

Compartir buenas prácticas, arquitecturas y casos de uso en AWS

Aprender sobre los últimos servicios y actualizaciones de AWS

Conectar con expertos de la industria y miembros de la comunidad

Organizar charlas técnicas, talleres prácticos, demos y eventos sociales

Tanto si estás dando tus primeros pasos en la nube como si ya gestionas infraestructuras complejas, ¡aquí encontrarás valor y compañía! 🌐☁️

¿Quién puede unirse?
Cualquier persona interesada en AWS, sin importar su nivel de experiencia. ¡La diversidad de conocimientos enriquece nuestras sesiones!

¡Únete al grupo y mantente al tanto de nuestros próximos eventos!
Síguenos también en redes sociales y ayúdanos a construir una comunidad fuerte, participativa y colaborativa. 🚀

groups.name: AWS User Group - North East, England
groups.description: This is the Amazon Web Services User Group for the North East, England. A user group for like minded peers interested in AWS and Cloud computing. A chance to see sessions from AWS evangelist and a focus on community contributions with real world stories. Wether you are a new starter to AWS or an experienced veteran, come and share stories and experiences.

groups.name: AWS User Group - Pavia
groups.description:
**AWS User Group Pavia** è la community degli appassionati di Cloud e Amazon Web Service (AWS).

La community accoglie professionisti IT, smanettoni, studenti, esperti di cloud, persone alle prime armi, imprenditori e innovatori che vogliono **condividere il proprio know how** e **fare networking**.

groups.name: AWS User Group - Roma
groups.description:
**AWS User Group Roma** è una comunità vivace con sede a Roma, Italia, aperta a chiunque sia curioso del mondo Amazon Web Services (AWS), indipendentemente dal livello di esperienza o dal ruolo professionale. La nostra missione è creare un ambiente collaborativo e inclusivo dove persone con interessi, competenze e background diversi possano incontrarsi, condividere idee, esperienze, best practice e soluzioni innovative legate ai servizi cloud di AWS.
Attraverso incontri informali – in presenza o virtuali – vogliamo facilitare lo scambio di conoscenze e favorire la crescita personale e professionale di chiunque voglia esplorare, imparare o contribuire in questo ambito.

**Attività ed Eventi:**
Organizziamo una varietà di eventi pensati per educare, ispirare e coinvolgere la nostra community:

* **Confronti e Networking a livello di Comunità**
* **Workshop tecnici e sessioni pratiche**
* **Orientamento alle certificazioni**

⠀
**Valori e Obiettivi**
I nostri valori fondamentali includono:

* **Condivisione della conoscenza:** Valorizziamo l’apprendimento collettivo e incoraggiamo tutti i partecipanti a condividere esperienze, sfide e intuizioni legate ad AWS, indipendentemente dal proprio percorso.
* **Inclusività e apertura:** Crediamo che la diversità di pensiero, provenienza e prospettive arricchisca la comunità. Per questo accogliamo con entusiasmo chiunque sia interessato a partecipare, contribuire o semplicemente esplorare.
* **Apprendimento continuo:** Siamo impegnati a rimanere aggiornati sulle novità AWS e a sostenere un percorso di apprendimento accessibile e continuo per tutta la community.

Il nostro obiettivo è essere un punto di riferimento per chiunque, a Roma e oltre, voglia scoprire il potenziale del cloud AWS, condividerne le opportunità e contribuire alla crescita collettiva attraverso l’innovazione e la collaborazione.

groups.name: AWS User Group - Thames Valley
groups.description:
Want to learn about AWS and share experiences with others?
This is the Amazon Web Services User Group for the Thames Valley, England. A user group for like-minded peers interested in AWS and Cloud computing. A chance to see sessions from AWS evangelist and a focus on community contributions with real-world stories. Whether you are a new starter to AWS or an experienced veteran, come and share stories and experiences.

Join us on Slack
https://join.slack.com/t/awsugtv/shared_invite/zt-adglvvkw-2PMnuorIe5NUEHxBfhCTQw

Join us on LinkedIn

groups.name: AWS User Group 3City

**Welcome to AWS User Group 3city! (Gdansk, Sopot, Gdynia)**
Hello there! Dive into our community where we share and learn about Amazon Web Services, cloud computing, AI, and DevOps. Whether you're a pro or just getting started, we'd love to have you!

**Let's Collaborate:**
