groups.name: AWS User Group ABC Paulista
groups.description:
Bem-vindos ao AWS User Group ABC Paulista!

Somos uma comunidade vibrante de desenvolvedores, arquitetos, engenheiros e entusiastas de cloud computing na região do ABC Paulista. Nosso objetivo é conectar profissionais que trabalham com Amazon Web Services e tecnologias de nuvem, promovendo aprendizado colaborativo e networking regional.

O que fazemos:

Meetups mensais com palestras técnicas e cases reais
Workshops hands-on e demos ao vivo
Networking entre profissionais da região
Compartilhamento de experiências e boas práticas
Discussões sobre tendências em cloud, AI/ML, serverless e DevOps

Para quem é: Desenvolvedores, DevOps, arquitetos de soluções, estudantes, empreendedores e qualquer pessoa interessada em AWS e tecnologias de nuvem na região do ABC (Santo André, São Bernardo do Campo, São Caetano do Sul) e Grande São Paulo.

Junte-se a nós para aprender, compartilhar conhecimento e fazer parte da crescente comunidade AWS no ABC Paulista! 🚀☁️

groups.name: AWS User Group Addis Ababa
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Addis Ababa Meetup! This group is dedicated to bringing together cloud enthusiasts and professionals interested in Amazon Web Services. Whether you are a beginner looking to learn more about AWS or an experienced practitioner wanting to connect with like-minded individuals, this group is for you. Join us for networking, discussions, workshops, and learning opportunities to enhance your skills and knowledge in cloud computing with AWS. Let's explore the latest trends, best practices, and innovations in the world of AWS together!

groups.name: AWS User Group AI ML Kenya
groups.description:
Welcome to AWS User Group AI/ML Kenya. A community of Cloud Enthusiasts, Machine Learning Practitioners, Data Scientists and AI Innovators who meet to explore and discuss possibilities of AWS Technologies in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML).

A platform for knowledge-sharing, hands-on workshops, best practices and networking.

Join us to stay updated on the latest trends, tools and services in the AWS ecosystem and collaboration on transformative AI/ML Projects.

groups.name: AWS User Group AI/ML, Kuala Lumpur
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group AI/ML, Kuala Lumpur! This group is for professionals and enthusiasts interested in all things artificial intelligence and machine learning on the Amazon Web Services platform. Join us for informative talks, workshops, and networking opportunities to help you stay up-to-date with the latest trends and advancements in AI and ML. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned expert, come learn, share, and connect with like-minded individuals in the AI/ML community. Let's explore the endless possibilities of AI and ML together!

groups.name: AWS User Group Albania
groups.description:
Ne kemi mision tu japim informazion perreth teknologjise ne lidhje me Amazon, cloud computing dhe se si devops funksionon ne aws. Ne kete event do shpjegojme sesi si perdoren sherbimet ne aws, ne menyre qe te beheni sa me familjar me keto sherbime. Kush ka kuriozitet dhe deshire te njihet me me keto sherbime, do t'ju ndihmoj shume ne edukumin, pune, dhe certifikimin drejt aws. Jeni te mirepritur te hapni nje diskutim, apo te ndani exeperincen tuaj, te beni pytjet qe do tju ndihmonin shume ne projektet tuaj, dhe mbi te gjitha enjoy kete event. Do t'ju lutesha te mos harroni te perdorni ne rrjetet tuaja sociale #AWSAlbania dhe ta shperndani

We are organizing this group because we are passionate about AWS and the cloud. The primary intent of this group is education. All presentations will be educational in scope. It's worth pointing out that in case you have any challenges with AWS, and you're in need of assistance as you can't find any solution on the internet, rest assured that founders and members of this group will be eager to help you. All you need to do is to share your experience on one of our group's meetups.

Click to visit AWS Website: https://aws.amazon.com/

Click to visit AWS Education: https://aws.amazon.com/education/awseducate/ <br>

Click to visit AWS User Group in Europe: AWS User Group Europe

AWS User Group Tirane has a mission to gather all information technology enthusiasts, as well as all of those who are interested in Amazon Web Services, cloud computing, DevOps, Serverless. <br>Regardless of whether you just started getting familiar with AWS, in process of education and certification, or working on Enterprise projects using AWS infrastructure, you're all most welcome to join our group. <br>It's worth pointing out that in case you have any problems with AWS, and you're in need of assistance as you can't find any solution on the internet, rest assured that founders and members of this group will be eager to help you. All you need to do is to share your experience with one of our group's meetups.

So join us and share your thoughts!

To join the AWS User Group Albania in zamira.jaupaj@hotmail.com - send us your email and you shall be invited. <br>And please, don't forget to use #AWSAlbania on your social media networks to spread the word! <br>

groups.name: AWS User Group Alicante
groups.description:
El Meetup de AWS User Group Alicante tiene como objetivo transmitir el conocimiento sobre los servicios de Amazon Web Services en la zona de Levante. Colaboramos directamente con AWS y otros grupos de AWS repartidos por el mundo para difundir las herramientas y servicios que podemos emplear en la nube. 
Creemos que el cloud es una herramienta disruptiva en el mundo de la tecnología y que es capaz de cambiar las reglas del juego donde los pequeños podemos emplear las últimas tecnologías con una relación calidad/precio sin precedentes en la historia.
Nuestro principal enfoque es mostrar cómo podemos hacer más por menos empleando el cloud. Transmitimos los pilares de buenas prácticas a la hora de definir nuevas arquitecturas y siempre desde la honestidad de traer a los mejores de cada campo para que nos muestren en Alicante qué se hace en el resto de mundo. Contamos con el apoyo inestimable del equipo de evangelistas de AWS y con profesionales de empresas que día a día trabajan con las tecnologías que presentan.
Este grupo está patrocinado por la empresa Cloud Levante, partner de AWS y colaborador en la misión evangelista del cloud.

groups.name: AWS User Group Almaty
groups.description:
AWS User Group Almaty group provides a community for individuals and organizations who use Amazon Web Services (AWS) to connect, share knowledge, and learn from one another.

Anyone who uses or is interested in using AWS can join an Almaty AWS User Group. This includes developers, system administrators, architects, and other IT professionals, as well as business leaders and decision makers who use or plan to use AWS in their organizations.

At AWS User Group events, participants can expect to engage in a variety of activities, such as:

* Networking with other AWS users
* Hearing from guest speakers on topics related to AWS and cloud computing
* Sharing best practices and real-world examples of how they are using AWS
* Learning about new AWS services and features
* Q&A with AWS experts
* Hands-on workshops and training opportunities.

***DISCLAIMER:*** *AWS User Group Astana is an independent group; our activities and the opinions expressed here are not representative of Amazon Web Services. To learn more about the AWS User Group program, visit our webpage .*

groups.name: AWS User Group Alto Tietê
groups.description:
Grupo voltado para eventos, palestras e networking sobre AWS na região do Alto Tietê, São Paulo - BR

Trataremos diversos tópicos envolvendo AWS, incluindo estratégias de migração, governança, tecnologias serverless, machine learning e devops, são bem vindas.

groups.name: AWS User Group Ankara
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS User Group Ankara Meetup! This group is for anyone interested in Amazon Web Services (AWS) and cloud computing in general. Whether you are a beginner looking to learn more about AWS, or a seasoned professional interested in networking and staying updated on the latest trends, this is the place for you. Join us for regular meetups, networking events, workshops, and presentations from industry experts. Let's come together to share our knowledge, experiences, and passion for cloud computing!

CFP is always open: https://forms.gle/NM9T2icr9auQ7wyY6

groups.name: AWS User Group Anápolis
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Anápolis Meetup, where we discuss all things related to Web Development, Mobile Social, and Social Innovation. Join us for regular meetups, networking opportunities, and expert speakers who will inspire and educate you on the latest trends in cloud computing. Let's come together to collaborate, learn, and share our passion for technology!

groups.name: AWS User Group Aotearoa (NZ) - Christchurch Chapter
groups.description:
The Amazon Web Services - Christchurch Users Group is about all things Amazon Web Services for past, present and future users of all persuasions; tech and business, newbie to guru. If you are interested in Amazon Web Services and cloud computing then this is where you can hang out with the AWS crowd. We share our learnings and experiences and keep everyone up to speed on the latest news and developments.
Oh, and did I mention we are 100% about Amazon Web Services?

groups.name: AWS User Group Aotearoa (NZ) - Wellington Chapter
groups.description:
The Amazon Web Services - Wellington Users Group is about all things Amazon Web Services for past, present and future users of all persuasions; tech and business, newbie to guru. 
Our shared purpose:
• Build the next generation of AWS professionals
• Inclusive of everyone
• Career progression and job matchmaking
• Promoting excellence in the development of AWS solutions
If you are interested in Amazon Web Services and cloud computing then this is where you can hang out with the AWS crowd. We share our learnings and experiences and keep everyone up to speed on the latest news and developments.

As part of our commitment to fostering a positive and inclusive community, we adhere to a Code of Conduct. Please review our full Code of Conduct on our [website](https://awsug.nz/code-of-conduct)
By attending an AWS User Group Aotearoa Meetup, User Group or Community Day, you **agree** to comply with the **group’s code of conduct** , and will comply with all applicable laws, including additional event and venue rules and regulations (including instructions from staff)

groups.name: AWS User Group Arequipa
groups.description:
Bienvenid@s al AWS User Group Arequipa, una comunidad abierta para todas las personas interesadas en aprender, compartir y crecer en el mundo de Amazon Web Services (AWS), sin importar su nivel de experiencia.

Nos reunimos para charlar sobre tecnología, hacer talleres, resolver dudas y conocer a otras personas apasionadas por la nube. Si te interesa AWS, este es tu espacio.
¡Te esperamos en nuestros meetups! 🚀

groups.name: AWS User Group Armenia
groups.description:
This group is for anyone interested in AWS and in cloud computing / technologies in general. Whether you are a student, coding newbie, a techie or in a business or management role, here will be something for you.

Don't hesitate to join the community not to miss all the interesting meetups and knowledge exchange sessions we are going to have!

Follow us on the most suitable platform for you not to miss updates, lots of goodies (free webinars, online courses etc.) and stay tuned!

**LinkedIn Group: [https://www.linkedin.com/groups/12777076/](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/12777076/)**
**Telegram: [https://t.me/AWSUserGroupArmenia](https://t.me/AWSUserGroupArmenia)**
**Hashtag: #awsugarm**

Thanks to our sponsors:
**[Amazon Web Service](https://aws.amazon.com/)** \- the most popular and demanded cloud vendor in the world\!

groups.name: AWS User Group Astana
groups.description:
**Welcome to the AWS User Group Astana!**

We are a group of users who is interested in the ecosystem around AWS and cloud computing in general. Our group is dedicated to bringing together cloud computing enthusiasts, experts, and beginners alike to discuss all things related to Amazon Web Services (AWS).
Anyone who uses or is interested in using AWS can join an AWS User Group Astana.

***DISCLAIMER:*** *AWS User Group Astana is an independent group; our activities and the opinions expressed here are not representative of Amazon Web Services. To learn more about the AWS User Group program, visit our [webpage](https://aws.amazon.com/usergroups) .*

groups.name: AWS User Group Asturias (Spain)
groups.description:
Grupo para personas interesadas en Amazon Web Services. Cualquiera puede participar, desde los evangelistas de AWS hasta los curiosos. El enfoque principal del grupo es construir una comunidad alrededor de AWS con un aspecto social, facilitando charlas sobre temas como innovación, desarrollo y experiencias. ¿Tienes un problema con una stack en CloudFormation? Tal vez encuentres a alguien con la solución, o con un enfoque en el que no habías pensado.

Este grupo opera de manera completamente independiente y sin influencia de Amazon Web Services. Amazon Web Services apoya al grupo con oradores cuando es necesario.

ENGLISH
This is a group for people interested in Amazon Web Services. Anyone can participate, ranging from AWS evangelists to the curious. The main focus of the group is to build up a community around AWS with socializing and talks on topics like innovation, development and possibilities. Having trouble with a stack? Maybe you'll meet someone with a solution or an approach that you haven't already tried.

This User Group is operating completely independent and without influence from Amazon Web Services. Amazon Web Services is supporting the group with speakers when needed.

groups.name: AWS User Group Athens
groups.description:
**Welcome to the AWS User Group - Athens Meetup! 🚀**

Dive into the heart of cloud innovation with us! Our group is a dynamic assembly of cloud enthusiasts, developers, and business leaders passionate about leveraging Amazon Web Services (AWS) to transform ideas into reality.

**Why Join Us?**

* **Stay Ahead:** Keep your finger on the pulse of the latest AWS technologies and industry trends. Our gatherings are a treasure trove of insights, helping you stay informed and ahead in your career.
* **Share and Learn:** From novice explorers to cloud veterans, our community thrives on the diverse experiences of its members. Share your cloud journeys, learn from the challenges and successes of others, and discover new perspectives that could revolutionize your work.
* **Network with the Best:** Forge invaluable connections. Mingle with a vibrant mix of developers, IT professionals, and business executives. Our meetups are the perfect place to expand your professional network, find mentors, or meet potential collaborators.
* **Fun and Friendship:** More than just a professional network, we’re a community. Find friends among fellow tech enthusiasts who share your passion for cloud technology. Our meetups are designed to be enjoyable, fostering a warm and welcoming environment for everyone.

**Join Us on This Cloud Odyssey**

Whether you're looking to deepen your AWS knowledge, share your cloud-based projects, or simply meet like-minded individuals who are shaping the future of technology, you've found your tribe.

Let's navigate the vast skies of AWS together. Embark on this journey with us and be a part of something bigger. Your next great adventure starts here!

Sign up now to join us!

Speaker submission form: [https://forms.gle/Pst9KMVxbhNQkiBg6](https://forms.gle/Pst9KMVxbhNQkiBg6)
Follow us on LinkedIn: [https://www.linkedin.com/company/awsuggr/](https://www.linkedin.com/company/awsuggr/)

groups.name: Aws User Group Aurangabad
groups.description:
Collaborate and learn about Amazon Web Services. Meet other developers and cloud engineers in your community using and learning AWS. Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS) is a subsidiary of Amazon that provides on-demand cloud computing platforms and APIs to individuals, companies, and governments, on a metered pay-as-you-go basis.
Anyone who is interested in the technologies related to the cloud should join this group.

groups.name: AWS User Group Baku
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS User Group Baku! We're a community of cloud enthusiasts, tech pros, and anyone curious about AWS and Cloud Native technologies—whether you're a seasoned expert or just starting out. Here is some background information, we recommend starting with [AWS Overview Whitepaper](https://d1.awsstatic.com/whitepapers/aws-overview.pdf).

We're here to share knowledge, explore the latest AWS features, and dive into Cloud Native best practices in a relaxed, friendly setting. Our aim is to build a vibrant community where learning, collaboration, and innovation go hand in hand.
Make sure to follow us on [WhatsApp ](https://chat.whatsapp.com/BHBCHGLIcRHJYAZOrtvCSP)and [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/aws-baku) to stay updated, and check out our previous meetup videos on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@aws-baku).

We're on the lookout for tech lovers, developers, system architects, and cloud aficionados eager to swap stories, tackle challenges, and collaborate on cutting-edge solutions. If you have a passion for AWS and Cloud Native, you're in the right place.

Our meetups feature a mix of hands-on workshops, engaging tech talks, interactive Q&A sessions, and casual networking. Whether you're here to get practical with AWS projects or to dive deep into Cloud Native strategies, you'll find plenty of opportunities to learn and connect.

Join us and be a part of Azerbaijan's growing community of AWS and Cloud Native enthusiasts—where every session is a chance to learn, share, and have some fun with the latest in cloud technology!

groups.name: AWS User Group Bali
groups.description: AWS User Group Bali is a community-led group for builders, developers, and tech enthusiasts across Bali to learn, share, and grow together. Whether you're just getting started with AWS or already running production workloads in the cloud, you're welcome here. We host regular meetups covering AWS, cloud computing, and the broader tech topics that matter to our local community. Join us to connect with fellow builders, exchange ideas, and be part of a thriving tech community — rooted in Bali, connected to the world. 🌴

groups.name: AWS User Group Bandung
groups.description:
Join AWS User Group Bandung to connect with fellow cloud enthusiasts and professionals in the area.

Whether you are a beginner looking to expand your AWS knowledge or an experienced user seeking to network and share best practices, this group is for you.

Stay updated on the latest AWS developments, attend informative workshops, and networking with fellow cloud enthusiasts.

Let's come together to explore the endless possibilities of cloud computing and grow our skills in a supportive and engaging environment. We welcome all levels of expertise and look forward to building a thriving community in Bandung!

Join our group at:
[https://t.me/awsugbandung](https://t.me/awsugbandung)

groups.name: AWS User Group Bangladesh
groups.description:
AWSUGBD is volunteer driven, group of passionate Amazon Web Services (aka AWS) {Developers, Architects, Users, Evangelists} who meet to {share best practices, discuss up coming features, pit falls, etc.} in Bangladesh. AWSUGBD meets regularly and until now, the meetups were not documented. This blog aims to capture our learning and share them.
Community-based learning is the best way to enhance the concepts being taught by connecting with enthusiasts in person, thereby sharing first-hand experiences and familiar, accessible examples.
All skills levels are welcome to help accomplish our motto of learning, sharing and networking. Let’s join hands to empower this tech community to make it bigger and better!

groups.name: AWS User Group Basilicata
groups.description: AWS User Group Basilicata è una vivace comunità di appassionati cloud! Ci riuniamo regolarmente per condividere esperienze, imparare e crescere insieme nel mondo AWS. Partecipa ai nostri incontri per discutere di tutto, dalla migrazione al cloud all'IoT, dal machine learning alla data analytics, passando per DevOps, serverless e molto altro. Che tu sia un guru AWS o un curioso alle prime armi, qui troverai un ambiente accogliente per fare networking, scambiare idee e divertirti con la tecnologia. Unisciti a noi e fai parte di questa entusiasmante avventura nel cloud!

groups.name: AWS User Group Belgium
groups.description:
**\-\-\-\> JOIN OUR [WHATSAPP COMMUNITY](https://chat.whatsapp.com/IKa1hKzsjY1HnnWXK82oUD) FOR MORE INFO <---**

Want to speak at our events? Great! [Submit your talk](https://sessionize.com/aws-belgium-user-group/).

This is a group for anyone interested in cloud computing on the Amazon Web Services platform. All skills levels are welcome. We try and share as much knowledge as we can.

groups.name: AWS User Group Belgrade
groups.description:
AWS User Group Belgrade is a meetup group for the AWS user community. We focus on tech features of AWS and discuss real-world use cases. Join if you like Cloud and AWS. If you are ready to share your experiences you are welcome to our monthly meetings.
YouTube channel: [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1xeL6vYNY5ZigdVKYC1CnQ/](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1xeL6vYNY5ZigdVKYC1CnQ/)
Twitter @awsugbelgrade [https://www.twitter.com/awsugbelgrade](https://www.twitter.com/awsugbelgrade)
Slack channel: https://join.slack.com/t/awsugbelgrade/shared_invite/zt-1iqrmykc2-5Lh3u3EBkaScoTJPxpDYLQ

Although the number of software developers per capita in Serbia is very high (??? what is the accurate number [check this](https://www.benfrederickson.com/github-developer-locations/)) the industry is split in many different outsourcing companies which don’t exchange their knowledge but aggressively poach employees and try to keep them locked inside their walls. Almost every IT conference tends to become market for developers where companies don’t promote their products (they don’t have a product) but share their HR stories.
Therefore we need some new rules. Let’s talk about tech and forget about the hiring. 
This User Group will promote some rules for participants:
Rule #1: don’t promote your companies
– no company names on slides – only personal names
– no hiring calls on your last slide
– no thanking to your company for the opportunity to work on some great projects
Talk about hard work and knowledge you just gained trying to find a solution.
Rule #2: bring your friends and colleagues and call them on stage
– we will encourage all speakers to have partners in crime and participate to at least 10% of their presentation
– gaining courage to engage will make these people speakers of tomorrow
– look for all underrepresented groups and ask yourself if it is your fault not to have them participating more
Rule #3: no corporate bullshit, pure tech only
– if AWS sucks, say that
– be ready to discuss
– your comments can improve things so please say it
– we will freely compare tech outside AWS
The magic of AWS is that it is the best because they listened to their customers.
Rule #4
OK, no more rules – this is something to start with …

AND ... join our SLACK channel: https://join.slack.com/t/awsugbelgrade/shared_invite/zt-1iqrmykc2-5Lh3u3EBkaScoTJPxpDYLQ

groups.name: AWS User Group Belo Horizonte
groups.description:
Esse grupo é para você que é apaixonado por tecnologia, automatizações e cloud. 
Não importa se você está começando agora ou já é expert, estamos aqui para ajudar e sanar suas dúvidas. Contem com a gente! 🚀👊

Mais informações sobre a comunidade: [beacons.ai/awsusergroupmg](https://beacons.ai/awsusergroupmg)

Link de convite para entrar no grupo do WhatsApp: [https://chat.whatsapp.com/JJHLoMqGO8O7KI4Vll1GIG](https://chat.whatsapp.com/JJHLoMqGO8O7KI4Vll1GIG)

groups.name: AWS User Group Belém
groups.description:
Os **AWS User Groups** são comunidades lideradas por builders apaixonados por tecnologia, que se reúnem para trocar experiências, explorar as novidades da Nuvem AWS, desenvolver novas habilidades e criar conexões com pessoas que compartilham os mesmos interesses.
O **AWS User Group Belém** nasceu em 2024 com a missão de aproximar a comunidade da região metropolitana de Belém, promovendo encontros que unem **aprendizado, troca de conhecimento e networking**, fortalecendo o ecossistema local de inovação em nuvem.

Vem com a gente construir juntos o futuro em nuvem! ☁️✨

groups.name: AWS User Group Bergstrasse
groups.description:
Are you building something on Amazon Web Services (AWS)?
Or are you planning to start your migration project to AWS?
Are you working with Infrastructure as Code? Do you want to learn on Serverless Architectures?

We are kicking off this new AWS User Group in the "Bergstrasse" area to offer AWS engineers, DevOps engineers or interested people a home around Bensheim, Zwingenberg, Worms, Weinheim, Heppenheim, Odenwald, ... :-)

Interested in giving a presentation? We welcome customer stories, service deep dives, lessons learned, etc. Diversity is encouraged! Feel free to message us if you are first time speaker and interested in giving a presentation.
\-\-\-
Dies ist eine Gruppe für alle, die sich für Amazon Web Services (AWS) beruflich oder privat interessieren.

Auch Freunde von Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform oder anderen Umgebungen sind natürlich herzlich Willkommen um über den Tellerrand zu schauen! Themen wie 'Serverless Computing', 'Cloud native Softwareentwicklung', 'DevOps' oder 'Containerisierung' und vieles mehr wollen wir in unseren Meetups behandeln.

Zusätzlich zu inhaltlichen Themen ist uns das firmenübergreifende Networking von AWS begeisterten im Großraum Bergstraße (Bensheim/Darmstadt/Heidelberg/Mannheim) sehr wichtig.

Jeder darf bei uns mitmachen und Themen einbringen. Wir freuen uns besonders über Speaker, oder aktive Members welche uns bei der Organisation der Usergroup unterstützen wollen.

Sollte Interesse an einem Vortrag bei der AWS User Group Bergstrasse oder an einem Sponsoring für Räumlichkeiten / Catering bestehen, melde dich sehr gerne bei uns.

Wir freuen uns über jegliche Unterstützung.

groups.name: AWS User Group Bhopal
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Bhopal! This group is for anyone interested in learning, sharing, and networking with fellow AWS enthusiasts in Bhopal. Whether you're a beginner looking to explore the world of cloud computing or an experienced professional looking to advance your skills, this group is for you. Join us for a variety of meetups, workshops, and presentations focused on all things AWS. Let's come together to grow our knowledge, engage in meaningful discussions, and have fun along the way. We can't wait to connect with you!

groups.name: AWS User Group Białystok
groups.description: AWS User Group Białystok gathers people focused on solutions around AWS cloud. We apply learning-by-example knowledge sharing model and inspire with new ideas. It doesn't matter what level of AWS familiarity you present we intivite you to join and take the benefits of the community power. Looking forward to meet you!

groups.name: AWS User Group Blumenau
groups.description: Grupo de usuários da AWS (Amazon Web Services) Blumenau. O propósito do grupo é fazermos reuniões periódicas para troca de experiências no uso dos serviços da AWS, assim como apresentar cases de uso e demonstrações.

groups.name: AWS User Group Bonn
groups.description:
This is the Bonn chapter of Amazon Web Services (AWS) User Group which meets on a regular basis in and around Bonn to discuss and exchange ideas and topics from the ecosystem around AWS, their Services, and cloud computing in general.

Networking and socialising is a big part of this group combined with mainly technical talks about different aspects around AWS.

This group is based on the principle that content should primarily come from within the community and for the community. Therefore we welcome everybody, no matter if you just have startet looking into the topic of AWS or are already an experienced practitioner.

AWS User Group Bonn is an independent group; our activities and the opinions expressed here are not representative of Amazon Web Services.

We are always looking for people who would like to share their stories around AWS or could host our group by providing a location where we can meet. Please don't hesitate to get in touch with the organisers.

groups.name: AWS User Group Bosnia (Mostar)
groups.description:
AWS User Group Bosnia & Herzegovina has a mission to gather all informational technology enthusiasts, aficionados, as well as all of those who are interested in Amazon Web Services, cloud computing, DevOps and are located in our country and region. <br>Regardless of whether you just started getting familiar with AWS, in process of education and certification, or working on Enterprise projects using AWS infrastructure, you're all most welcome to join our group. <br>It's worth pointing out that in case you have any problems with AWS, and you're in need of assistance as you can't find any solution on the internet, rest assured that founders and members of this group will be eager to help you. All you need to do is to share your experience on one of our group's meet ups.

Web page: http://www.awsbosnia.com <br> <br>Email: <a>hello@awsbosnia.com</a>

Facebook group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/awsbosnia/

Facebook page: https://www.facebook.com/aws.usergroup.bih/

LinkedIn group: https://www.linkedin.com/groups/8478819 <br>

Instagram profile: https://www.instagram.com/aws_user_group_bih/

To join #Slack channel of AWS community in Bosnia use the following link: 
https://bit.ly/2NefSP6

And please, don't forget to use #AWSBosnia on your social media networks to spread the word!

groups.name: AWS User Group Boyacá
groups.description:
**AWS User Group Boyacá** es un grupo de usuarios de **Amazon Web Services (AWS)** que se encuentra en el departamento de **Boyacá, en Colombia**. Este grupo está formado por profesionales de la tecnología, desarrolladores, emprendedores y estudiantes interesados en aprender y compartir conocimientos acerca de AWS y sus servicios en la nube.

El objetivo principal de AWS User Group Boyacá es fomentar la colaboración y el aprendizaje mutuo entre los miembros del grupo, a través de eventos y actividades presenciales y virtuales, como charlas, talleres y sesiones de networking. Estas actividades están diseñadas para ayudar a los miembros a **mejorar sus habilidades técnicas, desarrollar nuevos proyectos y obtener nuevas oportunidades de empleo.**

AWS User Group Boyacá es un espacio abierto e inclusivo para cualquier persona interesada en AWS y la nube, independientemente de su nivel de experiencia o conocimiento previo. Al unirse a este grupo, los miembros pueden aprovechar la comunidad y los recursos para mejorar sus habilidades y construir su red profesional en el campo de la tecnología en la nube.

groups.name: AWS User Group Brasília
groups.description: Grupo voltado a discussões, palestras e networking sobre AWS em Brasília. Discussões sobre todos os tópicos envolvendo AWS são bem vindas.

groups.name: AWS User Group Bratislava
groups.description: Welcome to the Amazon User Group Bratislava. It does not matter if you are a cloud evangelist or only starting to learn about cloud, come and join us for face-to-face meetings where we can discuss AWS based topics and real life examples. Let's share knowledge!

groups.name: AWS User Group Braunschweig
groups.description:
We are a diverse group of individuals with a wide range of backgrounds and expertise who enjoy engaging in discussions about AWS.
We conduct both online and onsite meetups
If you would like to host a meetup in your location or if you'd like to speak at our meetup please get in touch with us!
Meetup sessions could be in English and German.
Everyone who participates in an AWS UG Braunschweig event must adhere to the [Code of Conduct](https://docs.google.com/document/d/19x96FfUy0IxOtwdix2QtEG2qx9iupHAG/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=108316644141255441103&rtpof=true&sd=true).

groups.name: AWS User Group Bristol
groups.description:
Welcome to the Official AWS User Group Bristol!

This group is for anyone interested in Amazon Web Services, cloud computing, and networking with fellow tech enthusiasts in Bristol and the South West.

Whether you're a seasoned AWS pro or just starting out, join us for informative presentations, engaging discussions, and networking opportunities. Stay up-to-date on the latest AWS developments, share best practices, and expand your knowledge and skills in a friendly and inclusive environment. Come join us and be part of our growing community of AWS users in Bristol!

groups.name: AWS User Group Bucaramanga
groups.description:
En Bucaramanga nace un espacio para soñar, aprender y construir juntos el futuro de la tecnología en la nube. El AWS User Group Bucaramanga es una comunidad donde profesionales, estudiantes y apasionados por la innovación se unen para descubrir cómo Amazon Web Services impulsa la transformación digital y abre nuevas oportunidades en la región.

Nuestro propósito es inspirar, conectar y potenciar el talento local, creando un punto de encuentro en el que las ideas se convierten en proyectos, el conocimiento se comparte y la colaboración nos lleva más lejos. Aquí no solo hablamos de nube: hablamos de crecimiento, evolución y del poder de la comunidad para cambiar la industria.

groups.name: AWS User Group Budapest
groups.description: Az AWS User Group Budapest (korábbi nevén AWS User Group Hungary) a magyarországi Amazon Web Services felhasználók számára jött létre 2014-ben. A találkozók során közvetlenül oszthatunk meg egymással minden olyan információt, ami segíti a cloud technológia iránt érdeklődőket, vagy akinek bármi kétsége támad a technológia használatával kapcsolatban. Rendszeres Meetupok keretén belül próbáljuk villám előadások segítségével bemutatni a lehetséges felhasználási módokat, lehetőséget adva olyan kérdések megvitatására is, melyek személyes tapasztalatot igényelnek. Vendég előadóink színesebbé és érdekesebbé teszik a prezentációkat, új, esetleg nem ismert, vagy akár nem is publikus technológiák bemutatásával, demonstrációjával. Az előadások után lehetőség van ismerkedésre, kötetlen beszélgetésre, kapcsolatépítésre. A helyszín a visszajelzett résztvevők létszámától függ, de minden esetben egy közvetlen, barátságos környezetet keresünk, jó megközelíthetőséggel.

groups.name: AWS User Group Buenos Aires
groups.description:
¡Bienvenidos al AWS Users Group de Buenos Aires!
Si sos apasionado por la nube y AWS, te encanta compartir conocimiento, aprender cosas nuevas y divertirte; estás en el lugar indicado. Somos un grupo de usuarios de AWS de Buenos Aires, Argentina que nos juntamos, nos divertimos y aprendemos entre todos.

groups.name: AWS User Group BuildHers+ Philippines

groups.name: AWS User Group Cairo
groups.description:
We are a community of AWS users in Egypt, dedicated to exploring the latest advancements in AWS cloud technology. Our group provides a supportive and collaborative environment for everyone

What We Do:

Meetups: Regularly scheduled meetups featuring expert speakers, hands-on workshops, and interactive sessions.
Networking: Opportunities to connect with like-minded individuals, industry professionals, and AWS experts.
Learning: Access to valuable resources, tutorials, and real-world case studies to enhance your AWS skills.
Support: A platform to ask questions, seek advice, and find solutions to your AWS challenges.

Why Join Us:

Stay Updated: Keep up with the latest AWS trends, services, and best practices.
Enhance Skills: Gain practical knowledge and hands-on experience with AWS tools and services.
Build Connections: Expand your professional network and meet other AWS enthusiasts in the Cairo area.
Collaborate: Work on projects, share ideas, and collaborate with group members to solve real-world problems..

Join Us Today!
Whether you're interested in cloud architecture, DevOps, machine learning, or any other AWS-related topic, our user group is the perfect place to learn and grow. Come and be part of our vibrant community. Let's innovate, collaborate, and succeed together!

groups.name: AWS User Group Campinas

groups.name: AWS User Group Cancun

Somos una comunidad vibrante de profesionales, entusiastas y curiosos apasionados por la nube y Amazon Web Services (AWS). Este grupo está abierto a todos, ya seas desarrollador, administrador de sistemas, líder empresarial o estudiante. No importa si apenas estás comenzando con AWS o si ya eres un experto, ¡hay algo para todos en nuestra comunidad!

En nuestros eventos encontrarás charlas, talleres, demostraciones y oportunidades para hacer networking con otros entusiastas de AWS. Además, nos mantenemos actualizados con las últimas tendencias y novedades de AWS, y compartimos recursos para que todos puedan mejorar sus habilidades y conocimientos.

Únete a nosotros para conectar con otros expertos en la nube, ampliar tu red profesional y aprender de una manera divertida. ¡Te esperamos en nuestro próximo evento en el paraíso de Cancún! 🌊🌞

groups.name: AWS User Group Cape Town
