groups.name: AWS User Group Cascavel
groups.description:
O AWS User Group Cascavel – PR é uma comunidade gratuita e aberta a todos os interessados em aprender, compartilhar e se aprofundar na plataforma Amazon Web Services (AWS). Nosso objetivo é criar um espaço de desenvolvimento colaborativo – tanto para quem está começando quanto para quem já atua com arquitetura, DevOps, engenharia de dados ou aplicações em nuvem.

Quem pode participar
Estudantes, desenvolvedores, administradores de sistemas, arquitetos, profissionais de TI ou qualquer pessoa curiosa sobre computação em nuvem.

Todos os níveis de conhecimento: desde iniciantes no Cloud Practitioner até especialistas em AWS.

O que fazemos
Encontros regulares, presenciais ou online, com palestras técnicas, hands‑on, estudos de caso, laboratórios e debates sobre ferramentas como EC2, S3, IAM, Lambda, RDS, entre outras .

Troca de experiências e networking com pessoas da região de Cascavel, Foz do Iguaçu e Oeste do Paraná – aproximando a comunidade local com o ecossistema AWS .

Promoção de eventos com foco técnico, em parceria com comunidades regionais, reforçando boas práticas, tendências e evolução dos serviços AWS.

Por que participar
Expandir seu conhecimento técnico por meio de aprendizado entre pares, seja em projetos, certificações ou cases reais .

Conectar-se com comunidade local e regional, fortalecendo laços com quem pensa e trabalha com AWS no Oeste do Paraná.

Acesso a recursos de apoio e suporte da AWS, especialmente para novos líderes que desejam organizar o grupo se ainda não existir um grupo ativo na cidade .

groups.name: AWS User Group Castanhal
groups.description: Acreditamos que o talento está em todo lugar, mas as oportunidades nem sempre. Nossa missão é descentralizar o acesso à tecnologia e capacitar profissionais do interior através do compartilhamento de conhecimento e networking. Com o apoio oficial da **AWS**, promovemos um ecossistema de aprendizado contínuo em Cloud Computing e inovação, abrindo portas para carreiras globais sem que você precise sair da sua região.

groups.name: Aws User Group Castelo Branco & Beira Baixa
groups.description:
**Slack**: [https://tinyurl.com/join-aws-pt-user-group-slack](https://tinyurl.com/join-aws-pt-user-group-slack) \- say hello after you joined the channel\!

Group for all topics related to AWS in Castelo Branco / Beira Baixa ([https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Beira_Baixa_Province](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Beira_Baixa_Province)) and around. It aims to be the foundation of a community of IT professionals, Programmers, Service Managers and businesses motivated to share ideas and knowledge around their use of Amazon Web Services' public cloud computing platform. We are at the beginning now, but we want to be a strong community where its members can collaborate and learn.

groups.name: AWS User Group Ceará
groups.description:
Grupo voltado a discussões, palestras e networking sobre AWS. Discussões sobre todos os tópicos envolvendo AWS são bem vindas.
Além do meetup, temos o chat de discussão oficial no WhatsApp. Acesse em:
[https://tinyurl.com/hmmp2kuu](https://tinyurl.com/hmmp2kuu)
E no twitter: [https://twitter.com/awsusergroupce](https://twitter.com/awsusergroupce) \


OBS: Este grupo não é organizado pela Amazon/AWS.
\

groups.name: AWS User Group Chiclayo
groups.description:
**¡Bienvenido al AWS User Group Chiclayo Meetup!**

Este grupo está dedicado a reunir a entusiastas, profesionales y principiantes de **AWS en Chiclayo** que comparten una pasión por la computación en la nube.
Nuestros meetups cubrirán una amplia variedad de temas relacionados con AWS, como computación sin servidor (serverless), inteligencia artificial y aprendizaje automático, mejores prácticas de seguridad y mucho más.
Ya sea que quieras ampliar tus conocimientos, conectar con personas con intereses similares o mantenerte al día con las últimas tendencias en tecnología en la nube, este grupo es para ti.

Únete a nosotros para participar en sesiones informativas, conversaciones enriquecedoras y talleres prácticos que te ayudarán a profundizar en tu comprensión de **AWS**.

groups.name: AWS user group Chihuahua
groups.description: ¡Bienvenido al Grupo de Usuarios de AWS de Chihuahua! Este grupo es para entusiastas de AWS en la zona de Chihuahua interesados en conectar, aprender y compartir sus experiencias con Amazon Web Services. Si eres principiante y buscas iniciarte en AWS, este grupo es para ti. Únete a nuestras reuniones, talleres y debates sobre diversos temas de AWS. ¡Colaboremos, crezcamos e inspirémonos mutuamente en nuestra experiencia con AWS!

groups.name: AWS User Group Chimaltenango
groups.description:
¡Bienvenidos al grupo de Meetup "AWS User Group Chimaltenango"! Este espacio está diseñado para todos aquellos entusiastas de la tecnología que buscan adentrarse en el mundo de la nube, específicamente en los servicios de AWS. Nuestro objetivo principal es democratizar el acceso a la tecnología, con un enfoque especial en las comunidades y áreas rurales.

En "AWS User Group Chimaltenango", encontrarás un ambiente lleno de creatividad, donde tu pasión por la innovación no tendrá límites. Esperamos reunir a personas que no solo deseen explorar nuevas tecnologías, sino que también estén dispuestas a colaborar y compartir sus conocimientos con otros.

Nuestros eventos combinan lo mejor de ambos mundos: sesiones presenciales y virtuales, donde podrás interactuar con expertos en tecnología y servicios de nube. Cada encuentro está lleno de actividades interactivas, charlas con speakers experimentados, premios, sorpresas y, por supuesto, ¡mucha pizza!

Únete a nosotros para formar parte de una comunidad que crece y aprende junta, explorando las infinitas posibilidades que AWS y la nube tienen para ofrecer. ¡Esperamos verte en nuestro próximo evento!

groups.name: AWS User Group Circuito das Águas Paulista
groups.description:
Somos uma comunidade apaixonada por tecnologia, colaboração e aprendizado contínuo! O **AWS User Group Circuito das Águas Paulista** conecta pessoas da região que querem crescer juntas explorando o universo da AWS e temas relacionados a cloud, inovação e carreira tech.
Promovemos encontros presenciais e online com conteúdo técnico, troca de experiências, networking e muita mão na massa. Seja você iniciante ou experiente, aqui é o seu lugar para aprender, compartilhar e se conectar com quem também acredita no poder da comunidade.
Participe dos nossos eventos, traga suas ideias e venha construir o futuro com a gente!

groups.name: AWS User Group Cochabamba
groups.description:
**Bienvenidos y bienvenidas al AWS User Group Cochabamba** ☁️🚀

Este es el espacio perfecto para profesionales de la computación en la nube, ingenieros, estudiantes y entusiastas de la tecnología. Somos una comunidad dedicada a aprender, compartir y debatir sobre las últimas tendencias en AWS, arquitectura en la nube, mejores prácticas, inteligencia artificial, casos de uso, certificaciones y eventos.

Ya sea que trabajes con infraestructura, software, desarrollo de aplicaciones, IA, análisis de datos, startups o simplemente quieras conocer más sobre AWS, aquí encontrarás un lugar para aprender, crecer, intercambiar ideas y ampliar tu red de contactos.

¡Súmate y sé parte de la comunidad cloud en Cochabamba! 🌍⚡

Aquí podrás ver todas nuestras redes sociales:

🔗 https://linktr.ee/AWSUGCochabamba

groups.name: AWS User Group Colima
groups.description: Grupo con propósito de compartir sobre diseño y arquitectura en la nube de Amazon Web Services: hablaremos sobre temas relacionados con AWS Bedrock, Amplify, entre muchos otros, con talleres en donde podrás aprender a desarrollar soluciones robustas para tu negocio o proyecto de emprendimiento.

groups.name: AWS User Group Cologne #AWSUGCGN
groups.description:
This is the Cologne chapter of the Amazon Web Services User Group. #AWSUGCGN
The organization is carried out alternately by Cologne Intelligence and NTT DATA.

Please join us on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/12918799/) in order to discuss and stay informed.

Join our AWS User Group Cologne (#AWSUGCGN) meetup events and meet likeminded people. Whether you are an expert, a newbie or somewhere in between – we welcome everyone to the community and cherish the exchange! Expand your knowledge, gain new insights, and contribute by presenting a talk to share your experiences and learnings. Immerse yourself in enlightening discussions, captivating presentations, and enjoyable conversations, and you can even consider hosting a meetup and showing us your office.

If you want to participate in our meetup, please register here. Our meetups are usually held on-site.

**Code of Conduct**
All events of the AWS User Group Cologne follow the Berlin Code of Conduct ([https://berlincodeofconduct.org/](https://berlincodeofconduct.org/)). Our primary goal is to involve as many participants from as many different backgrounds as possible.

**Talk / Host**
If you would like to give a talk or host a meetup get in touch with us!
For Speaker:[ https://forms.gle/mtZqcwPHkbqugHHw5](https://forms.gle/mtZqcwPHkbqugHHw5)
For Hosts: [https://forms.gle/MQqz1vZfzk1Q3yiq9](https://forms.gle/MQqz1vZfzk1Q3yiq9)
You can leave a message here or contact us at awsugcgn [at] gmail.com.

groups.name: AWS User Group Colombo
groups.description:
This is an independent user group for people interested in Amazon Web Services. Anyone can participate, ranging from AWS evangelists to the curious. The main focus of the group is to build up a community around AWS with socializing and talks on topics like innovations, development, and possibilities. Having trouble with a stack? Maybe you'll meet someone with a solution or an approach that you haven't already tried.
[https://linktr.ee/awsugcmb](https://linktr.ee/awsugcmb)

groups.name: AWS User Group Congo-Kinshasa
groups.description:
AWS User Group Congo-Kinshasa is a dynamic and inclusive community of technology enthusiasts, professionals, students, and business leaders passionate about Amazon Web Services (AWS). Our mission is to promote the adoption and understanding of AWS technologies within Congo-Kinshasa, fostering a culture of innovation and collaboration.

We aim to:

Provide a platform for knowledge sharing and networking among AWS users.
Organize regular meetups, workshops, and seminars to discuss the latest AWS services and best practices.
Support members in their journey to achieve AWS certifications and enhance their cloud computing skills.
Foster partnerships and collaborations with local businesses, educational institutions, and tech communities to drive digital transformation in the region.
Join us to stay updated with the latest AWS trends, share your experiences, and connect with like-minded individuals who are shaping the future of cloud computing in Congo-Kinshasa. Together, we can unlock the full potential of AWS and contribute to the growth and development of our tech ecosystem.

groups.name: AWS User Group Coração do Rio Grande
groups.description:
Santa Maria, localizada no coração do Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil, é conhecida como a “Cidade Ferroviária” devido à sua importância histórica como um importante centro ferroviário. O marco mais emblemático da cidade é a histórica Gare da Estação Ferroviária, um belo edifício do início do século XX que simboliza a conexão de Santa Maria com o patrimônio ferroviário do Brasil.

O trem representa o papel de Santa Maria como um conector e centro nevrálgico, assim como a AWS conecta empresas à infraestrutura em nuvem. Assim como a ferrovia trouxe progresso e inovação para a região, o AWS User Group traz tecnologia em nuvem e soluções modernas para a comunidade tecnológica local, mantendo Santa Maria na vanguarda da transformação digital no sul do Brasil.

groups.name: AWS User Group Cork
groups.description: This is a group for all-things AWS in Cork. We're a community of users, developers and business professionals meeting to share ideas & learn from each other and from leading figures in the AWS technology space. Our aim is to become an important resource for technical & business professionals who want to stay up to speed with developments in AWS Cloud and related technologies. Look out for more events and announcements in 2015! For sponsorship & speaking requests please contact awscork@gmail.com

groups.name: AWS User Group Cotonou
groups.description:
Bienvenue à l'AWS User Group Cotonou ! Nous nous rencontrons et partageons nos connaissances sur Amazon Web Services (AWS). Si vous débutez sur AWS, ce groupe est fait pour vous - tout notre contenu s'efforcera toujours de prendre en compte les nouveaux utilisateurs d'AWS.

Nos conférenciers seront des personnes travaillant déjà avec AWS - nous accueillons volontiers les conférenciers de notre communauté, donc si vous avez une conférence que vous aimeriez donner, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter !

Pour l'instant, nous nous rencontrerons en ligne, et nous espérons nous rencontrer en personne un jour, si possible !

groups.name: AWS User Group Criciúma
groups.description:
Somos um AWS User Group Oficial e nosso objetivo é difundir conhecimento, experiências e melhores práticas sobre cloud computing e cultura DevOps.
Claro que existem tendências sobre multicloud e infraestrutura é bem abrangente, então diversos temas podem surgir nos nossos encontros.

Quer tirar dúvidas ou conversar?
Fique a vontade em entrar no grupo do WhatsApp (http://bit.ly/whatscriciumaops) ou iniciar discussões aqui mesmo pelo Meetup.

Somos de Criciúma/SC e desde de Fevereiro de 2019 organizamos eventos a cada 30\~45d. Os encontros variam entre meetups, bate papos e workshops onlines ou presenciais.

groups.name: AWS User Group Cuneo
groups.description:
Incontriamoci per parlare di Cloud, discutere sull'uso di AWS, scoprire case history e vederne esempi. Il meetup è rivolto a nerd, a sviluppatori, a professionisti e a tutti quelli che vogliono conoscere il cloud AWS e non solo.
Partecipa attivamente o anche solamente a curiosare!

groups.name: AWS User Group Córdoba
groups.description: Este es un grupo para todos los interesados en computación en la nube. No es necesario ser un genio de la computación, el objetivo es compartir experiencias y conocimientos sobre AWS y nuevas tecnologías.

groups.name: AWS User Group Dakar
groups.description:
Dakar chapter of Amazon Web Services User Group.

We are a group of users who is interested in the ecosystem around AWS and cloud computing in general. Networking and socialising is a big part of this group combined with mostly technical talks about different aspects and ideas for the usage of AWS and their services.

groups.name: AWS User Group Damascus
groups.description:
We are proud to announce the launch of the first AWS User Group in Syria, a vibrant community dedicated to cloud enthusiasts, developers, engineers, and tech leaders from across the country and around the world.

Our mission is to empower Syrian engineers—whether at home or abroad—with the tools, knowledge, and network to thrive in the cloud era. Through regular workshops, technical talks, hands-on sessions, and networking opportunities, we aim to foster skill development, share real-world experiences, and connect innovators who are passionate about Amazon Web Services (AWS) and modern cloud technologies.

This group welcomes all experience levels—from curious beginners to seasoned cloud architects. Join us to learn, collaborate, and be part of a growing movement driving digital transformation in Syria and beyond.

Together, we build. Together, we grow.

groups.name: AWS User Group Data India
groups.description:
Join the AWS Data User Group India, a vibrant online community for data enthusiasts and AWS explorers.

* Connect & Collaborate: Network with professionals, evangelists, and fellow data-passionates across the nation.
* Learn & Grow: Sharpen your skills with insightful talks, workshops, and discussions on cutting-edge AWS data solutions.
* Solve & Share: Tackle challenges and discover new approaches with the collective power of the community.
* Stay Ahead: Keep pace with the latest data innovations and trends within the AWS ecosystem.

groups.name: AWS User Group Davao
groups.description:
A group of Amazon Web Services users in Davao (Southern Philippines). We meet every other month to talk about AWS related technology and how we build things.
We gather people working with lots of different technologies that take advantage of cloud solutions, so if you're thinking of building an application or just interested in the AWS Cloud in general be sure to RSVP!

groups.name: AWS User Group Dehradun
groups.description:
AWS User Group Dehradun- a community of cloud enthusiasts who believe in growing and learning together. We are a community focused on bringing together AWS partners, customers, practitioners, experts, and students, to share ideas and knowledge. We aim at building an environment that connects people through innovation, ideas, and inspiration. It gives us immense pride to bring to your attention that we are one of the youngest and fastest growing communities in India.
We at AWS User Group Dehradun believe in one's vision and values and thus promote and practice them. We aim at building values of integrity, hard-work, discipline and compassion so that we grow together as a community and help each other to learn and exercise knowledge and technology. Being powered by the World's Leading Cloud Provider- Amazon Web Services, we believe that it is our duty and responsibility to encourage ideas and innovation and deliver services in the best way possible.

groups.name: AWS User Group DFW - Dallas Fort Worth
groups.description:
Amazon Web Services Dallas Users Group

AWS offers a complete set of infrastructure that enable you to run virtually everything in the cloud: from enterprise applications and big data projects to social games and mobile apps.
Join us in discussing the latest in Cloud Technology and network with experts in the field.
Tweeting? Use #awsdallas
Who Should Join: Anyone interested in AWS, Cloud Computing Discussions & Networking
Are you an AWS Partner interested in sponsoring a Meetup? Please reach out to Sandeep Veldi.

groups.name: AWS User Group Dortmund
groups.description:
Dies ist eine Gruppe für Cloudbegeisterte, die sich mit Amazon Web Services (AWS) beruflich oder privat beschäftigen und mehr als nur virtuelle Server in der Cloud betreiben möchten. Auch Freunde von Microsoft Azure, IBM Cloud Platform, Google Cloud Platform oder anderen Umgebungen sind natürlich herzlich Willkommen um über den Tellerrand zu schauen! Der Fokus liegt allerdings auf Themen und Services aus dem AWS Ökosystem und dabei sind die Themen 'Serverless Computing', 'Cloud native Softwareentwicklung', 'DevOps' oder 'Containerisierung' diejenigen die immer wieder Einzug in die Meetups finden.
Wir versuchen bei unseren User Group Meetups immer aktuelle Themen rund um AWS aufzugreifen und euch interessante Speaker zu bieten. Dabei [freuen wir uns über jeden Beitrag seitens der AWS Community](https://www.awsugdo.cloud/being-a-speaker/) und aus den Reihen unserer User Group Mitglieder.

Sollte von eurer Seite Interesse an einem Vortrag bei der AWS User Group Dortmund oder an einem Sponsoring für Räumlichkeiten / Catering bestehen, kontaktiere uns sehr gerne.

Wir freuen uns über jegliche Unterstützung. 
Das Team der AWS Usergroup Dortmund

groups.name: AWS User Group Düsseldorf
groups.description:
Dies ist eine Gruppe für Cloudbegeisterte, die sich mit Amazon Web Services (AWS) beruflich oder privat beschäftigen und mehr als nur virtuelle Server in der Cloud betreiben möchten. Auch Freunde von Microsoft Azure, IBM Cloud Platform, Google Cloud Platform oder anderen Umgebungen sind natürlich herzlich Willkommen um über den Tellerrand zu schauen! Der Fokus liegt allerdings auf Themen und Services aus dem AWS Ökosystem und dabei sind die Themen 'Serverless Computing', 'Cloud native Softwareentwicklung', 'DevOps' oder 'Containerisierung' diejenigen die immer wieder Einzug in die Meetups finden.




Wir versuchen bei unseren User Group Meetups immer aktuelle Themen rund um AWS aufzugreifen und euch interessante Speaker zu bieten. Dabei freuen wir uns über jeden Beitrag seitens der AWS Community und aus den Reihen unserer User Group Mitglieder.

Sollte von eurer Seite Interesse an einem Vortrag bei der AWS User Group Düsseldorf oder an einem Sponsoring für Räumlichkeiten / Catering bestehen, kontaktiere uns sehr gerne.

Wenn ihr einen Vorschlag für einen Vortrag habt, wendet euch gerne direkt an das Orga-Team

Wir freuen uns über jegliche Unterstützung.

groups.name: AWS User Group Ensenada
groups.description:
¡Bienvenidos al AWS User Group Ensenada!
Este grupo dinámico está dedicado a todos los entusiastas de Linux, la computación en la nube, DevOps, SRE, Platform Engineering. Únase a nosotros para explorar los últimos avances, colaborar con otros expertos y compartir ideas sobre los servicios y soluciones de AWS. Amplíe sus conocimientos y conéctese con profesionales con ideas afines en un entorno atractivo, donde la innovación se combina con las mejores prácticas.

groups.name: AWS User Group Finland
groups.description:
The AWS User Group Finland is for people interested in all aspects of the Amazon Web Services (AWS). This user group mainly operates in the Southern Finland area (Helsinki, Turku and Tampere) but can organize events in other regions of Finland as well, if need be. Everyone regardless of their geographical location is welcome to join the group.

You really don't need to be an expert on AWS to participate. We hope that everyone can be a part of this group and share information, experiences and knowledge about AWS.

Main purpose of this group it to get together as much as possible. Let's have nice meetups!

You can use hashtag #awsfinmeetup in social medias when sharing content about our events!

AWS User Group Finland organizers

groups.name: AWS User Group Floripa
groups.description:
Bem-vindo ao AWS User Group Floripa!

Este é um grupo dedicado a unir profissionais, estudantes e entusiastas na área da Grande Florianópolis que estão interessados ​​em aprender, compartilhar e expandir seus conhecimentos sobre a Amazon Web Services (AWS) - a plataforma líder mundial em serviços de nuvem. Nossa missão é criar um ambiente amigável e inclusivo onde nossos membros possam aprimorar suas habilidades técnicas, expandir sua rede de contatos e se manter atualizados com as mais recentes inovações e atualizações do AWS.

Nossos meetups abrangem uma ampla gama de tópicos relacionados à AWS, incluindo, mas não limitado a, computação em nuvem, armazenamento, banco de dados, redes, análise de dados, machine learning, segurança e muito mais. Encorajamos a participação ativa, portanto, palestras, workshops, sessões de perguntas e respostas e discussões em grupo serão componentes regulares de nossos encontros.

Independentemente do seu nível de experiência com a AWS, seja você um iniciante procurando dar seus primeiros passos na nuvem, um profissional experiente procurando se manter atualizado com as tendências mais recentes ou um especialista procurando compartilhar suas experiências e insights, você será bem-vindo aqui.

Venha fazer parte do AWS User Group Floripa e ajude a fortalecer nossa comunidade de profissionais de tecnologia em Florianópolis. Juntos, podemos aprender, compartilhar e crescer no mundo da AWS.

Confira as nossas redes sociais e grupos da comunidade: https://linktr.ee/awsusergroupfloripa

Nos vemos em nosso próximo meetup!

groups.name: AWS User Group France - Nantes
groups.description:
Amazon Web Services (AWS) user group.
Submit a talk: https://conference-hall.io/aws-nantes-meetup
This is a group for anyone interested in Amazon Web Services and cloud computing. We started this group to provide a platform to meet, network, learn and share how others in Nantes market are solving problems utilizing cloud and Amazon Web Services.
topics: Ruby On Rails Amazon Web Services

groups.name: AWS User Group France - Paris
groups.description:
**Un groupe pour les passionnés de AWS (Amazon Web Services): développeurs, DevOps, SysAdmin, architectes, évangélistes, étudiants, chercheurs... On échange ici sur les nouveautés AWS, les Best Practices.**
**User Group AWS** : **groupe** géographique qui se réunit pour apprendre et discuter d'**AWS**, lors de réunions régulières. Les meetups **AWS** sont des réunions informelles, centrées sur le cloud **AWS**, ses services et la façon dont ils sont mis en place dans différents environnements.
[Rejoignez aussi la communauté sur Slack ! ](https://join.slack.com/t/aws-user-group/shared_invite/zt-4e5iyfvq-w5GOvlDEgoIB7pSWKGd9DQ)

**Vous voulez proposer un talk ?** C'est par ici : [https://conference-hall.io/aws-user-group-paris](https://conference-hall.io/aws-user-group-paris)

groups.name: AWS User Group France - Rennes
groups.description:
User Group AWS : groupe géographique qui se réunit pour apprendre et discuter d'AWS, lors de réunions régulières. Les meetups AWS sont des réunions informelles, centrées sur le cloud AWS, ses services et la façon dont ils sont mis en place dans différents environnements.
[Rejoignez aussi la communauté sur Slack ! ](https://join.slack.com/t/aws-user-group/shared_invite/zt-4e5iyfvq-w5GOvlDEgoIB7pSWKGd9DQ)

groups.name: AWS User Group Galicia
groups.description:
**🌩️ AWS User Group Galicia**

Somos una comunidad abierta de profesionales, estudiantes y entusiastas del cloud en Galicia, apasionados por aprender, compartir y construir juntos sobre Amazon Web Services (AWS).

Nuestro objetivo es fomentar el intercambio de conocimiento, experiencias y buenas prácticas en torno al ecosistema AWS, creando un espacio donde se mezclen la tecnología, la innovación y las personas.

**🔹 ¿Qué hacemos?**
Organizamos charlas, talleres y eventos presenciales y online sobre temas como arquitectura cloud, IA/ML, DevOps, seguridad, serverless, media, networking y mucho más.
También impulsamos la colaboración entre empresas, universidades y profesionales locales para fortalecer el ecosistema cloud en Galicia.

**🔹 ¿Quién puede participar?**
Cualquiera con interés en AWS o en la computación en la nube: desarrolladores, arquitectos, administradores, estudiantes, startups o simplemente curiosos.
No necesitas ser experto — solo tener ganas de aprender y compartir.

Únete al grupo y participa en los próximos AWS Meetups, workshops y Community Days.
¡Aprende, conecta y crece con la comunidad AWS en Galicia! ☁️

groups.name: AWS User Group Goiânia
groups.description: Grupo voltado a discussões, palestras e networking sobre AWS em Goiânia/Goiás. Discussões sobre todos os tópicos envolvendo AWS são bem vindas.

groups.name: AWS User Group Harare, Zimbabwe
groups.description: Official AWS User Group for Zimbabwe. Leading the adoption of AWS services and Cloud Computing in Zimbabwe. Join for event updates, AWS offerings, and cloud computing content.

groups.name: AWS User Group Heilbronn
groups.description:
Are you interested in AWS? You work as a developer, DevOps engineer or architect in the context of AWS?

In this new user group we want to discuss and network about AWS. We plan to meet regularly and present 1-2 talks on a specific AWS topic.

Are you interested in a specific topic or would you like to give a talk on a topic? We look forward to hearing from you.

groups.name: AWS User Group Hermosillo
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Hermosillo Meetup! We focus on all things cloud computing, technology, and society. Our sessions cover topics such as application architecture, cloud security, pragmatic software development, recommender systems, and the interests of AWS Users. Join us to network with fellow tech enthusiasts, learn from industry experts, and stay up-to-date on the latest trends in the world of AWS. Whether you're a seasoned cloud professional or just starting out, we have something for everyone. Come join us and expand your knowledge in the world of cloud computing!

groups.name: AWS User Group Hong Kong
groups.description:
AWS User Group Hong Kong (AWS UGHK) is a grassroots tech community led by local AWS users, dedicated to growing Hong Kong’s developer ecosystem through authentic, tech-focused events. From large-scale gatherings like AWS Community Day to regular meetups and student showcases, the team aims to foster connection, learning, and visibility for builders across the city.

AWS User Group Hong Kong（AWS UGHK）係一個由本地 AWS 使用者自發組成嘅技術社群，致力推動香港 Developer 生態圈發展，打造更多以技術為本嘅交流活動。無論係 AWS Community Day 呢類大型年度盛事，定期 meetup，定係學生項目 showcase，團隊都希望透過分享、連結同實踐，令香港 IT 人可以更有歸屬感、更有 visibility。

groups.name: AWS User Group Huancayo
groups.description:
**Bienvenido/a al AWS User Group Huancayo 🇵🇪☁️**
Somos una comunidad apasionada por la tecnología y el aprendizaje en la nube, enfocada en Amazon Web Services (AWS). Nos reunimos para compartir conocimiento, experiencias, buenas prácticas y desafíos del mundo cloud — ¡todo en un ambiente colaborativo y accesible para todos!

🚀 ¿Qué hacemos?

* Charlas técnicas, talleres y demos
* Eventos para principiantes y expertos
* Networking entre profesionales, estudiantes y entusiastas
* Actividades locales con identidad andina y espíritu global 🌎
* 

🎯 Nuestro objetivo es empoderar a personas de todas las edades y perfiles a través del conocimiento, impulsando el desarrollo tecnológico desde Huancayo hacia el mundo.

¡Únete, aprende y crece con nosotros! 🙌
#Comunidad #Cloud #AWS #Huancayo

groups.name: AWS User Group Indore
groups.description: A community to bring together AWS partners, customers, practitioners, experts and students.

groups.name: AWS User Group Innlandet (Norway)
groups.description:
📌 **Who's it for?**

This is group is an independent user group for people interested in Amazon Web Services. Anyone can participate, ranging from AWS evangelists to the curious. The main focus of the group is to build up a community around AWS with socializing and talks on topics like innovations, development and possibilities. Having trouble with a stack? Maybe you'll meet someone with a solution or an approach that you haven't already tried.

This User Group is operating completely independent and without influence from Amazon Web Services. Amazon Web Services is supporting the group with speakers when needed.

There are also a user groups in Oslo, Trondheim, Stavanger, Bergen and elsewhere in the world.

📌 **Cost?**
Participation in our meetings is free.

📌 **Want to Present?**
If you're interested in presenting or speaking in either Norwegian or English, please contact the organizers. Call for papers: https://forms.gle/vae3r535RUnTE9Ex6 

📌 **Sponsor?**
Want to sponsor an event with food, drinks and venue. Please contact the organizers.

groups.name: AWS User Group Interior SP
groups.description:
O AWS User Group Interior de São Paulo foca em Cloud, DevOps, SRE e carreira, tem como objetivo disseminar conhecimento e promover a troca de experiências entre profissionais e entusiastas da área de tecnologia, especialmente aqueles interessados em trabalhar com serviços e soluções oferecidos pela Amazon Web Services (AWS).

A proposta é reunir pessoas interessadas em aprender mais sobre temas como arquitetura de cloud, infraestrutura como código, automação de processos, gestão de configuração, segurança em nuvem, containers, entre outros, e compartilhar conhecimento sobre as melhores práticas e tendências da área.

O meetup itinerante percorrerá diferentes cidades do interior de São Paulo, proporcionando a oportunidade para que participantes de diversas regiões possam se conectar e trocar ideias. Além disso, o evento contará com a presença de palestrantes experientes e reconhecidos na área de tecnologia, que compartilharão suas experiências e conhecimentos com a comunidade.

O meetup será aberto a todos os interessados, independentemente de sua experiência ou nível de conhecimento, e será uma ótima oportunidade para networking e conexão com profissionais e empresas da área. O objetivo final é disseminar conhecimento e contribuir para o desenvolvimento profissional dos participantes, incentivando-os a se atualizarem constantemente e a explorar as possibilidades oferecidas pela nuvem e pela AWS.

groups.name: AWS User Group Jaipur - Rajasthan
groups.description: The Official Community Group of AWS & Cloud Computing Enthusiasts, Passionate Developers, Architects, Users & Evangelists, and Students in and around Rajasthan - India. Here we organize free talks to educate you about the AWS Products, Services, and Solutions in the Cloud and help you develop the skills to Design, Deploy, and Operate Infrastructure and Applications. This Group allows users to ask questions, get answers, share ideas, and learn about the latest updates.

groups.name: AWS User Group Jakarta
groups.description:
The Amazon Web Services User Group Indonesia is a group that specific to a bunch of passionate Amazon Web Services (aka AWS) in Indonesia, including developers, architects, or users. We are here to share ideas & learn from each other and from leading figures in the AWS technology space. In this group you can get helpful insights and advice from other group members.
Join our other sites:

• Telegram: [https://t.me/AWSUserGroupID](https://t.me/AWSUserGroupID)

• Facebook:  [https://www.facebook.com/groups/awsindonesia/](https://www.facebook.com/groups/awsindonesia/)

• LinkedIn: [https://www.linkedin.com/company/aws-user-group-indonesia](https://www.linkedin.com/company/aws-user-group-indonesia)

• Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/awsugjkt/](https://www.instagram.com/awsugjkt/)

• Official Website: [https://jakarta.awscommunity.id](https://jakarta.awscommunity.id)

groups.name: AWS User Group Jalisco
groups.description: Este grupo tiene como propósito enseñarte sobre diseño y arquitectura en la nube de Amazon Web Services, hablaremos sobre temas relacionados a SRE, DevOps, alta disponibilidad, big data, mobile, backend entre muchos otros con talleres en donde podrás aprender a desarrollar soluciones robustas para tu negocio ó proyecto de emprendimiento.

groups.name: AWS User Group Joinville
groups.description:
AWS User Group Joinville

Bem-vindo ao AWS User Group Joinville! Somos uma comunidade de profissionais, entusiastas e curiosos pela AWS, onde o objetivo é compartilhar conhecimento, trocar experiências e aprender mais sobre as mais recentes tecnologias e práticas em nuvem. Se você é iniciante, profissional ou apenas curioso sobre a AWS, nosso grupo é o lugar certo para você!

Junte-se a nós em encontros regulares para explorar temas como DevOps, arquitetura de nuvem, inteligência artificial, machine learning, infraestrutura como código, segurança e muito mais. Nossos eventos variam de palestras técnicas e hands-on a discussões sobre desafios e tendências do mercado. Aqui, você terá a oportunidade de aprender, trocar experiências e expandir sua rede de contatos.

Participe do AWS User Group Joinville e esteja conectado com a comunidade local de usuários de AWS. Venha compartilhar, aprender e crescer com a gente!

groups.name: AWS User Group João Pessoa
groups.description:
Este grupo tem como objetivo fomentar a comunidade pessoense de Cloud Computing com foco em AWS, desde iniciantes até especialistas, para trocar experiências no uso de serviços AWS, compartilhar boas práticas, ,estudos de casos, laboratórios e informações gerais sobre o tema.

Discussões sobre todos os tópicos envolvendo AWS são bem vindas!

groups.name: AWS User Group Jönköping
groups.description:
The Jönköping AWS Users Group is for people interested in the Amazon Web Services in the Jönköping area.
Everyone is welcome, all level of expertise is appreciated, from zero to hero, all you need is to have an intrest in AWS and Cloud Computing.

The purpose of this group is to together build a community where we can share knowledge, experience and help each other in the field of Cloud Computing.

groups.name: AWS User Group Kanpur
groups.description:
Welcome to AWS User Group Kanpur, a community dedicated to connecting, learning, and growing together in the world of AWS and cloud computing. Whether you're new to the cloud or an experienced professional, our meetups offer an excellent opportunity to expand your knowledge and network with others who share your passion for technology.

🔹 Why Join Us?

Free, engaging events designed to help you explore and master AWS products, services, and cloud solutions.
Hands-on workshops and live demos to provide you with practical experience.
Expert talks from AWS professionals and community leaders.
Networking opportunities to connect with fellow cloud enthusiasts.
Real-world use cases to see how AWS is transforming businesses and industries.
📌 We’d love to have you as part of Kanpur’s growing AWS community!

👉 Join us, learn, and help build a brighter future with cloud technologies.

groups.name: AWS User Group Kharkiv
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Kharkiv! Whether you're a seasoned AWS pro or just starting out, this group is for anyone interested in cloud computing, serverless architecture, machine learning, and more. Join us for regular meetups, workshops, and networking opportunities to connect with like-minded individuals and stay up-to-date on the latest AWS trends and technologies. Let's learn, grow, and innovate together in the exciting world of cloud computing!

groups.name: AWS User Group Kigali
groups.description: A peer to peer community based in Kigali which meets regularly to share ideas, answer questions, and learn new AWS services and best practices.

groups.name: AWS User Group Kochi
groups.description:
AWS User Group Kochi is a 100% community driven group of passionate [Amazon Web Services](https://aws.amazon.com/) Developers, Solution Architects, DevOps Engineers, Users, Evangelists, & Partners who meet regularly to share ideas, answer questions, and learn about new AWS services and best practices.

All skill levels including students who would like to learn about AWS are welcome to help accomplish our motto of learning, sharing and networking. Let’s join hands to empower this tech community to make it bigger and better!

For details : https://awsugkochi.in
Contact us : info@awsugkochi.in

groups.name: AWS User Group Kolkata
groups.description:
Join the AWS User Group Kolkata meetup group for a chance to connect with like-minded individuals and learn about the latest advancements in cloud computing! 🌩️

Our group is dedicated to sharing knowledge, best practices, and experiences related to Amazon Web Services (AWS) and other cloud technologies. 💻

Whether you're a seasoned pro or just starting out, we welcome all levels of expertise and enthusiasm. 🌟

At our meetups, you'll have the opportunity to network with other professionals, hear from industry experts, and learn about the latest trends and innovations in the field. We'll also have hands-on workshops and interactive sessions to help you deepen your knowledge and skills. 💻👨‍💻

Our goal is to create a supportive and inclusive community where everyone can learn and grow together. We believe that sharing knowledge and experiences is key to success, and we're committed to fostering a collaborative and respectful environment. 🌐👥

So come on in, and let's explore the wonders of the cloud together! 🌱
We can't wait to see you at our next meetup! 🎉

groups.name: AWS User Group Kosice
groups.description:
Join the AWS User Group Kosice on Meetup.com for the latest insights and discussions on the dynamic world of cloud computing.
This group focuses on a wide range of topics including business intelligence in the cloud, cloud security, integration, artificial intelligence, and recommender systems. Additionally, we explore the realms of AWS services such as Amazon RDS and Amazon EMR, as well as cutting-edge technologies like Docker and serverless architecture.
Whether you're a skilled professional or just starting on your cloud journey, our community welcomes all with an interest in cloud services, IoT, analytics, and more.

Do you want to become a presenter on any of our meetups?
register your presentation here: https://sessionize.com/aws-ug-kosice/

groups.name: AWS User Group Kozhikode
groups.description:
AWS User Group Kozhikode is a volunteer-led, community-first initiative aimed at bringing together people interested in cloud computing and modern infrastructure using Amazon Web Services.

The group is being built as a space for open conversations, shared learning, and practical knowledge exchange around cloud technologies, architecture, and real-world problem solving. As we kick things off, the focus is on forming a strong local community and shaping future meetups together.

Whether you’re a student exploring cloud for the first time, a professional working with AWS, or simply curious about how cloud technologies are used in the real world, you’re welcome here.

groups.name: AWS User Group Kuopio
groups.description:
The AWS User Group Kuopio is for people interested in Amazon Web Services (AWS). This user group mainly operates in the Kuopio area but can organize events in other regions of Finland if needed. Everyone, regardless of their geographical location, is welcome to join the group.

You don't need to be an expert on AWS to participate. Everyone can join this group and share information, experiences, and knowledge about AWS.

You can use the hashtag #awsusergroupkuopio on social media when sharing content about our events!

groups.name: AWS User Group Kyiv
groups.description:
Let's get the Ukraine chapter of AWS user groups around the world started!
Join us to get to know other AWS users in Ukraine and exchange experiences, best practices, and meet like-minded people! We'll cover Use Cases, Success Stories, Tips & Tricks, Cloud Computing, DevOps.
Anyone and everyone with an interest in the cloud is welcome!
The 3 core goals of this group are:
🔸useful and interesting content on AWS related topics
🔸encourage discussions and networking
🔸community driven and fun
📣Speakers are welcome!

groups.name: AWS User Group La Paz
groups.description:
AWS User Group La Paz es un [grupo oficial de AWS](https://aws.amazon.com/developer/community/usergroups/)  que tiene el objetivo de enseñar, incentivar y mostrar los beneficios profesionales y empresariales de AWS como cloud provider.

Los temas que vemos van desde diseño y arquitectura de infraestructura orientada a la nube de AWS hasta temas como escalabilidad, alta disponibilidad, big data, AI, desarrollo de software orientado a AWS.

groups.name: AWS User Group Lancashire
groups.description:
Welcome to AWS User Group Lancashire! This community welcomes anyone enthusiastic about Amazon Web Services (AWS), cloud computing or technology in general, whether you're an experienced user or just starting out.

Our aim is to bring together developers, architects, SysOps professionals, business leaders, and enthusiasts to learn, share, and connect within the AWS community. We plan to visit various cities across Lancashire throughout the year and look forward to meeting you!

We host engaging talks, workshops, and networking sessions with guest speakers from AWS and the cloud community. Join us to broaden your knowledge, explore ideas, and connect with others passionate about the cloud!




**Code Of Conduct**
We value the participation of each and every member and want all attendees to have an enjoyable and fulfilling experience. Accordingly, all attendees, speakers, organisers, and volunteers are required to conform to [the AWS Code of Conduct.](https://aws.amazon.com/codeofconduct/) Please be respectful and courteous to each other at events and on related social media.




**Want To Speak?**
Do you have an AWS or cloud-related story, a recent major project to share your experience of, special expertise in the field or even just some tips to share? If so, we'd love to hear from you! Our Call For Speakers can be found [on our Gravatar profile](https://gravatar.com/awsuglancs).




**Get In Touch, Feedback & Socials**
There are many ways to interact with AWS User Group Lancashire, all of which are now [on our Gravatar profile](https://gravatar.com/awsuglancs).

**Diversity**
Our events are free and open to everyone, regardless of background or experience. Please let us know if you require any accommodations, and we will do our best to assist you.

**Refreshments**
Food and beverages will be available at all events unless specified otherwise. Have any particular dietary needs? Let us know in advance, and we will do our best to accommodate you.

groups.name: AWS User Group Laos
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Laos! This group is dedicated to bringing together individuals interested in EC2, Cloud Computing, High Scalability Computing, Computer Software, DevOps, Technology Startups, Laos AWS Users, Internet Online & Web Technology. Join us to learn, network, and collaborate with like-minded professionals in the field of AWS and cloud computing. Whether you are a beginner or an expert, all are welcome to join our meetups and stay updated on the latest trends and innovations in the industry. Let's build a strong community and drive progress together!

groups.name: AWS User Group Las Vegas
groups.description:
**Curious about AWS or already a dedicated user?** 
Come join a vibrant community of like-minded professionals and enthusiasts eager to learn, share ideas, best practices, and questions in a welcoming, relaxed atmosphere.

**Our meetups vary:** sometimes, we dive deep with expert-led sessions and workshops from AWS or local actors; other times, we showcase local businesses and their cloud success stories. And of course, we always wrap up with some food and drinks perfect for building connections and expanding our networks.

We’re driven by a passion for AWS and the cloud, aiming to educate, learn and support each other. Our meetups focus on learning and sharing knowledge, encompassing all aspects of the AWS ecosystem—from technical users to service providers, staffing, and training. 

\*\*Everyone’s welcome to join and contribute!\*\*

Interested in hosting, sponsoring, or speaking at our events? Reach out to Maria Christidi Noble here on Meetup, on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/maria-christidi-noble/), or via email at christidi.maria@gmail.com

groups.name: AWS User Group Lebanon
groups.description:
AWS User Group Lebanon is officially powered by AWS.

We do monthly meetups, sessions, and workshops.
Are you interested in cloud and technologies? join us now 🤗

groups.name: AWS User Group León Gto
groups.description: ¡Bienvenido al Meetup del Grupo de Usuarios de AWS León Gto! Nuestro grupo está dedicado a reunir a entusiastas de la computación en la nube de León Guanajuato que estén interesados en los servicios de AWS. Ya seas un profesional experimentado en AWS o estés comenzando, únete a nosotros para hacer networking, compartir experiencias y aprender de expertos de la industria a través de meetups, talleres y presentaciones. Ven y forma parte de nuestra comunidad para mantenerte al día con las últimas tendencias y desarrollos en computación en la nube. ¡Exploremos juntos el mundo de AWS y mejoremos nuestras habilidades!

groups.name: AWS User Group Lisbon
groups.description:
Join our slack: [https://tinyurl.com/join-aws-pt-user-group-slack](https://tinyurl.com/join-aws-pt-user-group-slack)

Grupo para todos os topicos relacionados com AWS em Lisboa. Pretende ser a fundacao de uma comunidade de profissionais de TI,Programadores, Gestores de servicos e negocios motivados a partilhar ideias e conhecimentos em torno da sua utilizacao da plataforma publica de cloud computing da Amazon Web Services. Estamos agora no principio, mas queremos ser uma comunidade forte onde os seus membros possam colaborar e aprender.

groups.name: AWS User Group Liverpool
groups.description:
A meetup group to coordinate a face-to-face AWS user community. Proposed topics will be more about the technical aspects of AWS feature use and implementation, and will feature real-world use cases including what hasn't worked as well as what has. Join if you're a cloud evangelist in your organisation, and you design implement or service AWS based solutions.

All abilities are welcome, but be prepared to get in-depth!

groups.name: AWS User Group Ljubljana
groups.description:
🚀 Welcome to AWS User Group Ljubljana: Your Cloud Adventure Awaits! 🚀
Embark on a thrilling cloud journey with the Ljubljana chapter of the Amazon Web Services User Group! We are a vibrant community of AWS enthusiasts, trailblazers, and explorers, united by our passion for the ever-expanding universe of AWS and cloud computing.

🌐 Join us as we navigate the Cloud Cosmos 🌐
Whether you're a seasoned cloud captain or a budding astronaut, you'll find your place among the stars in our welcoming constellation of cloud adventurers!

🔭 Discover New Horizons with Technical Talks 🔭
Our meetups are a treasure trove of technical talks that dive deep into the many facets and applications of AWS services. Uncover innovative ideas, gather valuable insights, and boost your cloud prowess by engaging with fellow explorers and experts in the field.

🤝 Connect with Fellow Cloud Navigators 🤝
At the heart of our AWS User Group Ljubljana is the spirit of camaraderie and collaboration. Our meetups provide the perfect launchpad for networking and socializing with like-minded cloud enthusiasts. Forge new alliances, share your experiences, and join forces to conquer the boundless realm of cloud computing.

Are you ready to join our stellar squad of AWS adventurers? Suit up and prepare for lift-off! 🚀

AWS UG Ljubljana is an independent group; our activities and the opinions expressed here are not representative of Amazon Web Services. To learn more about the AWS User Group program, visit our [webpage](https://aws.amazon.com/developer/community/usergroups/).

groups.name: AWS User Group Los Angeles - AWS Builders LA
groups.description: Welcome to AWS Builders LA, a dynamic community dedicated to bringing together AWS builders, enthusiasts, creators, and business leaders from across the city. Our mission is to foster new connections and partnerships through building and learning together. Whether you're a seasoned AWS expert, a co-founder, or a business professional focused on leveraging cloud tools for practical solutions, our group offers a collaborative space to share knowledge and exchange ideas. Join us for engaging meetups, hands-on workshops, and networking events as we explore the endless possibilities of AWS technology, driving innovation and business success in Los Angeles.

groups.name: AWS User Group Lower Bavaria
groups.description:
Cloud bedeutet mehr als Server zu mieten. Die großen Cloud Anbieter stellen eine Vielzahl von Services zur Verfügung, welche die Softwareentwicklung in der Cloud einfacher, effizienter und oft auch kostengünstiger als in klassischen Systemen macht.

Dies ist eine Gruppe für alle, die sich für Amazon Web Services (AWS) beruflich oder privat interessieren.

Auch Freunde von Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform oder anderen Umgebungen sind natürlich herzlich Willkommen um über den Tellerrand zu schauen! Themen wie 'Serverless Computing', 'Cloud native Softwareentwicklung', 'DevOps' oder 'Containerisierung' und vieles mehr wollen wir in unseren Meetups behandeln.

Zusätzlich zu inhaltlichen Themen ist uns das firmenübergreifende Networking von AWS begeisterten im Großraum von Niederbayern sehr wichtig.

Jeder darf bei uns mitmachen und Themen einbringen. Wir freuen uns besonders über Speaker, oder aktive Members welche uns bei der Organisation der Usergroup unterstützen wollen.

Sollte Interesse an einem Vortrag bei der AWS User Group Niederbayern oder an einem Sponsoring für Räumlichkeiten / Catering bestehen, melde dich sehr gerne bei uns.

Wir freuen uns über jegliche Unterstützung.

groups.name: AWS User Group Macedonia
groups.description:
Welcome to AWS User Group Macedonia!

This group aims to spread any knowledge related to AWS and cloud computing in general.
Regardless of their current AWS knowledge, anyone interested in AWS technologies is welcome to the group.
We will hold presentations, workshops, podcasts and are open to new suggestions on how to share our passion for AWS.
Networking and socializing are also a big part of this group.

groups.name: AWS User Group Madurai
groups.description:
he AWS User Group Madurai is a community of technology enthusiasts, professionals, and students who are interested in learning and sharing knowledge about Amazon Web Services (AWS) and cloud computing. The purpose of the group is to create a platform for individuals to connect, network, and collaborate with like-minded individuals who are passionate about AWS.
The group is open to anyone who is interested in AWS, cloud computing, or related technologies, regardless of their level of experience or expertise. Students, professionals, entrepreneurs, and hobbyists can all benefit from joining the community, as they can learn from experienced professionals, share their own knowledge, and collaborate on projects and initiatives.
At the events organized by AWS User Group Madurai, members can learn about the latest trends, techniques, and best practices in AWS and cloud computing. These events can take the form of workshops, webinars, hackathons, meetups, or conferences, and are designed to provide valuable insights and hands-on experience for attendees. Members can also network with other members of the community, share their own experiences, and discuss ideas for future projects or initiatives.
Overall, the AWS User Group Madurai provides an excellent opportunity for individuals to learn, grow, and connect with other professionals who share a common interest in AWS and cloud computing. By joining the community, members can expand their knowledge, build their professional network, and stay up-to-date with the latest trends and best practices in the field.

groups.name: AWS User Group Mainz
groups.description:
If you are interested in Amazon Web Services (AWS), we invite you to become a part of the AWS User Group Mainz. Here you can connect with like-minded people in the cloud community, learn from others, and stay up to date.

What does the AWS User Group Mainz offer?

* Learn from experienced AWS users
* Network and expand your connections
* Stay informed about the latest AWS developments

Our activities:

* Regular meetups
* Interesting talks
* Networking opportunities

Come and be a part of it!

Whether you're new to the world of AWS or a seasoned professional, you're welcome. Join us and contact us for more information about our activities and events.

If you are interested in giving a presentation at the AWS User Group Mainz or in sponsoring for premises / catering, please contact us.

***

Wenn Sie sich für Amazon Web Services (AWS) interessieren, laden wir Sie ein, ein Teil der AWS User Group Mainz zu werden. Hier können Sie sich mit Gleichgesinnten in der Cloud-Community vernetzen, von anderen lernen und auf dem neuesten Stand bleiben.

Was bietet die AWS User Group Mainz?

* Lernen Sie von erfahrenen AWS-Anwendern
* Vernetzen Sie sich und erweitern Sie Ihre Kontakte
* Bleiben Sie informiert über die neuesten AWS-Entwicklungen

Unsere Aktivitäten:

* Regelmäßige Meetups
* Interessante Vorträge
* Gelegenheiten zum Netzwerken

Kommen Sie und seien Sie ein Teil davon!

Ob Sie neu in der Welt von AWS sind oder ein erfahrener Profi, Sie sind willkommen. Kommen Sie zu uns und kontaktieren Sie uns für weitere Informationen über unsere Aktivitäten und Veranstaltungen.

Wenn Sie Interesse haben, einen Vortrag bei der AWS User Group Mainz zu halten oder Räumlichkeiten / Catering zu sponsern, kontaktieren Sie uns bitte.

groups.name: AWS User Group Malang
groups.description:
Welcome to **AWS User Group Malang**. 

We are sponsored by **AWS Indonesia,** and we want to **empower** local software developers in **Malang**, Indonesia.

Every **software developer** (regardless of their level of experience), can join this community.

Our goal is to **empower local developers** in Malang so that we can **contribute to society**.

groups.name: AWS User Group Malaysia
groups.description: A group of Amazon Web Services users and Cloud Computing enthusiasts in Malaysia. The group allows existing and new users to join a growing, dynamic community, and interact with other developers to answer questions, share ideas, and learn about new services and best practices.

groups.name: AWS User Group Malta
groups.description:
Welcome to AWS User Group Malta - the community hub for Amazon Web Services enthusiasts, professionals, and learners across the Maltese islands!

We're a passionate community of cloud computing professionals, developers, architects, and AWS users who come together to share knowledge, experiences, and best practices around Amazon Web Services. Whether you're a seasoned AWS professional or just starting your cloud journey, you'll find value in our regular meetups.

\#\# What We Do
\- Monthly in\-person meetups featuring technical presentations\, case studies\, and hands\-on workshops
\- Networking opportunities with local AWS experts and cloud professionals
\- Knowledge sharing sessions covering AWS services\, architectural patterns\, and real\-world implementations
\- Updates on latest AWS features\, services\, and certifications

\#\# Who Should Join?
\- Cloud architects and developers
\- DevOps engineers and SRE professionals
\- IT managers and decision\-makers
\- Students and academics interested in cloud computing
\- Anyone curious about AWS and cloud technologies

\#\# Why Join?
\- Learn best practices and real\-world AWS implementation strategies
\- Network with fellow cloud enthusiasts and professionals in Malta
\- Share your experiences and learn from others
\- Stay updated with the latest in AWS and cloud computing
\- Potential career opportunities and professional growth

Join us to be part of Malta's growing AWS community. Whether you're building your first EC2 instance or architecting complex cloud solutions, there's something here for everyone!

groups.name: AWS User Group Manaus
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Manaus Meetup, a community of cloud enthusiasts and AWS users in the Amazonas region. Whether you are a beginner just getting started with AWS or a seasoned expert, this group is for you. Come join us for monthly meetups where we discuss the latest industry trends, share best practices, and network with like-minded individuals. Let's connect, learn, and grow together as we harness the power of the AWS cloud!

groups.name: AWS User Group Manchester
groups.description:
This is the Amazon Web Services user group for Manchester, England.

Anyone and everyone with an interest in the cloud is welcome.

Whilst independent from Amazon, we frequently feature talks by AWS staff as well as fellow AWS users who share their experience and expertise with the group.

We're keen to hear from members what topics they'd like to cover in meetings. There's usually a free bar, always good speakers, and the opportunity to network with like-minded people.

**Want to speak at the group?**
Do you have an AWS or cloud related story, a recent major project to share your experience of, special expertise in the field or even just some tips to share? If so, we'd love to have you as a speaker at one of our future meetups!

Please submit your talk idea through our [Call For Papers](https://forms.gle/pCRFf89Kewi5k3AK9)

groups.name: AWS User Group Manizales
groups.description: User Group oficial de AWS en Manizales. Este grupo está abierto a todas las personas que quieren conocer acerca de los servicios de AWS, aprender a fondo sobre ellos y elevar sus skills técnicos relacionados a temas como DevOps, virtualización, serverless, IaC, IaaS.

groups.name: AWS User Group Manta
groups.description:
¡Bienvenido al AWS User Group Manta! 🚀
Somos una comunidad oficial de entusiastas, profesionales y estudiantes apasionados por la nube de Amazon Web Services (AWS). Nuestro objetivo es aprender, compartir y crecer juntos en el ecosistema cloud, fortaleciendo el talento tecnológico de la región de Manta y la costa ecuatoriana.

groups.name: Aws User Group Maringá
groups.description: Este grupo reúne pessoas interessadas nas tecnologias da AWS, desde iniciantes até especialistas, para compartilhar boas práticas, estudos de casos, laboratórios e informações gerais sobre o tema. Venha aprender mais sobre AWS e se conectar com a comunidade de maringá da nuvem mais amada do mundo! (=08042025/17017348)

groups.name: AWS User Group Medan
groups.description:

We are here to share ideas & learn from each other and from leading figures in the AWS technology space. In this group you can get helpful insights and advice from other group members.

groups.name: AWS User Group Medellín
groups.description:
Para todos aquellos que quieran ser parte de una comunidad interesada en aprender, fomentar y adoptar las nuevas tendencias de TI para el desarrollo y evolución de la industria con el apoyo de la estrategia de "Cloud Computing" de Amazon Web Services como líder en la industria en la capa de Infraestructura como Servicio "IaaS".

Con este nuevo grupo pretendemos crear, unificar y fortalecer una audiencia que se proponga en aprender, evangelizar y propagar los beneficios y oportunidades de evolución y mejora que nos provee la plataforma de AWS.

[https://aws.amazon.com/usergroups/americas/](https://aws.amazon.com/usergroups/americas/)
Medellín

groups.name: AWS User Group Mixtli
groups.description:
🚀 ¡**Bienvenidos al AWS User Group Mixtli!**

Somos una comunidad vibrante de profesionales, estudiantes y entusiastas unidos por la pasión de construir el futuro en la nube de AWS. Desde principiantes hasta expertos, cada miembro enriquece nuestra comunidad con sus experiencias únicas y deseos de aprender.

***🎯 Nuestra Misión:***

Crear un espacio inclusivo donde el conocimiento fluye en todas direcciones, facilitando el crecimiento profesional y personal de cada miembro.

***💡 Lo que hacemos:***

* Charlas técnicas de todos los niveles
* Workshops prácticos hands-on
* Sesiones de networking
* Casos de estudio reales
* Discusiones sobre las últimas tendencias en cloud

***🌟 Temas que exploramos:***

* Arquitecturas en la nube
* DevOps y CI/CD
* Serverless Computing
* Machine Learning e IA
* Seguridad en AWS
* Optimización de costos
* Y mucho más!

***👥 ¿Para Quién Es?***
Para todos los que quieran aprender y crecer en AWS:

* Desarrolladores
* Arquitectos
* DevOps Engineers
* Estudiantes
* Entusiastas de la tecnología
* ¡Tú!

Únete a nosotros y sé parte de una comunidad que está transformando el panorama tecnológico de nuestra región. ¡El futuro se construye en la nube, y lo construimos juntos! ☁️

¡Síguenos en nuestras redes y mantente al día con todos nuestros eventos! 🎉

groups.name: AWS User Group Montenegro
groups.description:
Purpose of this group is to spread the knowledge regarding AWS services and help others with onboarding to AWS cloud.
Anyone that is interested in AWS technologies is accepted in this group. The knowledge about AWS is not the requirement.
We will hold presentations, workshop & sessions between members as well as host speakers from the region and AWS.

groups.name: AWS User Group Monterrey
groups.description:
**¡Bienvenidx al grupo de usuarios de AWS en Monterrey!**

Somos una comunidad de profesionales, entusiastas y curiosos interesados en explorar y aprender sobre Amazon Web Services (AWS). Nos reunimos regularmente para compartir conocimientos, experiencias y prácticas recomendadas en torno a AWS.

Este grupo es **para cualquier persona interesada en la nube**, desde desarrolladores y administradores de sistemas hasta líderes empresariales y estudiantes. Ya sea que esté comenzando con AWS o tenga experiencia avanzada, hay algo para todos en nuestra comunidad.

Nuestros eventos incluyen charlas, talleres, demos y sesiones de networking. También nos encargamos de mantenernos actualizados con las últimas noticias y tendencias de AWS, y brindamos recursos para ayudar a los miembros a mejorar sus habilidades y conocimientos.

Únete a nosotros para conectar con otros expertos en AWS en el norte del país y disfrutar de la oportunidad de ampliar tu red profesional. ¡Esperamos verte en nuestro próximo evento!

groups.name: AWS User Group Montes Claros
groups.description:
Sejam bem-vindos entusiastas e profissionais de todos os níveis da AWS! 
Nosso grupo tem como objetivo compartilhar conhecimentos e experiências sobre as diversas tecnologias da plataforma AWS. Esperamos conhecer pessoas que, assim como nós, são apaixonadas por tecnologia e desejam aprender e crescer em um ambiente colaborativo.

Em nossos eventos, organizaremos palestras ao vivo e discussões sobre casos de uso reais, proporcionaremos sessões de networking e também realizamos happy hours virtuais. 

Junte-se a nós em nossos encontros presenciais ou através de nossas transmissões ao vivo. Fique atento aos nossos próximos eventos e oportunidades de aprendizado e networking!

groups.name: AWS USER GROUP MOSQUERA CUNDINAMARCA
groups.description:
El AWS User Group Mosquera Cundinamarca es una comunidad oficial de usuarios de Amazon Web Services (AWS) creada para compartir conocimiento, experiencias y mejores prácticas en torno a la computación en la nube.

👥 ¿Quiénes pueden participar?

Estudiantes, profesionales y entusiastas de la tecnología.

Arquitectos de soluciones, desarrolladores, administradores de sistemas, investigadores y todo aquel interesado en aprender más sobre AWS.

🎯 Nuestro objetivo

Impulsar el aprendizaje colaborativo.

Crear espacios de networking entre profesionales de la región.

Fomentar el uso de servicios cloud, inteligencia artificial, machine learning y soluciones nativas en AWS.

Apoyar la innovación tecnológica con impacto en nuestras comunidades.

📅 Actividades

Charlas técnicas y workshops.

Laboratorios prácticos y hands-on sessions.

Eventos de certificación y preparación para exámenes.

Meetups híbridos (virtuales y presenciales en Cundinamarca .

🚀 Únete para aprender, colaborar y crecer con AWS, en una comunidad que conecta la nube con las oportunidades de la región.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/usergroupawstc/

groups.name: AWS User Group Munich
groups.description:
This is the Munich chapter of Amazon Web Services (AWS) User Group.
We are a group of users who are interested in the ecosystem around AWS and cloud computing in general. We meet on a monthly basis in different locations/offices all over Munich. Networking and socializing is a big part of this group combined with mainly technical talks about different aspects and ideas for the usage of AWS and their services.

Everyone who participates in an AWS UG Munich event must adhere to the [Code of Conduct](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1LjNcvoByZLcL51fyT9Tf6ru3mkZQNBAK/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=117965126670623850306&rtpof=true&sd=true).

AWS User Group Munich is an independent group; our activities and the opinions expressed here and at our events are not representative of Amazon Web Services.

groups.name: AWS User Group Münsterland
groups.description:
Münster chapter of Amazon Web Services User Groups.

We are a group people which is interested in the ecosystem around AWS and Cloud Computing in general. We meet in different locations/offices all over Münster. Networking and socializing is a big part of this group combined with mostly technical talks about different aspects and ideas for the usage of AWS and their services.
We are part of a large Community Network.
[https://aws.amazon.com/de/developer/community/usergroups/europe/](https://aws.amazon.com/de/developer/community/usergroups/europe/)

groups.name: AWS User Group Nagpur
groups.description:
Welcome to AWS User Group Nagpur 🎉 — a community of cloud builders, innovators, and enthusiasts right here in the Orange City!

Whether you're just starting your AWS journey or already building at scale, this group is your go-to hub to:

🚀 Learn the latest in cloud, DevOps, AI/ML, security, and serverless
💡 Gain practical, real-world insights from experts and peers
🤝 Network with developers, architects, startups, and enterprises in Nagpur
🎤 Attend engaging meetups, hands-on workshops, demos, and talks
🌐 Connect with the global AWS community while making local impact

Our goal is to share knowledge, inspire ideas, and grow together by exploring how AWS can solve real challenges and open new opportunities.

✨ Whether you're a student, a professional, or a passionate tinkerer — you belong here!

👉 Join us today, be part of AWS User Group Nagpur, and help our community grow stronger together. Let's learn, build, and innovate on the cloud!

#AWSUserGroupNagpur

groups.name: AWS User Group Nashik
groups.description:
AWS User Group Meetups are events that bring the cloud computing community together to connect, collaborate, and learn about AWS and in general cloud computing.

Whether you are new to the cloud or an experienced user, you will learn something new at this AWS Meetup. These events are designed to educate you about the AWS products, services, and solutions in the cloud and help you develop the skills to design, deploy, and operate infrastructure and applications.

groups.name: AWS User Group North East Scotland
groups.description:
This AWS user group network is for engineers, cloud specialists, developers, and business professionals in NE Scotland. We’ll be running quarterly events to share ideas and learn from speakers who use or are from AWS. All speakers will primarily cover technical aspects of AWS services, including best-practice implementation and real-world use cases.
 
This group is an important resource for those who want to stay up to speed with developments in AWS cloud and related technologies. It’s also a great opportunity to meet your peers! All levels of technical knowledge are welcome, but be prepared to go in-depth!
 
Our Discord server: https://discord.gg/dDTTXRJV

groups.name: AWS User Group Novi Sad
groups.description:
We are proud to revive the AWS User Group Novi Sad, Serbia!


We will strive to accumulate knowledge of all aspects of AWS. Our aim is to promote a learning atmosphere and knit a community comprised of experienced professionals and aspiring builders in the city we call home.


In terms of meetup formats, we intend to put forth a diverse offering. We'll lead the way with a wide variety of 200-level introductory sessions and Chalk-talk Q&As about real-world architecture challenges, but expect hands-on deep-dive workshops as well.


Join us on this journey and discover exciting uses for AWS from others who are eager to share their experiences.

groups.name: AWS User Group Olsztyn
groups.description: AWS User Group Olsztyn gathers people focused on solutions around AWS cloud. We apply learning-by-example knowledge sharing model and inspire with new ideas. groups.name: AWS User Group Pangasinan
groups.description:
FB: [https://www.facebook.com/awsugpangasinan/](https://www.facebook.com/awsugpangasinan/)

Welcome to the **AWS User Group Pangasinan**, a community of cloud builders, IT professionals, developers, and tech learners passionate about **Amazon Web Services (AWS)** and modern cloud technologies.

Our mission is to create a collaborative space in **Pangasinan** where members can learn together, share real-world experiences, and grow their skills in cloud computing.

Whether you're just starting your AWS journey or you're an experienced engineer working with production workloads, this community is your home for learning, networking, and inspiration.

**What We Do**
• We host a wide range of activities designed to help you become a better cloud practitioner:
• Tech Talks & Deep-Dive Sessions on AWS services and cloud architecture
• Hands-On Workshops & Live Demos to build skills through practical experience
• Meetups & Networking Events for connecting with other local cloud professionals
• Certification Study Groups to support members preparing for AWS exams
• Community Projects & Hack Nights to collaborate and build real solutions
• Guest Speaker Sessions featuring AWS experts and industry leaders

Our events are accessible to beginners yet valuable to intermediate and advanced users.

**Who Should Join**
This group is ideal for:
• Cloud engineers, DevOps professionals, SREs
• Software developers working with serverless, containers, or cloud-native apps
• IT administrators and system engineers
• Students and aspiring cloud practitioners
• Tech enthusiasts exploring AWS services
• Anyone who wants to grow in cloud computing and connect with the AWS community

No experience is required — just curiosity and a willingness to learn.

**Our Vision**
We aim to build a strong and active AWS community in Pangasinan that:
• Promotes cloud education and continuous learning
• Encourages collaboration and knowledge sharing
• Supports members in developing real-world technical skills
• Helps grow local talent and create opportunities in the tech industry
• Connects Pangasinan to the global AWS community ecosystem

By growing together, we can elevate the region’s tech capability and create meaningful impact.

**Join Us**

If you’re passionate about cloud computing — or eager to dive into AWS for the first time — this group is for you.
Click Join and be part of a fast-growing community of AWS builders, learners, and professionals in **Pangasinan**.

We look forward to seeing you at our next event. **Build with us**. **Learn with us**. **Grow with us**.

**Welcome to AWS User Group Pangasinan!**

¡Bienvenidos al Meetup del Grupo de Usuarios de AWS en Pasto! Nuestro grupo se centra en temas relacionados con la computación en la nube, estrategias de aprendizaje, tecnología y sociedad, educación y seguridad en la nube. Nuestro objetivo es reunir a personas interesadas en AWS y la tecnología en la nube para compartir conocimientos, colaborar en las mejores prácticas y conectar con profesionales con ideas afines. Tanto si eres un usuario experimentado de AWS como si estás empezando, nuestros eventos se adaptan a todos los niveles de experiencia. groups.name: AWS User Group Pereira
groups.description:
Bienvenidos al AWS User Group Pereira, el punto de encuentro de la comunidad cloud del Eje Cafetero.

Pereira se consolida como el centro tecnológico de la región, un lugar donde convergen talento, innovación y oportunidades en torno a la nube y la transformación digital. Este grupo nace con el propósito de conectar profesionales, estudiantes, emprendedores y empresas que utilizan o quieren adoptar AWS, creando un espacio para compartir conocimiento, mejores prácticas y experiencias reales del mundo cloud.

Aquí fomentamos el aprendizaje colaborativo, la experimentación y la construcción de soluciones escalables, seguras y eficientes sobre AWS. A través de meetups, talleres, charlas técnicas y networking, buscamos fortalecer el ecosistema tecnológico del Eje Cafetero y posicionar a Pereira como un referente en ingeniería cloud en Colombia.

Si te apasiona la nube, la automatización, DevOps, arquitectura, datos o IA, este es tu lugar. ¡Bienvenido a la comunidad que impulsa la innovación desde el corazón del Eje Cafetero!

groups.name: AWS User Group Peru
groups.description:
💛 **AWS User Group Perú** es una comunidad abierta y colaborativa que reúne a estudiantes, profesionales y entusiastas de la tecnología para aprender, compartir y crecer en el ecosistema de **Amazon Web Services (AWS)**.
Nuestro objetivo es **democratizar el conocimiento en la nube**, generando espacios donde cualquier persona sin importar su nivel de experiencia pueda participar, hacer preguntas y adquirir habilidades prácticas.

importante como compartir.
Ya sea que estés dando tu **primer paso en la nube** o que busques llevar tus conocimientos al siguiente nivel, en AWS User Group Perú encontrarás un espacio para crecer acompañado de una comunidad apasionada y solidaria.
☁️ **Aprendamos juntos, construyamos juntos, crezcamos juntos.**

#AWSUserGroupPeru #AWSCommunity #CloudComputing #AWS #Networking #TechCommunity #AWSPeru

groups.name: AWS User Group Peshawar
groups.description:
The purpose of AWS User Groups is to provide a platform for AWS Enthusiasts to come together and share their knowledge, experience, and insights about using AWS services and solutions. These groups are community-led and provide a forum for members to connect, network, and learn from each other.

The AWS User Group community is made up of a diverse group of individuals, including developers, architects, system administrators, and business professionals, who are interested in using AWS to build and deliver innovative solutions. These groups typically meet in person or virtually, and members share their experiences, discuss best practices, and learn about the latest trends and innovations in cloud computing.

Some of the key benefits of participating in an AWS User Group include:

1. Networking: You can meet and connect with other AWS users in your area or industry.
2. Learning: You can learn from experts and other members about how to use AWS services and solutions to solve real-world problems.
3. Sharing: You can share your knowledge and experience with others and contribute to the AWS community.
4. Career Development: You can build your skills and knowledge of AWS and cloud computing, which can help you advance your career.

Overall, the purpose of AWS User Groups is to provide a supportive and collaborative environment where members can learn, share, and grow their skills and expertise in using AWS services and solutions.

groups.name: AWS User Group PITTSBURGH - WE'RE BACK!
groups.description:
AWS USER GROUP PITTSBURGH HAS RETURNED and we are now OFFICIAL!!!

We also have a brand new Discord server - [Join today](https://discord.gg/wD2PPrVCWA)

\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-

groups.name: AWS User Group Playa Vicente
groups.description:
¡Bienvenidos a AWS User Group Playa Vicente! 🚀
