groups.name: AWS User Group Poland Kraków
groups.description:
Always learning. Always sharing.
Attention AWS users and fans: If you want to challenge the rules and redefine the possibilities of cloud technology, AWS USER GROUP KRAKOW is the place to be!
Join a vibrant community of developers and executives united by their desire to share experiences and build relationships.
You can amplify your AWS knowledge, collaborate with leaders and peers, and even make friends—all within an open, safe environment that encourages free thinking and diverse viewpoints. Sign up now to join the conversation.

groups.name: AWS User Group Poland Lublin
groups.description:
Lubelska społeczność pasjonatów Amazon Web Services. Nieważne czy masz doświadczenie czy nie w usługach AWS - nasza grupa powstała w celu wymiany doświadczenia i informacji oraz wsparcia wszystkich tych, którzy dopiero chcą lub zaczynają przygodę z chmurą publiczną. 

Chcesz dowiedzieć się od czego zacząć swoją drogę do AWS? Dla Ciebie chmura to nie tylko serwery i wirtualizacja, ale przede wszystkim usługi gotowe do zbudowania i wykorzystania w aplikacjach. 

Chcesz dowiedzieć się jak inni poradzili sobie z wyzwaniami, jakie stawiała im chmura publiczna? Interesują Cię tematy związane z Serverless? Chcesz dowiedzieć się co to jest Chaos Engineering i czym zajmuje się SRE? 

Dołącz do nas, żeby poznać odpowiedzi na te pytania lub podzielić się własnym doświadczeniem! Spotkania i prezentacje będą poświęcone technicznych aspektom pracy z infrastrukturą AWS. 

Pamiętaj, nie ma złych tematów, liczy się przede wszystkim spotkanie i wymiana doświadczenia, zatem, masz dowolny temat? Zapraszamy do zgłoszenia za pomocą formularza - [zgłoś prezentację / call4papers](https://bit.ly/awsugcfp)

groups.name: AWS User Group Porto
groups.description:
🚀 **Welcome to AWS User Group Porto!** – Your community for AWS & Cloud Technology in Porto!

Join **AWS UG Porto** and dive into the world of **cloud computing, DevOps, AI/ML, serverless, security, and beyond!** Whether you're an experienced cloud architect, a developer exploring AWS services, or just getting started on your cloud journey, **AWS UG Porto** is the place to learn, share, and grow together.

🌍 **What to expect?**
🔹 Engaging **meetups, workshops, and hands-on sessions** on AWS best practices, new services, and real-world applications.

🔹 **Learn from experts** and industry leaders who will share insights on cloud architecture, scalability, cost optimization, and security.

🔹 Connect with **like-minded professionals, AWS Certified Engineers, and cloud enthusiasts** to exchange ideas and collaborate.

💡 **Why join AWS UG Porto?**

AWS UG Porto is all about **learning, sharing, and building together**. From deep dives into **Kubernetes on AWS (EKS)** to **serverless with AWS Lambda**, from **data engineering on AWS** to **AI/ML with SageMaker**, this is your chance to stay ahead in the ever-evolving cloud landscape.

🗨️ For fresh Cloud Native Lisbon news, join our Slack channel: [https://join.slack.com/t/awsusergroupportugal/shared_invite/zt-32uuihgk7-ZVGJDYTv3IaZd~pFz4trwg ](https://join.slack.com/t/awsusergroupportugal/shared_invite/zt-32uuihgk7-ZVGJDYTv3IaZd~pFz4trwg)

🎤 **Want to share your expertise?** Become a speaker at an upcoming event and contribute to the community! - [https://forms.gle/u2Ya33eN36RLdBvz7](https://forms.gle/u2Ya33eN36RLdBvz7)

📍 **Stay connected!** Follow AWS UG Porto for event updates and discussions. Let’s build the future of cloud technology together in Porto! 🚀☁️

network.name: Fábio's Community Builder Meetups (Sponsored by xgeeks)

groups.name: AWS User Group Puebla
groups.description:
**¡Bienvenidos al AWS User Group Puebla!** ☁️

En el AWS User Group Puebla, somos la **primera comunidad de AWS en Puebla**, un grupo apasionado por **Amazon Web Services (AWS)** y su ecosistema. Nuestro objetivo es crear un espacio donde profesionales, estudiantes y entusiastas de la tecnología puedan aprender, compartir conocimientos, colaborar y, por supuesto, disfrutar de buena comida en comunidad.

Este grupo está diseñado para personas de todos los niveles de experiencia, desde aquellos que están dando sus primeros pasos en el mundo de AWS hasta expertos que buscan profundizar sus conocimientos. Abordaremos una amplia gama de temas que incluyen Inteligencia Artificial, Machine Learning, mejores prácticas en diseño de arquitecturas, alta disponibilidad y resiliencia, Serverless Computing, ciberseguridad en la nube, y más!

Además de las charlas técnicas y los talleres prácticos, nuestros eventos también son una excelente oportunidad para hacer networking, conectar con otros profesionales, compartir experiencias, y formar parte de una comunidad en crecimiento. Queremos que todos los participantes se sientan incluidos y motivados para contribuir, ya sea presentando un tema, proponiendo un proyecto colaborativo, o simplemente asistiendo a nuestros eventos.

Únete a nosotros en el AWS User Group Puebla y forma parte de una comunidad que está construyendo el futuro de la tecnología en la región. ¡Esperamos verte en nuestro próximo encuentro y aprender juntos en este emocionante viaje por la nube!

¡No te pierdas de nada! 🎉 Síguenos en todas nuestras redes sociales y mantente al tanto de nuestros próximos eventos que tendremos para ti.

Encuéntranos en:
👉 https://linktr.ee/awspuebla

groups.name: AWS User Group Pune
groups.description:
AWS User Group Meetups are free events that bring the cloud computing community together to connect, collaborate, and learn about AWS and in general cloud computing.

Whether you are new to the cloud or an experienced user, you will learn something new at this AWS Meetup. This Meetup group is designed to educate you about the AWS products, services, and solutions in the cloud and help you develop the skills to design, deploy, and operate infrastructure and applications.

groups.name: AWS User Group Punjab
groups.description:
Amazon Web Services(AWS) is a comprehensive, continuously evolving cloud computing platform provided by Amazon that includes a mixture of infrastructure as a service (IaaS, platform as a service (PaaS) and packaged software as a service (SaaS) offerings. AWS services can offer an organization tools such as compute power, database storage and content delivery services.

AWS User Group Punjab is a group of individuals who are passionate about learning and sharing different cloud services and solutions offered by AWS.

groups.name: AWS User Group Pwani
groups.description:
Welcome to AWS User Group Pwani! We are a passionate community based in the Pwani region, dedicated to exploring and sharing knowledge about Amazon Web Services (AWS).
We have developers, sysadmins, DevOps professionals, founders, and CTOs passionate about cloud computing and AWS. We want to learn, share, and grow together.
Join us for monthly meetups where we discuss various aspects and services of AWS. We focus on how companies, developers, and individuals can benefit from AWS services to scale and grow their ideas. Whether you're a beginner, intermediate, or expert-level tech enthusiast, we welcome you to join us and be a part of our community.
You will have the opportunity to connect with like-minded individuals, learn new skills, and discover how AWS can help you achieve your business or personal goals. Our events are open to anyone who is curious, wants to start using, or is a seasoned veteran with AWS.
So, what are you waiting for? Join us today and become a part of the User Group community. We can't wait to meet you and share our knowledge and experiences with you.
Join us for insightful discussions, hands-on workshops, and networking opportunities with fellow AWS enthusiasts. Don't forget to RSVP for our upcoming events, and stay tuned for updates on future meetups!

groups.name: AWS User Group Querétaro
groups.description:
Este grupo tiene como propósito enseñarte sobre diseño y arquitectura en la nube de Amazon Web Services, hablaremos sobre temas relacionados a alta disponibilidad, big data, mobile, backend entre muchos otros con talleres en donde podrás aprender a desarrollar soluciones robustas para tu negocio ó proyecto de emprendimiento.

groups.name: AWS User Group Salerno
groups.description:
L'AWS User Group Salerno è una comunità aperta a imprenditori, startup, aziende, sviluppatori, sistemisti, software e cloud solution architect, e a tutti coloro che utilizzano o desiderano approfondire i servizi AWS. 

Organizzeremo regolarmente degli incontri per condividere soluzioni, discutere problematiche tecniche, scambiare esperienze pratiche e presentare casi d'uso concreti.

Unisciti a noi per ampliare la tua rete professionale, restare aggiornato sulle ultime novità AWS e imparare dai successi e dalle sfide affrontate dagli altri membri del gruppo.

groups.name: AWS User Group Saltillo
groups.description:
¡Hola a todos los entusiastas de Amazon Web Services en Saltillo!

¿Estás listo para unirte a una emocionante aventura de aprendizaje y crecimiento en el mundo de AWS? Nos complace invitarte a unirse a nuestro nuevo grupo de estudio AWS en Saltillo.

Nuestro objetivo es simple pero ambicioso: queremos fomentar y fortalecer la comunidad tech en nuestra hermosa ciudad, centrándonos en todo lo relacionado con Amazon Web Services. En este grupo, tendrás la oportunidad de:

1. Hacer Networking: Conoce a personas apasionadas por AWS y la nube y establece conexiones valiosas en el campo de la tecnología.
2. Colaborar: Juntos, abordaremos desafíos y proyectos relacionados con AWS, fomentando la colaboración y el trabajo en equipo.
3. Aprender: Desde principiantes hasta expertos, todos son bienvenidos. Aprenderemos juntos, compartiremos conocimientos y aumentaremos el nivel técnico de nuestra ciudad.

Estamos emocionados de verte crecer como profesional de AWS y contribuir al crecimiento de nuestra comunidad tech en Saltillo. Únete a nosotros en esta emocionante travesía de conocimiento y oportunidades.

¡No te pierdas esta oportunidad! Únete al grupo de estudio AWS Saltillo hoy mismo y juntos construyamos un futuro tech brillante en nuestra ciudad.

¡Te esperamos para dar inicio a esta emocionante aventura!




[CÓDIGO DE CONDUCTA](https://d1.awsstatic.com/legal/communitycodesofconduct/AWS_Code_of_Conduct_Spanish_2021-09-01.pdf)

groups.description:
This group is primarily meant to keep the community updated on cloud leader, Amazon Web Services (AWS). 

Who Should Join: Anyone interested in Amazon Web Services, Azure, GCP, and other cloud providers; customers or anyone contemplating the use of AWS or other cloud providers, IT professionals, start-ups, and developers.

groups.name: AWS User Group Security Colombia
groups.description: Comunidad ubicada en Colombia dedicada a compartir contenido de Seguridad usando la nube de AWS para usuarios hispanohablantes.

groups.name: AWS User Group Security Ecuador
groups.description:
**¡Bienvenidos a la comunidad de seguridad cloud AWS de Ecuador!**
Somos una comunidad de profesionales y entusiastas comprometidos con la seguridad en AWS. Nos une la pasión por compartir conocimiento, aprender juntos y elevar el nivel de expertise en cloud security en nuestro país.

### 🎯 Nuestra Misión

Con el crecimiento acelerado de AWS en Ecuador, hemos identificado una necesidad crítica: formar especialistas en seguridad cloud. Este grupo nace para llenar ese vacío, creando un espacio donde tanto principiantes como profesionales experimentados puedan:

* 🚀 Iniciar o profundizar su camino en AWS Security
* 🤝 Conectar con otros profesionales apasionados por la seguridad
* 💡 Compartir experiencias, casos de uso y mejores prácticas
* 🔒 Explorar servicios nativos de AWS para seguridad
* 🌱 Crecer profesionalmente en un entorno colaborativo

### 💪 ¿Qué nos hace diferentes?

Nos enfocamos **exclusivamente en seguridad**. Cubrimos todos los aspectos de security en AWS, desde fundamentos hasta implementaciones avanzadas, priorizando servicios nativos de AWS para maximizar el valor sin depender de soluciones de terceros.

### 👥 ¿A quién buscamos?

* Profesionales buscando nuevas oportunidades en cloud security
* Desarrolladores que quieren incorporar seguridad en sus aplicaciones
* Estudiantes y jóvenes profesionales iniciando en AWS
* Expertos dispuestos a compartir su conocimiento

**¡Si te apasiona la seguridad y quieres ser parte de una comunidad que aprende, comparte y crece junta, este es tu lugar!** 🇪🇨

groups.name: AWS User Group Sergipe
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Sergipe Meetup! Our group is for anyone in Sergipe who is interested in learning more about Amazon Web Services (AWS) and cloud computing. Whether you're a beginner looking to get started with AWS or a seasoned pro, our meetups offer a platform to network, learn from experts, and share best practices. Join us to stay up-to-date on the latest AWS technologies, tools, and resources, and connect with like-minded individuals who share your passion for all things cloud. Let's build a strong and supportive AWS community together!

groups.name: AWS User Group Seridó e Sabugy
groups.description:
Nosso AWS User Group Seridó e Sabugy no Meetup.com é dedicado a reunir pessoas das regiões do Seridó e Sabugy, no Brasil, que têm interesse em Computação em Nuvem e Integração em Nuvem. Junte-se a nós para networking, aprendizado e colaboração com profissionais que compartilham a mesma paixão por utilizar os serviços da AWS para impulsionar a inovação e o sucesso dos negócios.

Seja você iniciante na AWS ou um usuário experiente, nosso grupo acolhe todos os níveis de conhecimento. Vamos explorar juntos o potencial da tecnologia em nuvem!

groups.name: AWS User Group Sevilla
groups.description:
El grupo oficial de usuarias y usuarios de AWS en Sevilla. Organizamos talleres, charlas, mesas redondas y eventos de networking con el hilo conductor de la nube pública de Amazon.

Los eventos formativos tendrán diferentes niveles y todas las personas son bienvenidas: tanto si eres un/a expertx en AWS como si estás empezando a aprender sobre esta herramienta.

Puedes venir solxs o acompañadx, te vamos a recibir con los brazos abiertos y con muchas ganas de aprender!

Tienes más información en nuestra web:[ https://awsugsevilla.com/](https://sevillaugaws.com/)

Únete a nuestro grupo de Telegram: [https://t.me/AWS_UG_Sevilla](https://t.me/AWS_UG_Sevilla)

Puedes encontrar el código de conducta aqui: [https://awsugsevilla.com/conducta](https://sevillaugaws.com/codigo-conducta)

groups.name: AWS User Group Skåne
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS User Group Skåne!

This group is for everyone interested in Amazon Web Services in this region. Our meetups are events where members can learn and share information, experience, and knowledge about AWS. You don't need to be an expert in AWS to participate!
The goal is to get together, enrich knowledge and skills, and meet new people with common interests. Join us!

We are always looking for new speakers and topics, so if you are interested in presenting or have a suggestion, please let us know!
It will be a pleasure to hear about your learnings, services you are working with, projects, demos, or anything else you would like to share with us.
We welcome talks from any level of expertise.
Submit your talk here: [https://sessionize.com/aws-usergroup-malmo/](https://sessionize.com/aws-usergroup-malmo/)

Stay tuned for all our news and updates. Follow our LinkedIn page: https://www.linkedin.com/company/aws-user-group-skane/

We look forward to seeing you at our events! Most welcome!

[Marcus](https://www.linkedin.com/in/marcus-bladh/), [Jimmy,](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dahlqvistjimmy/) [Elias](https://www.linkedin.com/in/eliasbrange/), and [Suzana](https://www.linkedin.com/in/suzanamelomoraes/)

***Code of Conduct***
*AWS User Group Skåne is committed to providing a safe place for our members, regardless of gender identity and expression, sexual orientation, disability, physical appearance, race, age, religion, or any other protected classification. Everyone attending our events is expected to follow this code of conduct. Harassment, in any form, will not be tolerated.*

groups.name: AWS User Group SLP
groups.description:
¡Bienvenido a esta nueva comunidad de AWS!

Este grupo es una iniciativa de personas de San Luis Potosí, México con el fin de apoyar, divulgar y ayudarte a crecer dentro del entorno de las nuevas tecnologías de la nube que cada día son más demandadas en el campo laboral.

No importa si eres estudiante o profesionista relacionado a las tecnologías de la información, computación o cualquier otra carrera, aquí podrás encontrar información, algunos datos curiosos y acceder a conferencias con especialistas de AWS.

¡Únete a nuestra comunidad y comienza o continúa tu desarrollo dentro de la nube!

groups.name: AWS User Group Sorocaba
groups.description:
O **AWS User Group Sorocaba** nasceu para conectar pessoas apaixonadas por **AWS, cloud e inovação** — mas, principalmente, por **aprender fazendo e compartilhando de verdade**.

A ideia desse grupo vem muito da forma como acreditamos que a tecnologia deve ser discutida: com profundidade técnica, mas sem elitismo; com estratégia, mas com os pés no chão; e sempre focando em **gerar valor real**.

Falamos sobre arquitetura na AWS, boas práticas, segurança, observabilidade, automação, containers, DevOps, SRE, dados e tudo o que ajuda a construir soluções escaláveis, sustentáveis e que façam sentido no mundo real — inclusive quando o problema ainda não está totalmente claro.

Além do conteúdo técnico, temos um compromisso é: **construir uma comunidade diversa, inclusiva e segura**, onde diferentes níveis de experiência, trajetórias e perspectivas tenham espaço. 

Se você é de Sorocaba ou região e quer aprender, ensinar, trocar ideia, errar, acertar e crescer junto, esse grupo também é seu. Vamos construir isso juntos. 🚀☁️

groups.name: AWS User Group South Tamaulipas
groups.description: AWS User Group para el Sur de Tamaulipas, es una comunidad para intercambiar ideas y conocimiento sobre aplicaciones en la nube.

groups.name: AWS User Group Stockholm
groups.description:
**Welcome to the AWS User Group Stockholm!**

The AWS User Group Stockholm is for everyone interested in Amazon Web Services (AWS) across the Stockholm region.
You don’t need to be an AWS expert to join us. Everyone is welcome! Our goal is to create a friendly space where members can meet, learn, and share knowledge, experiences, and ideas about AWS.

The main purpose of this group is simple: to connect and grow together. Let’s make the most of our meetups and have some great conversations along the way!

**🎤 Speakers are always welcome!**
We’re always looking for new speakers and topics, so if you’re interested in presenting or have a suggestion, we’d love to hear from you!
Talks are welcome in any format or at any level of expertise, whether you’re just getting started or have years of hands-on experience.

We look forward to seeing you at our next event. Welcome to the community!
[Lezgin](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lezgin-b-2239b93/), [Lars](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lajacobsson/) and [Suzana](https://www.linkedin.com/in/suzanamelo-m/)

*AWS Community Nordics - [Code of Conduct in our Events](https://awscommunitynordics.org/code-of-conduct/)*

groups.name: AWS User Group Sucre
groups.description: AWS User Group Sucre es una comunidad tecnológica local que promueve el interés por la tecnología, la innovación digital y el uso consciente de herramientas digitales en la vida cotidiana. A través de charlas, talleres y espacios colaborativos, buscamos acercar temas como el uso de la nube, la ciberseguridad, la inteligencia artificial y el software libre a estudiantes, docentes, profesionales y cualquier persona curiosa por aprender. Nuestro propósito es despertar vocaciones tecnológicas, compartir conocimientos útiles y formar líderes digitales que puedan replicar lo aprendido en sus entornos. Apostamos por una cultura digital abierta, crítica e inclusiva, donde Sucre se proyecte como una ciudad con identidad tecnológica y participación activa en el desarrollo digital del país.

groups.name: AWS User Group Surabaya
groups.description:
AWS User Group Surabaya adalah perkumpulan penggemar Amazon Web Services (AWS) di Surabaya, termasuk developer, arsitek, dan pengguna. Kita di sini berkumpul berbagi ide dan belajar bersama satu sama lain dan dari para ahli di bidang teknologi AWS. Di sini Anda juga bisa mendapatkan ide dan ilmu dari anggota lain.

Bergabunglah dengan situs kami lainnya:

• Telegram: https://t.me/AWSUserGroupID

• Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/awsindonesia/

• LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/groups/10301518/

groups.name: AWS User Group São Lourenço
groups.description:
Este é um grupo aberto a todas as pessoas interessadas em Amazon Web Services, Cloud Computing e tecnologias relacionadas. 

Aqui exploramos temas como arquitetura AWS, EC2, S3, alta escalabilidade, boas práticas de nuvem, certificações, SaaS, IaaS, PaaS, casos reais de implementação e soluções modernas baseadas em computação em nuvem. Todos os níveis de conhecimento são bem-vindos, desde iniciantes até profissionais experientes. 

O grupo está sendo criado para fortalecer a comunidade de tecnologia em São Lourenço e região, promovendo inovação, troca de experiências e conexão entre pessoas que utilizam ou desejam aprender mais sobre AWS. Nosso objetivo é realizar encontros regulares para compartilhar ideias, discutir desafios reais do mercado, apoiar quem busca certificações, apresentar novos serviços e construir um ambiente colaborativo onde todos possam crescer e contribuir. 

Junte-se a nós e faça parte dessa iniciativa para impulsionar o ecossistema de tecnologia em São Lourenço.

groups.name: AWS User Group São Paulo
groups.description: Grupo voltado a discussões, palestras e networking sobre AWS. Discussões sobre todos os tópicos envolvendo AWS são bem vindas.
topics: Ruby On Rails Amazon Web Services

groups.name: AWS User Group São Roque
groups.description:
Bem-vindo ao AWS User Group São Roque.

Somos uma comunidade aberta para desenvolvedores, arquitetos, profissionais de tecnologia e entusiastas que desejam aprender, compartilhar conhecimento e crescer juntos no ecossistema AWS.

Nosso objetivo é fortalecer a adoção de cloud em São Roque e região, promover networking e desenvolver talentos locais através de encontros, talks, workshops e experiências práticas.

Se você está começando ou já é experiente em AWS, esse é o seu lugar!

groups.name: AWS User Group Tacna
groups.description:
¡Bienvenidos a AWS User Group Tacna! 
Nuestro grupo se centra en todo lo relacionado con la computación en la nube, la arquitectura de aplicaciones. También cubriremos temas como desarrollo front-end, backend como servicio y por supuesto Serverless. 
Ya sea que sea un usuario experimentado de AWS o recién esté comenzando, nuestras reuniones ofrecen una plataforma para establecer contactos, aprender y compartir experiencias con personas con ideas afines. 

¡Exploremos juntos las infinitas posibilidades de la nube de AWS!

groups.name: AWS User Group Tallinn
groups.description:
**AWS User Group Tallinn** welcomes everyone interested in **Amazon Web Services (AWS)**, **Cloud Computing**, and related technologies.

Whether you're just starting out or already experienced, our meetups focus on exploring AWS services, modern cloud architectures, AI and data tools, sharing knowledge, and building connections within the tech community.

Join us to learn, share, and discuss the latest innovations in cloud technology!

groups.name: AWS User Group Tampere
groups.description:
This group is for people interested in Amazon Web Services (AWS) in the Tampere area.

We organise Meetups about once a month during the "business months".  The Meetups usually take place during the evening after the work day, with a different local company hosting us.  The events are held in English and are free to attend. We're constantly looking for speakers so feel free to pitch a presentation topic to us.

The Meetups consist mostly of tech talks and networking, but if there's interest we can also organise hands-on labs on different topics. The most popular themes are experience reports / case studies from users of AWS, but also deep dives on technology and other discussions on technical solutions are welcome. We focus on technical and business presentations, not sales pitches. Last but not least, you really don't need to be an about AWS expert to participate in the events.

These events are organised by volunteers passionate about AWS and aren't official AWS events in any way.

See you at the Meetups!

groups.name: AWS User Group Tashkent
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS User Group Tashkent, a meetup group for the AWS user community. We are dedicated to bringing together cloud computing enthusiasts, experts, and beginners alike to discuss all things related to Amazon Web Services (AWS).

People with all backgrounds are welcome, but be prepared to get in-depth! If you are looking for some background information, we recommend starting with [AWS Overview Whitepaper](https://d1.awsstatic.com/whitepapers/aws-overview.pdf).

Remember to follow us in [Telegram](https://t.me/AWSUserGroupTashkent) and on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/aws-user-group-tashkent) for the latest updates and you can find videos of our past meetups on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@awsusersuz). If you would like to chat with other members you can join our [Telegram Chat](https://t.me/AWSUserGroup).

If you have case studies/insights/ideas that you would like to share with our amazing community please submit your talk idea via our [Call for Papers here](https://forms.gle/DyyogF783r1i4hm69).

We look forward to seeing you soon!

***DISCLAIMER:*** *AWS UG Tashkent is an independent group; our activities and the opinions expressed here are not representative of Amazon Web Services. To learn more about the AWS User Group program, visit official [webpage](https://aws.amazon.com/usergroups).*

groups.name: AWS User Group Tbilisi
groups.description: We're a community of engineers, developers and business professionals meeting to share ideas & learn from each other and from leading figures in the AWS technology space.

groups.name: AWS User Group The Netherlands
groups.description:
**About AWS User Group The Netherlands**

Founded in 2017 and over 4000 members strong, [AWS User Group The Netherlands ](https://awsug.nl/)is a vibrant community of professionals, enthusiasts, and experts who share a common passion for [Amazon Web Services (AWS)](https://aws.amazon.com/) and cloud computing. Established with the goal of fostering collaboration, knowledge-sharing, and networking within the AWS ecosystem, our community is a hub for individuals seeking to stay at the forefront of cloud technology.

**What we do**

Throughout the year we organise [meetups](https://www.meetup.com/nl-NL/aws-ams/) where our community members come together to learn from one another and meet each other. Once a year, we organise the Dutch [AWS Community Day](https://awscommunityday.nl/), a full day conference with a variety of workshops, keynotes, and sessions focused on business and technology.

**Our community**

Our user group is more than just a collection of people; it is a community where members can connect, share experiences, and learn from one another. Joining our community offers you the opportunity to engage with peers, ask questions, and collaborate on projects. Besided at meetups and the Community Day, our members connect on [our Slack space](https://join.slack.com/t/awsugnl/shared_invite/zt-dau5xd53-IHC~vOcUAl6VwQepbfS12A), [on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/awsugnl/), and on [X](https://www.twitter.com/awsugnl/).

**Get involved**

We encourage active participation from all members. Whether you’re interested in attending or speaking at an event, contributing content via Slack, X or LinkedIn, or simply attending meetups to expand your network, there are numerous ways to get involved. By participating in our community, you not only enhance your own skills but also contribute to the growth and success of the broader AWS community in the Netherlands.

groups.name: AWS User Group Thessaloniki
groups.description:
**Welcome to the AWS User Group Thessaloniki!**

Our group is dedicated to fostering a vibrant community of AWS enthusiasts, professionals, and learners in Thessaloniki. Whether you're an experienced AWS architect, a developer, a data scientist, or someone just starting their journey with cloud computing, our group provides a platform to learn, share, and connect.

#### What We Do:

* **Monthly Meetups**: We host regular meetups featuring insightful presentations, hands-on workshops, and Q&A sessions. Our events cover various AWS topics, from foundational services to the latest innovations.
* **Expert Talks**: Learn from AWS experts and industry leaders who share their experiences, best practices, and case studies.
* **Networking**: Connect with fellow AWS users, exchange ideas, and collaborate on projects. Our meetups are a great place to find mentors, collaborators, and new friends.
* **Hands-On Learning**: Participate in hands-on labs and workshops to enhance your AWS skills and gain practical experience.
* **Community Support**: Get support and advice on your AWS projects from our friendly and knowledgeable community members.

#### Why Join Us?

* **Stay Updated**: Keep up-to-date with the latest AWS services, features, and best practices.
* **Grow Your Skills**: Our educational sessions and workshops will enhance your technical skills.
* **Collaborate and Innovate**: Work with other AWS enthusiasts to innovate and create exciting new projects.
* **Get Certified**: Learn about AWS certification paths and get tips on how to prepare for exams.
* **Have Fun**: Enjoy a friendly and welcoming environment where you can learn and have fun simultaneously.

#### Who Should Join?

* AWS enthusiasts and practitioners of all skill levels
* Developers, engineers, architects, and IT professionals
* Students and educators interested in cloud computing
* Entrepreneurs and startup members leveraging AWS for their business.
* Anyone curious about AWS and cloud technology

Join us at our next meetup and be part of the AWS community in Thessaloniki. Let's learn, share, and grow together!

groups.name: AWS User Group Ticino
groups.description: Se sei appassionato di cloud computing, soprattutto se targato Amazon, unisciti a noi e troverai qualcuno che condivide la tua stessa passione.

groups.description:
The AWS User Group Timisoara is a community of Developers, System Engineers, System Architects, DevOps interested and involved in Amazon Web Services. To join the AWS User Group Romania #Slack channel scan the QR code from the group header picture.

groups.name: AWS User Group Tirupati

If you are an expert, share your knowledge and become a leader in the community.

groups.name: AWS User Group Tlaxcala FireflyCloud
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Tlaxcala FireflyCloud Meetup! This group is for tech enthusiasts, developers, and cloud computing enthusiasts in Tlaxcala who are passionate about all things AWS. Join us to network, share ideas, and learn more about the latest innovations in cloud technology. Whether you're a beginner looking to get started with AWS or a seasoned pro, this group is the perfect place to connect with like-minded individuals and explore the endless possibilities of the cloud. Let's spark some creativity and ignite our passion for all things AWS together!

groups.name: AWS User Group Tlaxcala | Mxintech
groups.description:
Bienvenido,
En este grupo compartimos conocimientos y experiencias relacionadas al uso de la nube publica de AWS (Amazon Web Services).

groups.name: AWS User Group Toronto
groups.description:
Users, developers & system engineers, come join a growing and dynamic community of Amazon Web Services (AWS) users. Interact with others to answer questions, share ideas, and learn about AWS' services and best practices.
Meetups are usually held every month featuring speakers with hands on AWS experience and including technology in the AWS ecosystem.
With the rapid growth of AWS among individual developers, start-ups, and enterprises across Canada it has become a powerful platform. To empower AWS Users we are building the Canadian community with Meetups in [Vancouver](http://www.meetup.com/Vancouver-Amazon-Web-Services-User-Group/), [Calgary](http://www.meetup.com/Calgary-AWS-User-Group/), [Edmonton](http://www.meetup.com/Edmonton-AWS-User-Group/), [Toronto](http://www.meetup.com/Toronto-AWS-Users-United), & [Montreal](http://www.meetup.com/Montreal-AWS-Users-United/).

groups.name: AWS User Group Triangulo Mineiro
groups.description:
Somos uma **comunidade aberta** para pessoas interessadas em **Amazon Web Services (AWS)** e **Cloud Computing**.
Aqui você vai aprender, trocar experiências e evoluir junto com outros profissionais e estudantes sobre:

[https://www.linkedin.com/groups/9235785/](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/9235785/)

groups.name: AWS User Group Trichy
groups.description: This is the Official Amazon Web Services user group for Trichy. Anyone and everyone with an interest in the cloud is welcome. We frequently feature talks by AWS staff as well as fellow AWS users who share their experience and expertise with the group. We're keen to hear from members what topics they'd like to cover in meetings. Everyone is welcome, regardless of technical level or understanding of AWS. There may be a free snacks, always good speakers, and the opportunity to network with like-minded people.

groups.name: AWS USER GROUP TRIPOLI
groups.description:
# **AWS User Group Tripoli**

### 🌍 About Us

AWS User Group Tripoli is the official community for cloud enthusiasts, professionals, developers, students, and entrepreneurs across Libya who are passionate about **Amazon Web Services (AWS)**, cloud computing, AI, and digital transformation.

We are part of the **global AWS User Group Network**, connecting Libya with more than 400 AWS communities worldwide. Our mission is to **empower Libyan talent** by creating a collaborative space to learn, share, and innovate with AWS technologies.

***

### 🚀 Our Vision

To make Libya a recognized hub for **cloud innovation and AI adoption**, by building strong skills, knowledge, and projects using AWS infrastructure, and by connecting local developers with the **global AWS ecosystem**.

***

### 🎯 Our Goals

* **Knowledge Sharing**: Organize meetups, workshops, and webinars on AWS topics (AI/ML, DevOps, security, serverless, big data, IoT).
* **Capacity Building**: Support students, startups, and professionals to achieve AWS certifications and real-world projects.
* **Community Growth**: Build a strong Libyan AWS builder community that collaborates with other regional and global groups.
* **Innovation Support**: Help entrepreneurs and companies in Libya adopt AWS cloud for business, research, and digital transformation.
* **Global Recognition**: Represent Libya in the international AWS Community Builders program and AWS global events.

***

### 👥 Who Can Join?

* Developers & Engineers 👨‍💻
* AI & Data Scientists 🤖
* Students & Researchers 🎓
* IT Professionals & Cloud Architects ☁️
* Startups & Entrepreneurs 🚀

Anyone curious or passionate about AWS is welcome. No matter your level—beginner, intermediate, or advanced—this community is **for you**.

***

### 📌 What We Do

* **Monthly Meetups** (online & in-person in Tripoli, Benghazi, Misrata, Sabha, etc.)
* **Hands-on Workshops & Hackathons**
* **AWS Certification Study Jams**
* **Knowledge Sharing** (blogs, tutorials, success stories)
* **Networking Events** with local & global experts

***

groups.name: AWS User Group Tubarão
groups.description:
Somos um grupo de usuários oficial de AWS e nosso objetivo é difundir conhecimento, experiências e melhores práticas em cloud computing e cultura DevOps.

O assunto é tech? Cloud? Inovação? Já é mais que bem vindo(a)!

groups.name: AWS User Group Tunisia
groups.description: AWS User Group Tunisia is a community for individuals interested in Amazon Web Services (AWS) and cloud computing. It's a platform for sharing knowledge, experiences, and best practices in AWS, catering to both beginners and experienced professionals. The group aims to facilitate networking, learning, and collaboration among its members, fostering a supportive environment for personal and professional growth in cloud technologies. Whether you're looking to expand your AWS skills, explore new cloud solutions, or connect with like-minded individuals, this group is an ideal place to start. Join us to stay updated with the latest AWS trends and become part of Tunisia's growing cloud community.

groups.name: AWS User Group Tupaciguara
groups.description:

groups.name: AWS User Group Turkey
groups.description: AWS User Group Turkey is a group for AWS User in Turkey to learn from each other's experiences, and technical aspects of AWS features.

groups.name: AWS User Group Tuxtla Gutiérrez
groups.description:
¡Bienvenidos al AWS Users Group de Tuxtla Gutiérrez! 🚀☁️

Somos una comunidad abierta de entusiastas, desarrolladores, arquitectos, estudiantes y profesionales de TI interesados en Amazon Web Services (AWS) y en las tecnologías de computación en la nube.

Nuestro objetivo es compartir conocimiento, experiencias y buenas prácticas, aprender juntos a través de charlas, workshops, meetups y casos reales, y fortalecer el ecosistema tecnológico en Chiapas.

groups.name: AWS User Group UK
groups.description:
Welcome to the [AWS User Group UK](https://awsuguk.org/), a meetup group for the AWS user community. Proposed topics will cover the technical aspects of AWS feature use and implementation. We will tend to focus real-world use cases - what has worked and what hasn't.

All abilities are welcome, but be prepared to get in-depth! If you are looking for some background information, we recommend starting with [The Open Guide to Amazon Web Services](https://github.com/open-guides/og-aws).

Remember to follow us on [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/awsuguk.bsky.social) and [LinkedIn](http://www.linkedin.com/company/aws-ug-uk/) for our latest news. We are migrating off [Twitter](https://twitter.com/AWSUserGroupUK) but will continue to post for now. If you want to chat with other members, [join our Community Discord Server](https://discord.gg/yMa8Rvtsmy).

If you (or someone you know) have case studies/insights/ideas that you would like to share with our amazing community, please submit your talk via our [Call for Papers form](https://awsuguk.org/call-for-papers/)[.](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf-x7wCrPgmgBvmldT095aAyu9gTm0JjE0ioJlhdG4c1EOUMg/viewform)

We are advocates for greater diversity & inclusion in UK Tech and are especially keen to receive talk submissions from people from underrepresented groups. If you are interested in speaking at a future meetup but would like to discuss what to expect or need assistance please contact our Diversity & Inclusion Lead [Natalie Gray](natalie.gray@codurance.com) or DM via [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nataliejgray/). Else you can check out our[ free resources to help you on your public speaking journey](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1qPfjnH3sVnJWZW5uM7inoItFKtV2HdP0F0pKUkjYmNg/edit?usp=sharing).  Finally, you can read the findings of our [2020 Diversity and Inclusion survey here](https://bit.ly/3m0PKGz).

Please take time to read our [Code Of Conduct](https://awsuguk.org/code-of-conduct/) - it applies to every member of our community, our services and every event we hold.

A big thank you to our Sponsors:

* [Cloudscaler](https://rebrand.ly/rayo-cloud)
* [Rayo](https://rebrand.ly/rayo-cloud)
* [The Scale Factory](https://rebrand.ly/scalefactory)

Some talks have been recorded - you can find previous talks on our [website](https://awsuguk.org) or on our [YouTube](https://youtube.com/c/AWSUserGroupUK) channel.
We look forward to welcoming you soon!

groups.name: AWS User Group Vale do Paraíba
groups.description:
Somos uma comunidade aberta e colaborativa de profissionais, estudantes e entusiastas de tecnologia que utilizam ou desejam aprender mais sobre Amazon Web Services (AWS). Nosso objetivo é compartilhar conhecimento, trocar experiências e promover networking em torno de soluções em nuvem.

Organizamos encontros regulares com palestras, workshops, estudos de caso e bate-papos técnicos sobre diversos serviços e boas práticas da AWS. Também incentivamos quem está começando na jornada em cloud a participar, pois acreditamos que todos têm algo a ensinar e aprender.

Se você quer expandir seus conhecimentos em nuvem, se conectar com outros apaixonados por tecnologia e fazer parte de uma comunidade vibrante, junte-se a nós!

groups.name: AWS User Group Valencia
groups.description:
¡Bienvenidos al grupo de usuarios de Amazon Web Services en Valencia!

Si eres un apasionado de las nuevas tecnologías y los servicios en la nube de AWS, este es tu lugar. Queremos crear una comunidad donde poder reunirnos para compartir historias, desarrollar proyectos, discutir casos de éxito, y aprender juntos.
Organizamos talleres, charlas, mesas redondas y eventos de networking.

Os animamos a que os apuntéis, ya sea como asistentes o para compartir vuestras experiencias y conocimientos con el grupo.
Para cualquier cosa no dudéis en escribirnos tanto por Meetup como por Twitter a @sbldevnet / @andoni013
\-\-\-

Welcome to the Amazon Web Services User Group in Valencia!

If you are passionate about new technologies and AWS cloud services, this is the place for you. We want to create a community where we can gather to share stories, develop projects, discuss success cases, and learn together.
We organize workshops, talks, round tables, and networking events.
We encourage you to join us, either as attendees or to share your experiences and knowledge with the group.

For anything you need, feel free to write to us on Meetup or on Twitter at @sbldevnet / @andoni013.

groups.name: AWS User Group Villahermosa
groups.description:
¡Bienvenidos al grupo de usuarios de AWS de Villahermosa, Tabasco! 🎉👋

groups.name: AWS User Group Vilnius
groups.description:
We're building Lithuania's AWS community - a place where cloud builders, developers, and AI enthusiasts meet to learn together and share real-world experiences.

Our meetups bring together Lithuanians and international residents working at local companies, with occasional visits from global AWS experts. We dive deep into practical cloud solutions and explore how AI is reshaping the way we build on AWS.

**What we do:**

* Real stories from companies in Lithuania leveraging cloud and AI
* Networking with local and international cloud professionals
* Guest speakers from AWS and global tech companies
* Hands-on workshops with AWS services and AI/ML tools
* Help with certifications and career growth

**Join us if you're:**

* Building on AWS or exploring GenAI/AI/ML solutions
* A developer, architect, or ops engineer working in the cloud
* Making cloud and AI decisions for your company
* Part of Lithuania's diverse tech community

**All skill levels welcome -** from cloud-curious beginners to AWS-certified experts.

Let's grow Lithuania's cloud and AI expertise together, one meetup at a time!

groups.name: AWS User Group Virovitica
groups.description:
A community-led group for anyone who loves cloud technology, AI, and modern software development in the Virovitica region — from students taking their first AWS steps at Virovitica University of Applied Sciences to seasoned engineers, and everyone in between who is curious and eager to learn.
Whether you are just starting your cloud journey, preparing for AWS certifications, or already managing production architectures, you belong here. We focus on real-world use cases, hands-on demos, peer learning, and keeping up with the latest in cloud, DevOps, and serverless. Come to learn, connect, and grow — together.
Because great tech communities shouldn't be limited to big cities.
//
Zajednica za sve koji vole cloud tehnologije, AI i moderni razvoj softvera u virovitičkom kraju — od studenata koji tek upoznaju AWS na Veleučilištu u Virovitici do iskusnih inženjera, i svih između koji su znatiželji i žele naučiti nešto novo.
Bilo da tek počinjete s cloudom, spremate se za AWS certifikate ili već upravljate produkcijskim arhitekturama — dobrodošli ste. Fokus nam je na primjerima iz prakse, hands-on demonstracijama, međusobnom učenju i praćenju trendova u cloudu, DevOpsu i serverlessu. Pridružite nam se — učimo, povezujemo se i rastemo zajedno.
Jer dobre tech zajednice ne smiju biti rezervirane samo za velike gradove.

groups.name: AWS User Group Warsaw
groups.description:
**AWS User Group Warsaw** is a community for AWS enthusiasts and professionals in Warsaw. We meet to share knowledge, experience, and discuss best practices related to Amazon Web Services through meetups and workshops.

📌 **Who's it for?**
Anyone interested in AWS cloud technology!

📌 **Cost?**
Participation in our meetings is free.

📌 **Want to Present?**
If you're interested in presenting or speaking in either Polish or English, please contact the organizers.

Call for papers: [https://forms.gle/pdYMwmZsTwV8bGLY9](https://forms.gle/pdYMwmZsTwV8bGLY9)

**Rafal Mitula:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/rafalmitula/
**Luke Dorosz:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/lukaszdorosz/

🔗 **Join Us!**
Enhance your AWS journey and learn more with us.

groups.name: AWS User Group West Midlands
groups.description: This is the official Amazon Web Services user group for Birmingham and the West Midlands in England (for clarification to avoid disappointing those in Alabama). Anyone and everyone with an interest in the cloud is welcome. We frequently feature talks by AWS staff as well as fellow AWS users who share their experience and expertise with the group. We're keen to hear from members what topics they'd like to cover in meetings. Everyone is welcome, regardless of technical level or understanding of AWS. There may be a free bar, always good speakers, and the opportunity to network with like-minded people.

groups.name: AWS User Group Windhoek
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Windhoek! 🎉 This is a space for AWS enthusiasts, cloud learners, and professionals in Namibia to connect, collaborate and certify. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, let’s grow together in the cloud!

groups.name: AWS User Group Women In Tech India
groups.description: The AWS User Group Women In Tech, India Meetup is a community for professional business women and college students who are enthusiastic about technology and AWS. Our goal is to empower and support girls and women in tech by creating a space where they can connect, learn, and share their experiences. This group is also open to AWS users who are interested in networking and gaining insights from a diverse group. Join us to gain confidence, enhance your speaking skills, and create valuable professional connections in the tech industry.

groups.name: AWS User Group Women In Tech Nepal
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS User Group Women In Tech Nepal Meetup! This group is dedicated to bringing together tech women and men interested in Amazon Web Services and Other Diverse tech disciplines. Join us to connect with like-minded individuals, exchange knowledge, and empower each other in the rapidly evolving world of cloud computing. Let's drive innovation and diversity in the tech industry together!

If you want to contribute to the community, please feel free to reachout. 

Subscribe to our Events Calendar: https://tinyurl.com/4uu8476v
Join our AWS Builder Group: https://builder.aws.com/connect/space/a165202b-a2a3-3e64-babd-08268fc7f8e2/community-nepal

groups.name: AWS User Group Women in Tech Ontario
groups.description: A community to promote, empower, advocate Women in Tech - AWS for Cloud aspirants, students & professionals to know, gather information, share knowledge, network in a professional environment

groups.name: AWS User Group Wrocław
groups.description: AWS User Group Wrocław arranges meetups and workshops focused around AWS cloud to learn about the latest developments. The group also brings together AWS-focused individuals for networking purposes!

groups.name: AWS User Group Yaounde
groups.description:
**Welcome to the AWS user Group Yaounde!** Our group is home to a diverse community of developers, sysadmins, DevOps professionals, founders, and CTOs who are passionate about cloud computing and AWS. Our goal is to learn and share ideas so that we can all grow together.

Join us for monthly community-driven meetups where we discuss various aspects and services of Amazon Web Services. Our focus is on how Cameroonian companies, developers, and individuals can benefit from AWS services to scale and grow their ideas. Whether you're a beginner, intermediate, or expert-level tech enthusiast, we welcome you to join us and be a part of our community.

At our meetups, you will have the opportunity to connect with like-minded individuals, learn new skills, and discover how AWS can help you achieve your business or personal goals. Our events are open to anyone who is curious about what AWS is, wants to start using it, or is a seasoned veteran.

So what are you waiting for? Join us today and become a part of the AWS User Group Yaounde community. We can't wait to meet you and share our knowledge and experiences with you.

Don't forget to RSVP for our upcoming events and stay tuned for updates on future meetups!

groups.name: AWS User Group York
groups.description: Do you use AWS or want to get started using the AWS stack? Come and learn from industry leaders and peers about best practices and new technologies.

groups.name: AWS User Group Zagreb
groups.description:
This is a group for all developers, architects and IT professionals from Zagreb, Croatia area who actively work or show interest in development of cloud applications for AWS platform. Everyone is welcome to join regardless of your previous experience with AWS. Primary goal of the group is to share knowledge on AWS platform, cloud development principles, architectures, high availability, serverless applications and everything else in that regard.

//

Cilj ove grupe je da na jednom mjestu okupimo software developere i cloud profesionalce s područja Zagreba koje zanima razvoj aplikacija za AWS cloud platformu. Svi su dobrodošli, bez obzira na znanje i iskustvo. Tema grupe je širenje znanja o AWS platformi, razvoju za cloud, principima cloud arhitekture, dizajnu visoko dostupnih skalabilnih aplikacija, serverless aplikacijama i svemu ostalom na tom tragu.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AWS-User-Group-Zagreb-103925154485545/

groups.name: AWS User Group Zilina
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Zilina Meetup! We are a community of tech enthusiasts interested in AI and Society, Artificial General Intelligence, Cloud Infrastructure, Kubernetes, and Cloud Native technologies. Whether you are a beginner or an experienced user, join us to network, learn from industry experts, and exchange ideas on the latest developments in the world of AWS. Let's come together to explore the future of technology and how it is shaping society. Join us for engaging discussions, workshops, and networking opportunities.

groups.name: AWS User Group Zrenjanin
groups.description:
**Welcome to the AWS User Group Zrenjanin!**

We’re a community of System Engineers, DevOps professionals, and IT enthusiasts with a shared interest in Amazon Web Services. Our goal is to create a trusted local network where members can share knowledge, exchange experiences, and support one another in working with AWS technologies.

Whether you're involved in AWS Cloud Computing, Network Security, IT Infrastructure, Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS), AWS Cloud Security, AIOps, DataOps, or DevOps, you’ll find like-minded individuals to collaborate and grow with.

We organize regular meetups, workshops, and open discussions to share insights, best practices, and real-world lessons from the field.

We also support AWS users looking to deepen their knowledge and sharpen their skills in the AWS Cloud.

**Let’s build, share, and move forward together.**

groups.name: AWS User Group | Kosova
groups.description:
Welcome to the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Kosova Meetup, managed by [Polymaths](https://www.polymaths.co/). We are a passionate group of AWS experts, evangelists, and enthusiasts. The objective of the meetup is education, we want to help the community learn and understand the value of modern cloud solutions.

Join our slack community: [https://shorturl.at/bciu8](https://shorturl.at/bciu8)

groups.name: AWS User Group Örebro
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Örebro! This group is for anyone interested in the latest technology, with a focus on AWS and serverless architecture.

groups.name: AWS User Group – Puducherry
groups.description: AWS User Group – Puducherry is a community-driven group for developers, students, and professionals to learn, share, and connect around AWS cloud technologies through meetups, workshops, and hands-on sessions. We are community-first and vendor-neutral.

groups.name: AWS User Group, Mysuru
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS User Group Mysuru! This group is for individuals interested in all things AWS, from cloud computing to serverless architecture. Whether you are a beginner looking to learn more about AWS or a seasoned expert wanting to share your knowledge, this is the place for you. Join us for meetups, workshops, and networking events to connect with like-minded professionals and expand your skills in AWS. Let's explore the endless possibilities of AWS together!

groups.name: AWS User Group-Bengaluru
groups.description:
A bunch of passionate Amazon Web Services (aka AWS) {Developers, Architects, Users, Evangelists} who meet to {share best practices, discuss up coming features, pit falls, etc}

If you'd like to speak about how you've used AWS or give a talk on specific AWS feature, please fill in the form below:


https://goo.gl/forms/OQXsmTFBjdFKq1Wp2


If you'd like AWSUGBLR to cover specific areas, please fill in this form below
https://goo.gl/forms/Txw6A2Fx56tWdI6x1

groups.name: AWS User Group: Ajolotes en la Nube
groups.description:
¡Bienvenid@s!

Este grupo está enfocado en brindar apoyo y conocimiento sobre todo lo relacionado a AWS, es decir, aprenderás sobre el uso, la implementación y la optimización de los servicios de Amazon Web Services (AWS).

Recordemos que AWS es una plataforma de servicios en la nube que ofrece una amplia gama de herramientas y recursos para empresas y desarrolladores. Por ende, este grupo está compuesto por profesionales y entusiastas de la tecnología que buscan aprender, compartir conocimientos y resolver desafíos relacionados con la infraestructura en la nube.

Las actividades de este grupo pueden incluir:

Sesiones de aprendizaje: Organización de charlas, talleres y seminarios sobre temas relacionados con AWS, como computación en la nube, almacenamiento, redes, seguridad, inteligencia artificial y machine learning.

Prácticas y laboratorios: Realización de ejercicios prácticos y laboratorios en línea para familiarizarse con los servicios de AWS, probar configuraciones y desarrollar habilidades técnicas.

Proyectos colaborativos: Colaboración en proyectos de desarrollo de software, infraestructura en la nube o migración de sistemas a AWS, trabajando en equipo para alcanzar objetivos comunes.

Resolución de problemas: Ayuda mutua para resolver desafíos técnicos, proporcionando orientación, compartiendo mejores prácticas y recomendaciones para optimizar el rendimiento y la seguridad en AWS.

Networking: Establecimiento de conexiones profesionales, intercambio de contactos y oportunidades de colaboración en proyectos profesionales relacionados con AWS.

En resumen, el grupo enfocado en AWS es un espacio de aprendizaje, colaboración y networking para aquellos interesados en aprovechar al máximo las capacidades y beneficios de la plataforma de Amazon Web Services.

Y recuerda, somos el User Group oficial de AWS en la CDMX.

¡Nos vemos pronto!

groups.name: AWS User Groups - Udaipur
groups.description:
Welcome to AWS User Groups, Udaipur.

It is an independent group for people in and around Udaipur who are interested in Amazon Web Services (AWS).

The main focus points of the group are -

* share AWS solutions / best practices
* help others with their architecture or technical questions
* share ideas and learn from each other
* discuss recent developments and innovations in the field of cloud computing and AWS
* socialize with like-minded people

groups.name: AWS UserGroup Foz do Iguaçu
groups.description: Vamos falar com todos que tem interesse em cloud, mais especificamente AWS, e trazer o compatilhamento de experiências, casos de uso e conhecimento sobre as tecnologias vinculadas à plataforma AWS. Vamos levar o Oeste paranaense e da tríplice fronteira.

groups.name: AWS Usergroup Hannover
groups.description:
Wir sind Anwender, die sich für AWS (Amazon Web Services) und Cloud Computing im Allgemeinen interessieren. Wir treffen uns im zweimonatigen Rhythmus in Hannover. Networking und Socialising ist ein großer Teil dieser Gruppe, kombiniert mit meist technischen Vorträgen über verschiedene Aspekte und Ideen für die Nutzung von AWS und deren Dienste.

We are a group of users who are interested in the ecosystem around AWS and cloud computing in general. We meet on a bi-monthly basis in Hannover. Networking and socialising is a big part of this group combined with mostly technical talks about different aspects and ideas for the usage of AWS and their services.

Die meisten Meetups finden auf Deutsch statt.

Mehr dazu im Blog

groups.name: AWS Usergroup Karlsruhe
groups.description:
**🌟 Welcome to the AWS Usergroup Karlsruhe! 🌟**

Welcome to the AWS Usergroup Karlsruhe, also known as the KAmazions! If you're interested in all things related to the AWS cloud, connecting with like-minded individuals, and expanding your knowledge, you've come to the right place.

🗓️ **Engaging Meetups and Informative Discussions**
We meet every 1 to 2 months to dive deep into captivating discussions about various AWS topics. From exploring the latest cloud services and frameworks to sharing real-life experiences with the cloud, our meetups cover a wide range of subjects. It's a fantastic opportunity to expand your knowledge, gain valuable insights, and stay up-to-date with the latest trends in the AWS ecosystem.

💬 **Connect on the AWS Community DACH Slack**
We strongly encourage you to join the AWS community DACH Slack group, where our community thrives. It's a bustling platform where you can connect with fellow AWS enthusiasts, ask questions, share ideas, and engage in dynamic conversations about all things AWS.
Join us at [AWS community DACH Slack ](https://www.aws-community.de/)#ug-karlsruhe and become a part of our growing network.

🎤 **Share Your Expertise and Experiences**
We believe that knowledge sharing is the heart of our community. We are always on the lookout for individuals who are eager to share their AWS expertise, innovative projects, or unique perspectives. If you have something exciting to showcase, we invite you to submit a proposal through our Call for Papers (CFP) form. Your contribution will enrich our community and inspire others to reach new heights in their cloud journey. Submit your proposal at
[CFP AWS Usergroup Karlsruhe](https://forms.gle/whmXBj4KbMj52UH78)

\- we are a self\-organized usergroup and not affiliated with AWS \-

groups.name: AWS UserGroup Stuttgart
groups.description:
AWS User Group ([https://aws.amazon.com/usergroups/](https://aws.amazon.com/usergroups/)) in Stuttgart. Talks and networking focusing on everything between Dev and Ops with Amazon Web Services.

AWS User Group ([https://aws.amazon.com/usergroups/](https://aws.amazon.com/usergroups/)) in Stuttgart. Vorträge und Networking mit Themen von Dev bis Ops mit Amazon Web Services.

Join the Slack Workspace of the AWS Community DACH to network: [https://join.slack.com/t/awscommunityde/shared_invite/zt-1eflev5fm-rTvv6JVNkm2fpYsI7ZiOjw](https://join.slack.com/t/awscommunityde/shared_invite/zt-1eflev5fm-rTvv6JVNkm2fpYsI7ZiOjw)
topics: Ruby On Rails Amazon Web Services

groups.name: AWS Users Group Brazzaville
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS User Group Congo, the first community dedicated to Amazon Web Services (AWS) enthusiasts and cloud professionals in Congo.

This group brings together developers, architects, engineers, students, entrepreneurs, IT leaders, and anyone interested in cloud computing and modern technology.

Our mission is to create a vibrant community where members can:

* Learn about AWS services, cloud architecture, and best practices.
* Share real-world experiences, success stories, and lessons learned.
* Discover modern approaches to software development, DevOps, AI, data, and security.
* Connect with local and international cloud professionals.
* Develop technical skills through talks, workshops, hands-on sessions, and community events.

Whether you are taking your first steps in the cloud or are an experienced AWS practitioner, you will find opportunities to learn, contribute, and grow alongside fellow technology enthusiasts.
Join us as we build a strong cloud community in Congo and help shape the future of technology together.

**Learn. Connect. Build. Grow.**

groups.name: AWS Users Group El Progreso
groups.description:
En nuestro AWS Users Group El Progreso, los participantes tendrán la oportunidad de conectarse con una comunidad local de usuarios apasionados por los servicios de Amazon Web Services (AWS). Aquí podrán intercambiar conocimientos, resolver dudas y compartir experiencias en torno al uso de AWS para la creación de soluciones en la nube.

¿Qué puedes encontrar en este grupo?

Charlas técnicas y talleres: Expertos y usuarios avanzados compartirán sus conocimientos sobre diversas tecnologías de AWS, incluyendo storage, redes, bases de datos, machine learning, seguridad, DevOps, y más.

Demostraciones en vivo: Observa cómo implementar soluciones en tiempo real con herramientas de AWS, desde configurar instancias EC2 hasta desplegar aplicaciones serverless con Lambda y otros servicios.

Sesiones de networking: Conéctate con profesionales, desarrolladores, ingenieros de nube y arquitectos de sistemas que están trabajando con AWS en diferentes industrias.

Soporte y asesoramiento: Aprovecha la experiencia colectiva del grupo para resolver problemas técnicos, conocer mejores prácticas y optimizar tus proyectos en la nube.

Anuncios y actualizaciones: Mantente al día con las últimas novedades y lanzamientos de AWS, así como con certificaciones y oportunidades de desarrollo profesional.

Este es un espacio para compartir ideas, explorar innovaciones, aprender juntos y avanzar en el uso eficiente de AWS, ya seas un principiante o un experto en la plataforma. ¡Únete a nosotros y potencia tu experiencia en la nube!

groups.name: AWS Users Group Minatitlán
groups.description:
**¡Bienvenid@s al AWS Users Group Minatitlán!**

Este grupo nace con el objetivo de crear una comunidad local de entusiastas y profesionales de la nube, interesados en aprender, compartir experiencias y explorar todo lo relacionado con Amazon Web Services (AWS). Aquí podrás conocer y practicar cómo implementar, administrar y optimizar los servicios de AWS para distintos proyectos y necesidades.

Nos enfocamos en apoyar a quienes desean crecer en la nube, desde principiantes que quieren conocer los conceptos básicos hasta profesionales que buscan profundizar en soluciones avanzadas de infraestructura, seguridad, inteligencia artificial, almacenamiento y desarrollo en la nube.

Disfruta de: 

* Charlas y talleres: Sesiones educativas sobre los servicios y herramientas de AWS, mejores prácticas y casos de éxito.
* Laboratorios prácticos: Ejercicios y proyectos en línea para experimentar con la plataforma y fortalecer habilidades técnicas.
* Proyectos colaborativos: Desarrollo de iniciativas conjuntas donde los miembros pueden aplicar lo aprendido y trabajar en equipo.
* Resolución de retos: Espacio para plantear problemas reales, recibir orientación y compartir soluciones efectivas.
* Networking y comunidad: Conocer a otros profesionales, intercambiar contactos y explorar oportunidades de colaboración local.

En pocas palabras, AWS Users Group Minatitlán es un lugar para aprender, practicar, colaborar y conectar con personas apasionadas por la tecnología en la nube.

¡Te esperamos para explorar juntos las posibilidades de AWS y construir el conocimiento que impulsen la innovación en nuestra región!

groups.name: AWS Users Group Minatitlán
groups.description:
**¡Bienvenid@s al AWS Users Group Minatitlán!**

Este grupo nace con el objetivo de crear una comunidad local de entusiastas y profesionales de la nube, interesados en aprender, compartir experiencias y explorar todo lo relacionado con Amazon Web Services (AWS). groups.name: AWS Users Group Neiva
groups.description:
¡Bienvenido al AWS User Group Neiva! Únete a nuestra comunidad para aprender, compartir y crecer con AWS, junto a otros entusiastas y profesionales de la región.

También hemos creado un grupo en WhatsApp, por si quieres unirte 😇:
https://chat.whatsapp.com/JF35iHLDMMX9fqhuPFkQuw

groups.name: AWS Utah
groups.description:
The AWS Utah group is a valuable resource for professionals looking to network and learn about Amazon Web Services (AWS). Our group hosts regular meetings and events where members can connect with each other and gain valuable insights on the latest AWS technologies and best practices.

At our meetings, we often invite industry experts to share their knowledge and experience with AWS. We also provide opportunities for members to network and discuss real-world challenges and solutions related to AWS. Our group is open to anyone interested in AWS, from beginners to experienced professionals.

We encourage all members to actively participate and reach out to each other. By connecting with others in the group, members can benefit from the collective knowledge and experience of the community. We also encourage members to share their own experiences and expertise with the group. Join us at our next meeting to learn more and start networking with other AWS professionals in Utah.

groups.name: AWS Well-Architected User Group Italy
groups.description:
**AWS Well-Architected User Group Italy** is a community-driven group focused on cloud architecture **excellence** and AWS **best practices**. We bring together cloud architects, developers, and technical professionals passionate about building well-architected solutions on AWS.

Our community explores the six **pillars** of the **AWS Well-Architected Framework**: Operational Excellence, Security, Reliability, Performance Efficiency, Cost Optimization, and Sustainability.

Supported by **The Cloud House** non-profit organization, we are committed to fostering knowledge sharing and professional growth within the Italian AWS community.
Join us to learn, share, and build better cloud solutions together!

groups.name: AWS West Palm Beach User Group
groups.description:
Our goal is to strengthen and grow the AWS community across Palm Beach County by bringing together cloud practitioners, builders, learners, and enthusiasts. Whether you're a student exploring cloud careers, a career changer entering the tech world, a developer looking to sharpen your skills, or an experienced AWS professional, this group is for you.

We’re here to collaborate, share knowledge, and create impactful solutions using AWS. Our events will focus on practical learning; best practices, tips, tricks, hands‑on demonstrations, and real-world use cases.

We believe community is built through connection, so networking and socializing are a core part of what we do.

Join us to learn, collaborate, and be part of a supportive local AWS cloud community that grows together.

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/aws-user-group-west-palm-beach/)

groups.name: AWS Women Colombia - User Group
groups.description:
¡AWS Women Colombia!
Somos una comunidad de MUJERES apasionadas por las tecnologías Cloud Computing en AWS y buscamos impulsar a más mujeres a aprender e implementar servicios cloud de Amazon Web Services, además de promover la inclusión de la mujer en el mundo de la tecnología.

¡¡Si también te apasionan como a nosotras y quires aprender y enseñar con otras mujeres totalmente GRATIS únete a nuestro grupo!!

Estás a un click de ser una Cattleya!

groups.name: AWS Women Ecuador
groups.description: AWS Women Ecuador es una comunidad enfocada en el crecimiento y generación de conocimiento colectivo de mujeres en el ámbito tecnológico.

groups.name: AWS Women in Cloud Buenos Aires - Meetup
groups.description:
Somos una comunidad de mujeres apasionadas por la tecnología y el aprendizaje.
Nos unimos para apoyarnos, compartir experiencias y crecer juntas en el mundo Cloud ☁️.

Ya sea que estés empezando tu camino en tecnología, estés buscando un cambio profesional o ya trabajes en el ecosistema AWS, este espacio es para vos.

💡 Organizamos charlas, talleres y encuentros donde aprendemos sobre temas como cloud computing, data, inteligencia artificial y más, siempre en un ambiente amigable, colaborativo y sin miedo a preguntar.

Sumate a AWS Women in Cloud Buenos Aires para conectar, aprender y empoderarte junto a otras mujeres que, como vos, están construyendo su futuro en la nube 🚀.

groups.name: AWS WOMEN USER GROUP ABUJA
groups.description: Welcome to the AWS Women User Group Abuja Meetup! We are a community of women who are passionate about cloud computing and all things AWS. Our group is dedicated to providing a space for women in Abuja to network, learn, and grow their skills in AWS. Whether you are a beginner or an expert, there is something for everyone in our group. Join us for regular meetups, workshops, and networking events to connect with like-minded women and advance your career in the exciting world of AWS. Let's empower each other and make a difference in the tech industry!

groups.name: AWS Women User Group Goiânia
groups.description:
Welcome to the AWS Women User Group Goiânia!

This community is a dedicated space for women in Goiânia to explore the vast ecosystem of Amazon Web Services. Our mission is to empower and connect women—from students to cloud architects—who are passionate about AWS.

Join us to dive deep into AWS services, Serverless architecture, Cloud Security, IoT, and Data Analytics. This is more than a technical group; it’s a supportive and inclusive environment to network, share career experiences, and grow together in the cloud. Let's build the future on AWS!

See you at our next Meetup!

groups.name: AWS Women's User Group Berlin
groups.description:
Are you a woman who is passionate about cloud computing and AWS? Do you wish to connect with like-minded individuals, share knowledge, and foster a supportive network? Look no further! We are thrilled to announce the launch of the AWS Women's User Group Berlin, a vibrant community designed to provide a safe and inclusive space for women in cloud.

At AWS Women's User Group Berlin, we firmly believe in the power of diversity and inclusion to drive innovation and excellence. Our primary goal is to create an environment where women in the cloud industry can come together, learn from one another, and grow both professionally and personally. We aim to provide a welcoming and supportive atmosphere where everyone feels valued, respected, and free to express themselves. We are dedicated to supporting and empowering women at all levels of their cloud careers, from cloud beginners to seasoned professionals.

Here's what you can expect as a member of our user group:

1. Knowledge Sharing: Gain valuable insights from fellow AWS users regarding their best practices and experiences. Amplify your knowledge in AWS and stay up to date with the latest trends in AWS.
2. Networking Opportunities: Connect with other women working in the cloud industry, expand your professional network, and build meaningful relationships.
3. Career Development: Enhance your skills in AWS, broaden your knowledge, and advance your career through targeted resources and learning opportunities.
4. Safe and Inclusive Environment: We prioritise creating a safe space where everyone can freely express their ideas, concerns, and experiences. We have a zero-tolerance policy for any form of discrimination, harassment, or disrespectful behaviour. Our women's user group embraces intersectionality, valuing and respecting the diverse backgrounds, identities, and experiences of its members, creating an inclusive space within the AWS community.\*\*
5. Collaboration and Support: We encourage collaboration among our members and promote an environment of support and encouragement. Share your AWS projects, seek feedback, and find opportunities for collaboration within the user group.

Join the AWS Women's User Group Berlin and be a part of a community that celebrates diversity, champions inclusion, and empowers women in the cloud industry. Together, we will create an environment where everyone thrives and achieves their full potential.

Stay tuned for upcoming events, workshops, and opportunities to get involved. Join our [LinkedIn page](https://www.linkedin.com/company/aws-womens-user-group-berlin/).

\*\*Given the significant lack of female representation in the field of cloud computing, we fully comprehend the value of fostering inclusive and safe spaces. Therefore, we extend a warm invitation to FLINTA individuals who are interested in being part of our User Group.

*! Please note that this user group is specifically for women and FLINTA only. If you do not identify as one of these please check out the [AWS User Group Berlin](https://www.meetup.com/berlinawsug/) !*

[Code of Conduct](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1areMNTWCzQs6dO7r_DiGE7MbONdsfHSN_jcJNyZAyTA/edit?usp=sharing)

At the AWS Women's User Group in Berlin, we have a strong and unequivocal code of conduct in place to create a safe and empowering environment for all.

\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*
**Would you like to host a future AWS Women’s User Group MeetUp at your company? [Register here](https://forms.gle/5QDa3djLdTSt33Rd6).**

**Would you like to speak at AWS Women’s User Group MeetUp ? [Submit your talk here](https://forms.gle/XhRFSQtEE4QQRRVk7).**

groups.name: AWS Women's User Group Port Harcourt

groups.name: AWS Women's User Group Sweden
groups.description:
**Welcome to the AWS Women’s User Group Sweden**

🙋‍♀️ **Who We Are**
Are you a woman - or do you identify as one - who is passionate about cloud computing and AWS? Are you looking for a community that champions diversity, fosters inclusion, and empowers women in the cloud industry? Do you want to connect with inspiring peers, exchange knowledge, and be part of a supportive network?

We’re excited to welcome you to **AWS Women’s User Group Sweden**! 💜

💡 **What We’re About**
We are a vibrant community for women and allies who are passionate about AWS, dedicated to creating an inclusive space where women in cloud computing can connect, learn, and grow, whether you're just starting out or a seasoned professional.

🫶🏻 **Why join us?**
✅ Learn & Grow – Expand your AWS knowledge and stay up to date with the latest cloud trends. We offer content ranging from beginner-friendly sessions to deep-dive technical talks.

✅ Network & Mentor – Meet talented and inspiring women in cloud computing, find mentors, and support others in their career journeys.

✅ Step Into Public Speaking – Thinking about sharing your knowledge but not sure where to start? We provide mentorship and guidance for first-time speakers to help you take your first steps confidently.

✅ Safe & Inclusive Space – We are committed to a zero-tolerance policy for discrimination, harassment, or disrespectful behavior. FLINTA individuals are welcome and supported.

🗓️ **Agenda**
The AWS Women’s User Group Sweden is on a mission to navigate through the Cloud, provide enablement, and empower women across the country, hosting at least five events per year:

* Three in-person meetups in Stockholm, Gothenburg, and Malmö.
* Two virtual events, so no matter where you are, you can join!

🎤 Lightning Talks (15 min, Levels 100–200, no Q&A) - A perfect, low-pressure space for new speakers and introductory topics.

🛠️ Breakout Sessions (30 min + Q&A, Levels 200–400) - Ideal for deeper technical dives, live demos, and expert insights.

📢 **Stay tuned**
Stay tuned for more events, news, and opportunities to get involved.
Follow our [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/aws-womens-user-group-sweden) page.
Interested in supporting our initiative and hosting a future AWS Women’s User Group Sweden meetup at your company, or would you like to speak at one of our events? Get in touch with one of the organizers.

***Code of Conduct***
*AWS Women's User Group Sweden is committed to providing a safe place for our members, regardless of gender identity and expression, sexual orientation, disability, physical appearance, race, age, religion, or any other protected classification. Everyone attending our events is expected to follow this code of conduct. Harassment, in any form, will not be tolerated.*
